name: I'm taking the IELTS test because I want to study overseas.

trans.cn: 我要參加雅思考試，因為我想出國留學。

word: I'm taking the IELTS test because I want to study overseas.

name: There's a population of 21 million in Beijing,so it's jam-packed wherever you go.

trans.cn: 北京有2100萬人口，所以無論你走到哪裡都擠滿了人。

word: There's a population of 21 million in Beijing,so it's jam-packed wherever you go.

name: I was born and raised in a small town in the south of China and I have two loving and caring parents.

trans.cn: 我在中國南方的一個小鎮出生長大，我有一對關愛我的父母。

word: I was born and raised in a small town in the south of China and I have two loving and caring parents.

name: Some of my friends are aiming to go and study in Australia,whereas my goal is to go to the UK.

trans.cn: 我的一些朋友打算去澳大利亞學習，然而我的目標是去英國。

word: Some of my friends are aiming to go and study in Australia,whereas my goal is to go to the UK.

name: The Mid-Autumn Festival falls on the 15th day of the eighth month of the lunar calendar

trans.cn: 中秋節是陰曆第八個月的第十五天。

word: The Mid-Autumn Festival falls on the 15th day of the eighth month of the lunar calendar

name: It's usually scorching hot in my hometown in the summertime.The temperature can even be 40 degrees Celsius sometimes.

trans.cn: 在夏季，我家鄉的天氣通常是炎熱的，有時氣溫甚至可以達到40攝氏度。

word: It's usually scorching hot in my hometown in the summertime.The temperature can even be 40 degrees Celsius sometimes.

name: I was amazed at all the vivid colors while I was snorkelling and looking down at the underwater world.

trans.cn: 當我在浮潛，俯視著海底世界的時候，所有豔麗的色彩令我驚歎。

word: I was amazed at all the vivid colors while I was snorkelling and looking down at the underwater world.

name: It's highly likely that we will use the computer more and more and the pen less and less in the future.

trans.cn: 將來我們很有可能越來越多地使用電腦，越來越少地使用筆。

word: It's highly likely that we will use the computer more and more and the pen less and less in the future.

name: I don't suppose shared bicycles are the best way to reduce traffic congestion.

trans.cn: 我不認為共享單車是減少交通擁堵的最佳方式。

word: I don't suppose shared bicycles are the best way to reduce traffic congestion.

name: The government is investing heavily in electric buses and I'm totally on their side.

trans.cn: 政府正大力投資於電動公共汽車，我完全支援他們。

word: The government is investing heavily in electric buses and I'm totally on their side.

name: I wish I could speak English better.That way,I would be able to travel the world without any difficulty.

trans.cn: 我希望我的英語能說得更好。那樣的話，我就可以毫無困難地周遊世界了。

word: I wish I could speak English better.That way,I would be able to travel the world without any difficulty.

name: I have a penchant for cooking and I seldom eat out because I'm only satisfied with the food I cook.

trans.cn: 我愛好烹飪，很少出去吃，因為我只對自己做的菜感到滿意。

word: I have a penchant for cooking and I seldom eat out because I'm only satisfied with the food I cook.

name: My granddad is already in his late 70s but he is still as fit as a fiddle because he eats well and takes exercise every day.

trans.cn: 我爺爺已經快八十歲了，但他仍然很健康，因為他吃得好，而且每天鍛鍊。

word: My granddad is already in his late 70s but he is still as fit as a fiddle because he eats well and takes exercise every day.

name: Many people from the countryside and small towns flock to large cities in search of a better job and a better future.

trans.cn: 許多來自農村和小城鎮的人湧向大城市，為了尋找更好的工作和更好的未來。

word: Many people from the countryside and small towns flock to large cities in search of a better job and a better future.

name: Although some areas are unaffected by climate change now,it's a pressing problem that has to be dealt with immediately.

trans.cn: 雖然有些地區還沒有受到氣候變化的影響，但這是一個迫切需要立即解決的問題。

word: Although some areas are unaffected by climate change now,it's a pressing problem that has to be dealt with immediately.

name: Celebrities are constantly followed by paparazzi and worried about being recognized on the street when they are on vacation and just want to relax.

trans.cn: 名人經常會被狗仔隊跟蹤，他們擔心在度假和只是想要放鬆的時候，在街上被認出來。

word: Celebrities are constantly followed by paparazzi and worried about being recognized on the street when they are on vacation and just want to relax.

name: I'm an Aquarius and it's said that people like me are born thinkers.

trans.cn: 我是水瓶座，據說像我這樣的人，天生就是思考者。

word: I'm an Aquarius and it's said that people like me are born thinkers.

name: One of my cousins is crazy about travelling and she has been to dozens of countries over the past 10 years.

trans.cn: 我的一個表妹熱衷於旅遊，過去10年來，她已經去過幾十個國家。

word: One of my cousins is crazy about travelling and she has been to dozens of countries over the past 10 years.

name: If this park were closer to my apartment,I guess I would go there more often.

trans.cn: 如果這個公園離我的公寓更近一些，我想我會更經常地去那裡。

word: If this park were closer to my apartment,I guess I would go there more often.

name: Fair-weather friends are definitely the kind of friends we don't want.

trans.cn: 不能共患難的朋友絕對是我們不想要的那種朋友。

word: Fair-weather friends are definitely the kind of friends we don't want.

name: Smartphones have blurred the lines between work and home lives and we often communicate with our colleagues and bosses after work now.

trans.cn: 智慧手機模糊了工作和家庭生活之間的界限，現在即使下了班，我們也經常和同事還有老闆溝通。

word: Smartphones have blurred the lines between work and home lives and we often communicate with our colleagues and bosses after work now.

name: It's okay if teenagers play video games in moderation.All work and no play makes Jack a dull boy.

trans.cn: 如果青少年適度地玩電子遊戲，這沒關係。只會用功不玩耍，聰明孩子也變傻。

word: It's okay if teenagers play video games in moderation.All work and no play makes Jack a dull boy.

name: It's obvious that being multilingual gives people an advantage in the workplace.

trans.cn: 很明顯，掌握多門語言能讓人們在工作中佔有優勢。

word: It's obvious that being multilingual gives people an advantage in the workplace.

name: Word-of-mouth advertising is the most effective form of advertising.

trans.cn: 口碑傳播是最有效的廣告形式。

word: Word-of-mouth advertising is the most effective form of advertising.

name: Looking at old photos brings back memories.

trans.cn: 看老照片會勾起回憶。

word: Looking at old photos brings back memories.

name: I went to the biggest theatre in town for a fascinating play last weekend.

trans.cn: 上週末，我去城裡最大的劇院，看了一場精彩的演出。

word: I went to the biggest theatre in town for a fascinating play last weekend.

name: The bus is the cheapest way to get around even though it's overcrowded most of the time.

trans.cn: 公共汽車是最便宜的出行方式，儘管大部分時間都很擁擠。

word: The bus is the cheapest way to get around even though it's overcrowded most of the time.

name: Success comes in various forms.It could be having a high social status,earning a seven-figure salary or simply feeling happy every day.

trans.cn: 成功有多種多樣的形式，它可以是擁有很高的社會地位，賺七位數的工資，或單純覺得每天都很快樂。

word: Success comes in various forms.It could be having a high social status,earning a seven-figure salary or simply feeling happy every day.

name: It's best to get away from it all and go on an excursion on the weekend.

trans.cn: 在週末出去走走、短途旅行是很好的。

word: It's best to get away from it all and go on an excursion on the weekend.

name: Spending   money  on  experiences,especially  with  other   people,is  what makes us truly happy.

trans.cn: 把錢花在經歷上，特別是和別人一起的經歷，可以讓我們真正獲得快樂。

word: Spending   money  on  experiences,especially  with  other   people,is  what makes us truly happy.

name: I usually get up around seven thirty.

trans.cn: 我通常在7:30左右起床。

word: I usually get up around seven thirty.

name: I was busy working on an assignment last night and I didn't go to bed until 2 am.

trans.cn: 昨晚我忙著做作業，直到凌晨2點才去睡覺。

word: I was busy working on an assignment last night and I didn't go to bed until 2 am.

name: I needed to arrive at a meeting at 3 o'clock yesterday,but it began to rain heavily at a quarter past 2 and I was 10 minutes late because of it.

trans.cn: 我昨天3點要開會，但是2點15分開始下起了大雨，我因此遲到了10分鐘。

word: I needed to arrive at a meeting at 3 o'clock yesterday,but it began to rain heavily at a quarter past 2 and I was 10 minutes late because of it.

name: My favourite pop star is Eason and I listen to his music every day for about an hour or so after dinner.

trans.cn: 我最喜歡的流行歌手是伊森，我每天晚飯後會聽一個小時左右他的音樂。

word: My favourite pop star is Eason and I listen to his music every day for about an hour or so after dinner.

name: That show was hilarious and I watched 10 episodes in a row.

trans.cn: 那個節目太搞笑了，我一口氣看了10集。

word: That show was hilarious and I watched 10 episodes in a row.

name: It's better to snack on an apple or a banana than to have a full meal if you feel hungry in the mid-afternoon.

trans.cn: 如果你在下午三四點感到餓的話，最好是吃個蘋果或香蕉，而不是飽餐一頓。

word: It's better to snack on an apple or a banana than to have a full meal if you feel hungry in the mid-afternoon.

name: I don't know exactly when the Forbidden City was built.I only know it was built in the 15th century.

trans.cn: 我不知道紫禁城確切的建成時間。我只知道它是在15世紀建成的。

word: I don't know exactly when the Forbidden City was built.I only know it was built in the 15th century.

name: The so-called Four Heavenly Kings were incredibly popular in the 1990s.

trans.cn: 所謂的“四大天王”在20世紀90年代非常受歡迎。

word: The so-called Four Heavenly Kings were incredibly popular in the 1990s.

name: This movie came out in 1997 and it was a massive hit back then.

trans.cn: 這部電影是在1997年上映的，當時它大受歡迎。

word: This movie came out in 1997 and it was a massive hit back then.

name: When I was 13 years old,I began to devour everything I could get my hands on--books,magazines and newspapers.

trans.cn: 當我13歲的時候，我開始如飢似渴地閱讀所有我能找到的圖書、雜誌和報紙。

word: When I was 13 years old,I began to devour everything I could get my hands on--books,magazines and newspapers.

name: My best friend is my 15-year-old cousin.Although I'm 10 years older than him,we see eye to eye on most things and get along perfectly.

trans.cn: 我最好的朋友是我15歲的表弟。雖然我比他大10歲，但我們在大多數事情上意見一致，相處得很好。

word: My best friend is my 15-year-old cousin.Although I'm 10 years older than him,we see eye to eye on most things and get along perfectly.

name: Those in their 60s or 70s are quite fond of dancing in parks.Younger people are not so keen.

trans.cn: 那些六十或七十多歲的老人十分喜歡在公園裡跳舞。年輕人對此不那麼熱衷。

word: Those in their 60s or 70s are quite fond of dancing in parks.Younger people are not so keen.

name: I remember very clearly that I received this letter on August  10th.That was probably the happiest day of my life.

trans.cn: 我清楚地記得，我在8月10日收到了這封信。那可能是我一生中最快樂的一天。

word: I remember very clearly that I received this letter on August  10th.That was probably the happiest day of my life.

name: My sister was  born  in  June  and she  is  a  Gemini.That's why  she  is  so outgoing.She is always the life of the party.

trans.cn: 我妹妹六月出生，她是雙子座。這就是她如此外向的原因。她永遠是宴會的主角。

word: My sister was  born  in  June  and she  is  a  Gemini.That's why  she  is  so outgoing.She is always the life of the party.

name: It's extremely hot in my hometown during the summer,and sometimes the temperature can even be 40 degrees Celsius.

trans.cn: 在夏天，我的家鄉非常熱，有時氣溫甚至會達到40℃。

word: It's extremely hot in my hometown during the summer,and sometimes the temperature can even be 40 degrees Celsius.

name: My apartment is pretty spacious.It's about 150 square meters in size.

trans.cn: 我的公寓很寬敞，大約有150平方米大。

word: My apartment is pretty spacious.It's about 150 square meters in size.

name: There were roughly 50,000 people at that rock concert.It was the most people I've ever seen in one place.

trans.cn: 大約有5萬人去了那場搖滾音樂會。那是我在一個地方見過的最多的人。

word: There were roughly 50,000 people at that rock concert.It was the most people I've ever seen in one place.

name: The reason I'm not so fond of my current job is because I have a long commute every day.It takes me 2 hours to get to work by subway.

trans.cn: 我之所以不太喜歡現在的工作，是因為我每天的通勤時間很長。坐地鐵上班要花費我兩個小時。

word: The reason I'm not so fond of my current job is because I have a long commute every day.It takes me 2 hours to get to work by subway.

name: I was required to write four 3,000-word essays and I only had one week to complete them.

trans.cn: 我被要求寫4篇3000字的論文，而且我只有一週的時間來完成。

word: I was required to write four 3,000-word essays and I only had one week to complete them.

name: That English lesson was a nightmare because our teacher asked us to memorize 150 words in one hour.Crazy!

trans.cn: 那堂英語課是一場噩夢，因為老師要求我們在一小時內背下來150個單詞。太誇張了!

word: That English lesson was a nightmare because our teacher asked us to memorize 150 words in one hour.Crazy!

name: They've been married for 62 years and their love doesn't seem to have dwindled a bit.

trans.cn: 他們已經結婚62年了，他們的感情似乎一點兒沒淡。

word: They've been married for 62 years and their love doesn't seem to have dwindled a bit.

name: It's suggested by dietitians that we should consume at least five servings of fruits and vegetables daily.

trans.cn: 營養師建議，我們每天應該至少攝入五份水果和蔬菜。

word: It's suggested by dietitians that we should consume at least five servings of fruits and vegetables daily.

name: I take a taxi once or twice a week--not very often,as it's much more expensive than taking the bus or the subway.

trans.cn: 我每週乘一到兩次計程車——不是很頻繁，因為它比坐公共汽車或地鐵要貴得多。

word: I take a taxi once or twice a week--not very often,as it's much more expensive than taking the bus or the subway.

name: I do housework 3 or 4 times a week.

trans.cn: 我每週做三四次家務。

word: I do housework 3 or 4 times a week.

name: People nowadays check their social media every five minutes.

trans.cn: 現在人們每五分鐘檢視一次社交媒體。

word: People nowadays check their social media every five minutes.

name: According to a recent poll,Chinese people read an average of 7 books a year.

trans.cn: 根據最近的一項調查，中國人平均每年閱讀7本書。

word: According to a recent poll,Chinese people read an average of 7 books a year.

name: My neighbour moved in next door five years ago.When we first met,we really hit it off and we've been close friends ever since.

trans.cn: 我的鄰居五年前搬來隔壁。當我們第一次見面的時候，我們一見如故，從那以後我們一直是親密的朋友。

word: My neighbour moved in next door five years ago.When we first met,we really hit it off and we've been close friends ever since.

name: I got my first ever computer on my 18th birthday.I was on cloud nine when I got it.

trans.cn: 在我十八歲生日那天，我得到了人生中第一臺電腦。當我得到它的時候，我高興得不得了。

word: I got my first ever computer on my 18th birthday.I was on cloud nine when I got it.

name: I was late for class yesterday morning.That was the second time I had been late this week.

trans.cn: 我昨天早上上課遲到了。這已經是我本週第二次遲到了。

word: I was late for class yesterday morning.That was the second time I had been late this week.

name: My dad gave my mom a gorgeous necklace on their 30th wedding anniversary.

trans.cn: 在他們結婚三十週年紀念日，我爸爸送給我媽媽一條非常好看的項鍊。

word: My dad gave my mom a gorgeous necklace on their 30th wedding anniversary.

name: I'm from Beijing,born and raised.

trans.cn: 我是土生土長的北京人。

word: I'm from Beijing,born and raised.

name: I come from a gorgeous city in the south of China named Kunming,which is also known as"Spring City" .

trans.cn: 我來自中國南方一個美麗的城市     昆明，它也被稱為“春城”。

word: I come from a gorgeous city in the south of China named Kunming,which is also known as"Spring City" .

name: I've been living in Shenzhen for 15 years.My family moved here when I was 5.

trans.cn: 我在深圳已經住了15年了。在我5歲時，我們全家搬到了這裡。

word: I've been living in Shenzhen for 15 years.My family moved here when I was 5.

name: Where I come from,Xiamen,is famous for its relaxed and laid-back lifestyle.

trans.cn: 我來自廈門，這個城市以輕鬆悠閒的生活方式而聞名。

word: Where I come from,Xiamen,is famous for its relaxed and laid-back lifestyle.

name: There are loads of tourist attractions in my hometown and this makes the city a major destination for tourists.

trans.cn: 我家鄉有很多旅遊景點，這使這個城市成為旅遊者的一個主要目的地。

word: There are loads of tourist attractions in my hometown and this makes the city a major destination for tourists.

name: l live downtown,so it's quite convenient for me to go to those high-end shopping malls and department stores

trans.cn: 我住在市中心，所以我去那些高檔購物中心和百貨商場很方便。

word: l live downtown,so it's quite convenient for me to go to those high-end shopping malls and department stores

name: l live with my parents in the southwestern suburb of the city.

trans.cn: 我和父母住在城市西南部的郊區。

word: l live with my parents in the southwestern suburb of the city.

name: Our house is in a small and picturesque village in the north of Chengdu.

trans.cn: 我們的房子坐落在成都北部一個風景如畫的小村莊裡。

word: Our house is in a small and picturesque village in the north of Chengdu.

name: There are four people in my family--my parents,my older sister and me.

trans.cn: 我家有四口人     我的父母、我的姐姐和我。

word: There are four people in my family--my parents,my older sister and me.

name: I have three siblings,which is pretty unusual for a Chinese family.

trans.cn: 我有三個兄弟姐妹，這對一箇中國家庭來說是很不常見的。

word: I have three siblings,which is pretty unusual for a Chinese family.

name: My dad has been an engineer his entire life and he's going to retire in five years.

trans.cn: 我爸爸當了一輩子的工程師，他五年後就要退休了。

word: My dad has been an engineer his entire life and he's going to retire in five years.

name: I was brought up by my grandparents because my mom and dad were super busy when I was growing up.

trans.cn: 我是由爺爺奶奶撫養長大的，因為在我小時候，我爸爸媽媽非常忙。

word: I was brought up by my grandparents because my mom and dad were super busy when I was growing up.

name: My parents raised me to be a responsible man.They also told me that if I promised someone something,I had to deliver.

trans.cn: 我父母把我培養成了一個有責任心的人。他們還告訴我，如果我答應了某人某件事，我必須履行諾言。

word: My parents raised me to be a responsible man.They also told me that if I promised someone something,I had to deliver.

name: l live in an apartment and it's a very small one because I've just graduated from university and I don't make much money now.

trans.cn: 我住在一個很小的公寓裡，因為我剛從大學畢業，現在掙的錢不多。

word: l live in an apartment and it's a very small one because I've just graduated from university and I don't make much money now.

name: l live in a three-bedroom apartment with my parents.

trans.cn: 我和父母住在一套三居室的公寓裡。

word: l live in a three-bedroom apartment with my parents.

name: My favourite place in the house is the garden where I keep some of my favourite flowers like daffodils.

trans.cn: 在這所房子裡我最喜歡的地方是花園，我在那裡養了一些我最喜歡的花，比如水仙。

word: My favourite place in the house is the garden where I keep some of my favourite flowers like daffodils.

name: Trees abound in my neighbourhood and this is what I love the most about living here.

trans.cn: 我的住處附近有很多樹，這是我最喜歡住在這裡的原因。

word: Trees abound in my neighbourhood and this is what I love the most about living here.

name: My name was given by my parents and it doesn't have any special meaning actually.

trans.cn: 我的名字是我父母給我取的，它其實沒有任何特別的含義。

word: My name was given by my parents and it doesn't have any special meaning actually.

name: My parents picked my name according to the Chinese Five Elements theory.

trans.cn: 我的父母根據中國五行理論選擇了我的名字。

word: My parents picked my name according to the Chinese Five Elements theory.

name: A fortune teller told me to give up my old name so that I would have a brighter future.

trans.cn: 一個算命先生讓我改個名字，這樣我會有一個更光明的未來。

word: A fortune teller told me to give up my old name so that I would have a brighter future.

name: I major in Chinese literature because I've always been fond of our traditional culture and poetry.

trans.cn: 我主修中國文學，因為我一直很喜歡我們的傳統文化和詩歌。

word: I major in Chinese literature because I've always been fond of our traditional culture and poetry.

name: I chose to study Japanese primarily because I'd had a penchant for Japanese anime ever since I was a kid.

trans.cn: 我選擇學習日語主要是因為我從小就對日本動漫很有興趣。

word: I chose to study Japanese primarily because I'd had a penchant for Japanese anime ever since I was a kid.

name: I've been studying advertising for the past three years.I'm going to pursue a career in this field.

trans.cn: 我學廣告學三年了。我打算從事這個領域的工作。

word: I've been studying advertising for the past three years.I'm going to pursue a career in this field.

name: I'd like to further my studies in Canada after I finish my bachelor's degree.

trans.cn: 在完成學士學位後，我想繼續在加拿大深造。

word: I'd like to further my studies in Canada after I finish my bachelor's degree.

name: I'm working as a fashion designer.This was my dream job when I was a teenager and I'm happy that I've realized this dream.

trans.cn: 我是一名時裝設計師。這是我十幾歲時夢想的工作，我很高興我實現了這個夢想。

word: I'm working as a fashion designer.This was my dream job when I was a teenager and I'm happy that I've realized this dream.

name: My parents have always tried to convince me to become a civil servant because it has great job security.

trans.cn: 我的父母一直試圖說服我成為一名公務員，因為這有很好的工作保障。

word: My parents have always tried to convince me to become a civil servant because it has great job security.

name: I'm mainly responsible for drawing up contracts.It sounds like a menial job, but I can't afford to make any mistakes.

trans.cn: 我主要負責起草合同。這聽起來像是一份枯燥、低階的工作，但我不能犯任 何錯誤。

word: I'm mainly responsible for drawing up contracts.It sounds like a menial job, but I can't afford to make any mistakes.

name: I'm in a dead-end job.There's no room for any pay raise or promotion.

trans.cn: 我的工作沒有前途，沒有任何加薪或晉升的空間。

word: I'm in a dead-end job.There's no room for any pay raise or promotion.

name: I'm fed up with my boss and I've been considering changing jobs recently.

trans.cn: 我受夠了我的老闆，我最近一直在考慮換工作。

word: I'm fed up with my boss and I've been considering changing jobs recently.

name: My job is quite rewarding and I feel that I'm making a difference to others' lives.

trans.cn: 我的工作很有意義，我覺得我可以對別人的生活產生影響。

word: My job is quite rewarding and I feel that I'm making a difference to others' lives.

name: I'm going to talk about visiting Palau,a beautiful island country in the Pacific Ocean.

trans.cn: 我要談談遊覽帛琉的經歷。帛琉是太平洋上一個美麗的島國。

word: I'm going to talk about visiting Palau,a beautiful island country in the Pacific Ocean.

name: London is a city teeming with history and culture.

trans.cn: 倫敦是一個充滿歷史和文化的城市。

word: London is a city teeming with history and culture.

name: The people in Fiji are hospitable and welcoming.

trans.cn: 斐濟人民非常熱情好客。

word: The people in Fiji are hospitable and welcoming.

name: Paris is famous for the Eiffel Tower.

trans.cn: 巴黎以埃菲爾鐵塔而聞名。

word: Paris is famous for the Eiffel Tower.

name: The Grand Canyon really took my breath away.

trans.cn: 大峽谷的壯觀令我驚歎。

word: The Grand Canyon really took my breath away.

name: The four of us went to Tasmania this autumn and it was a once-in-a-lifetime experience.

trans.cn: 我們四個人今年秋天去了塔斯馬尼亞，那是一次終生難忘的經歷。

word: The four of us went to Tasmania this autumn and it was a once-in-a-lifetime experience.

name: Something I've wanted to do for ages is go to Canada on vacation.

trans.cn: 去加拿大度假是我很久以來一直想要做的事。

word: Something I've wanted to do for ages is go to Canada on vacation.

name: Driving there was an amazing experience.The views were absolutely stunning.

trans.cn: 自駕去那裡是一次非常棒的經歷。那裡的景色美極了。

word: Driving there was an amazing experience.The views were absolutely stunning.

name: Osaka is a fantastic city.The streets are spotless.

trans.cn: 大阪是一個極好的城市，街道一塵不染。

word: Osaka is a fantastic city.The streets are spotless.

name: Celebrating my birthday while cruising on the Mediterranean Sea was surreal for  me.

trans.cn: 在地中海上航行時慶祝我的生日簡直太夢幻了。

word: Celebrating my birthday while cruising on the Mediterranean Sea was surreal for  me.

name: I've always wanted to go skydiving in New Zealand.All I need now is the guts to do it,haha.

trans.cn: 我一直想去紐西蘭跳傘。我現在需要的是去跳傘的勇氣，哈哈。

word: I've always wanted to go skydiving in New Zealand.All I need now is the guts to do it,haha.

name: I'd like to go and work in Milan.Perhaps that's the dream of many fashion designers.

trans.cn: 我想去米蘭工作。也許這是許多時裝設計師的夢想。

word: I'd like to go and work in Milan.Perhaps that's the dream of many fashion designers.

name: One thing on my bucket list is to go to Antarctica.

trans.cn: 我的遺願清單上的其中一件事是去南極洲。

word: One thing on my bucket list is to go to Antarctica.

name: I don't know much about Morocco,but I just think it sounds like a really mysterious country.

trans.cn: 我對摩洛哥不太瞭解，但我只是覺得它聽起來像是一個很神秘的國家。

word: I don't know much about Morocco,but I just think it sounds like a really mysterious country.

name: The rice terraces in Yuanyang are spectacularly beautiful.

trans.cn: 元陽梯田壯觀美麗。

word: The rice terraces in Yuanyang are spectacularly beautiful.

name: Qinghai Lake is the biggest salt water lake in China and it's a popular tourist destination.

trans.cn: 青海湖是中國最大的鹹水湖，也是一個受歡迎的旅遊目的地。

word: Qinghai Lake is the biggest salt water lake in China and it's a popular tourist destination.

name: One of the most enjoyable experiences I've had was hiking on the Great Wall when I was only 13.

trans.cn: 我曾有過的最愉快的經歷之一就是在我只有13歲的時候，在長城上徒步旅行。

word: One of the most enjoyable experiences I've had was hiking on the Great Wall when I was only 13.

name: I like to get away from it all from time to time and go somewhere quiet to recharge my batteries.

trans.cn: 我喜歡時不時地出去旅遊，找個安靜的地方去放鬆一下。

word: I like to get away from it all from time to time and go somewhere quiet to recharge my batteries.

name: This park is where many people go to hang out, work out and socialize.

trans.cn: 這個公園是許多人出去逛逛、鍛鍊和社交的地方。

word: This park is where many people go to hang out, work out and socialize.

name: I had thought it would be a place with very few people, but I was so wrong. The place was jam-packed.

trans.cn: 我原以為那會是個人很少的地方，但我錯了。那兒很擁擠。

word: I had thought it would be a place with very few people, but I was so wrong. The place was jam-packed.

name: This temple is off the beaten track and not many people know it.

trans.cn: 這座寺廟位於一個人跡罕至的地方，沒有多少人知道它。

word: This temple is off the beaten track and not many people know it.

name: I would like to live in a house nestled in the mountains far away from the hustle and bustle of the city.

trans.cn: 我想住在山裡，遠離城市的喧囂。

word: I would like to live in a house nestled in the mountains far away from the hustle and bustle of the city.

name: Dozens of people were smiling and shedding tears at the same time when my sister and her fiance walked down the aisle.

trans.cn: 當我的姐姐和她的未婚夫一起步入婚禮殿堂的時候，許多人在微笑的同時為他們流下了開心的淚水。

word: Dozens of people were smiling and shedding tears at the same time when my sister and her fiance walked down the aisle.

name: I saw hundreds of tropical plants at the botanical garden. Some of them were quite unusual.

trans.cn: 我在植物園裡看到了數百種熱帶植物。其中有些植物很不尋常。

word: I saw hundreds of tropical plants at the botanical garden. Some of them were quite unusual.

name: Walking on the beach and picking up shells was extremely relaxing and pleasurable.

trans.cn: 在沙灘上散步和撿貝殼讓人感覺非常放鬆和愉快。

word: Walking on the beach and picking up shells was extremely relaxing and pleasurable.

name: My mom goes to the square close to my home every day to dance with other ladies her age.

trans.cn: 我媽媽每天都去我家附近的廣場與和她同齡的女士們跳舞。

word: My mom goes to the square close to my home every day to dance with other ladies her age.

name: The reasons why I like this cafe are the terrific coffee, friendly staff and soothing atmosphere.

trans.cn: 我喜歡這家咖啡館的原因是咖啡很棒、員工友善和氣氛舒適。

word: The reasons why I like this cafe are the terrific coffee, friendly staff and soothing atmosphere.

name: Whenever I feel down in the dumps, I go to that theatre and see a movie alone.

trans.cn: 每當我情緒低落的時候，我就去那家電影院一個人看場電影。

word: Whenever I feel down in the dumps, I go to that theatre and see a movie alone.

name: Only sunny places can cheer me up. I feel depressed when I'm in a place where it always rains.

trans.cn: 只有陽光明媚的地方才能使我開心起來。我要是待在一個老是下雨的地方，會感到沮喪。

word: Only sunny places can cheer me up. I feel depressed when I'm in a place where it always rains.

name: One of my goals in life is to travel all over the world.

trans.cn: 我人生的目標之一就是環遊世界。

word: One of my goals in life is to travel all over the world.

name: My favourite Chinese festival is definitely the Spring Festival mainly because I get seven days off. It's a good opportunity to recharge.

trans.cn: 我最喜歡的中國節日當然是春節，主要是因為我可以休息七天。這是個放鬆休整的好機會。

word: My favourite Chinese festival is definitely the Spring Festival mainly because I get seven days off. It's a good opportunity to recharge.

name: The first day of the New Year falls on the new moon between January 21st and February 20th.

trans.cn: 新年的第一天是1月21日到2月20日之間的新月之時。

word: The first day of the New Year falls on the new moon between January 21st and February 20th.

name: What I like the most about the Spring Festival is the family reunion dinner.

trans.cn: 關於春節，我最喜歡的是團圓飯。

word: What I like the most about the Spring Festival is the family reunion dinner.

name: This is a festival when we meet our relatives and old friends and do a lot of catching up.

trans.cn: 每逢這個節日，我們都會和親戚、老友見面，好好敘舊一番。

word: This is a festival when we meet our relatives and old friends and do a lot of catching up.

name: I remember always receiving some lucky money when I was a child. Now that I've started working, no one gives me that money anymore.

trans.cn: 我記得我小時候總是收到一些壓歲錢。現在我開始工作了，沒人再給我錢了。

word: I remember always receiving some lucky money when I was a child. Now that I've started working, no one gives me that money anymore.

name: My parents and I had a lot of fun making and eating dumplings together last year.

trans.cn: 去年，父母和我一起做餃子、吃餃子，非常開心。

word: My parents and I had a lot of fun making and eating dumplings together last year.

name: We watched the CCTV Spring Festival gala for four hours until midnight. Then,we went out to set off firecrackers.

trans.cn: 我們看了四個小時央視春晚， 一直到午夜。然後我們出去放鞭炮。

word: We watched the CCTV Spring Festival gala for four hours until midnight. Then,we went out to set off firecrackers.

name: Families and friends spend time together on Christmas Eve and have a big meal.

trans.cn: 家人和朋友會在一起過聖誕夜，吃一頓大餐。

word: Families and friends spend time together on Christmas Eve and have a big meal.

name: There is a sense of anticipation and excitement in the period leading up to Christmas.

trans.cn: 在聖誕節來臨之前，大家會有一種期待和興奮的感覺。

word: There is a sense of anticipation and excitement in the period leading up to Christmas.

name: One problem is that Christmas has become too commercialized and everyone is expected to buy gifts for others.

trans.cn: 一個問題是，聖誕節被過於商業化了，每個人都被期待給別人買禮物。

word: One problem is that Christmas has become too commercialized and everyone is expected to buy gifts for others.

name: I booked a table at a high-end restaurant on Christmas Eve and proposed to my girlfriend there.She said"Yes"!

trans.cn: 我在聖誕夜訂了一家高檔餐廳的位子，並在那兒向我的女朋友求婚。她說了“我願意”!

word: I booked a table at a high-end restaurant on Christmas Eve and proposed to my girlfriend there.She said"Yes"!

name: Christmas is around the corner and I'm considering buying a Christmas tree and some ornaments to decorate my apartment.

trans.cn: 聖誕節即將來臨，我正考慮買一棵聖誕樹和一些裝飾品來裝飾我的公寓。

word: Christmas is around the corner and I'm considering buying a Christmas tree and some ornaments to decorate my apartment.

name: The Mid-Autumn Festival is on the 15th day of the 8th month of the lunar calendar.

trans.cn: 中秋節是陰曆第八個月第十五天。

word: The Mid-Autumn Festival is on the 15th day of the 8th month of the lunar calendar.

name: It's said the moon is the brightest and roundest on this day,which is associated with the Chinese concept of family reunion.

trans.cn: 據說這一天的月亮是最亮、最圓的，這就和中國闔家團圓的概念聯絡起來了。

word: It's said the moon is the brightest and roundest on this day,which is associated with the Chinese concept of family reunion.

name: A big part of the celebration is eating mooncakes.Some kinds of mooncakes can be palatable,whereas others are not.

trans.cn: 慶祝這個節日的一個重要部分是吃月餅。有些月餅很好吃，而有些則不然。

word: A big part of the celebration is eating mooncakes.Some kinds of mooncakes can be palatable,whereas others are not.

name: Sometimes,the  Mid-Autumn  Festival  coincides  with  the  National  Day Holiday,so people have more time off and decide to go travelling.

trans.cn: 有時，中秋節恰逢國慶節假期，所以人們有更多的休假時間，便決定去旅遊。

word: Sometimes,the  Mid-Autumn  Festival  coincides  with  the  National  Day Holiday,so people have more time off and decide to go travelling.

name: I was too busy last year and I wasn't able to go back to my parents' place for the festival.I will make it up to them this year by giving them a big gift.

trans.cn: 去年我太忙了，沒能回到父母家裡過節。今年我將送他們一份大禮以補償他們。

word: I was too busy last year and I wasn't able to go back to my parents' place for the festival.I will make it up to them this year by giving them a big gift.

name: Valentine's Day is an annual festival celebrated on February  14th.

trans.cn: 情人節是每年的2月14日。

word: Valentine's Day is an annual festival celebrated on February  14th.

name: Although it's originally a western festival,it's celebrated throughout the world.

trans.cn: 雖然它原本是西方的節日，但全世界的人都會過這個節。

word: Although it's originally a western festival,it's celebrated throughout the world.

name: Valentine's Day is a big thing in China,especially among young people.

trans.cn: 情人節在中國很流行，特別是在年輕人當中。

word: Valentine's Day is a big thing in China,especially among young people.

name: I didn't have a boyfriend,so I decided to buy some roses and then sell them to those lovebirds celebrating the festival.

trans.cn: 我當時沒有男朋友，所以我決定去買一些玫瑰花，然後賣給那些慶祝節日的情侶。

word: I didn't have a boyfriend,so I decided to buy some roses and then sell them to those lovebirds celebrating the festival.

name: What came as a big surprise for my mom was that my dad bought her a necklace and 99 roses on that day.

trans.cn: 給我媽媽的一個大驚喜是，那天我爸爸給她買了一條項鍊和99朵玫瑰花。

word: What came as a big surprise for my mom was that my dad bought her a necklace and 99 roses on that day.

name: Qingming  Festival,also  known  as  Tomb-Sweeping  Day  in  English,is  a traditional Chinese festival that falls on a day around the fifth of April.

trans.cn: 清明節，又稱“祭祖節”,是一箇中國傳統節日，它在四月五日前後的一天。

word: Qingming  Festival,also  known  as  Tomb-Sweeping  Day  in  English,is  a traditional Chinese festival that falls on a day around the fifth of April.

name: It's a statutory public holiday in China.

trans.cn: 這是一箇中國的法定假日。

word: It's a statutory public holiday in China.

name: This festival is when Chinese people visit burial grounds to pray to their ancestors.

trans.cn: 這個節日是中國人掃墓祭祖的日子。

word: This festival is when Chinese people visit burial grounds to pray to their ancestors.

name: Going on outings and flying kites are also popular activities during the Qingming Festival.

trans.cn: 外出郊遊和放風箏也是清明節期間很受歡迎的活動。

word: Going on outings and flying kites are also popular activities during the Qingming Festival.

name: I dressed up as a fish last year on Halloween.It wasn't scary at all,but rather hilarious.

trans.cn: 去年萬聖節我打扮成一條魚。它一點也不可怕，反而相當搞笑。

word: I dressed up as a fish last year on Halloween.It wasn't scary at all,but rather hilarious.

name: One popular activity among some Chinese people on the Winter Solstice Festival is the making and eating of balls of glutinous rice,known as Tangyuan in Chinese.

trans.cn: 在冬至，在一些中國人中很受歡迎的活動是製作和吃糯米糰子，在中文裡被稱為“湯圓”。

word: One popular activity among some Chinese people on the Winter Solstice Festival is the making and eating of balls of glutinous rice,known as Tangyuan in Chinese.

name: Last Thanksgiving,I made a card for most of my friends,expressing my gratitude to them for being around me.

trans.cn: 去年感恩節，我為大多數朋友做了賀卡，以表達我對他們在我身邊的感激之情。

word: Last Thanksgiving,I made a card for most of my friends,expressing my gratitude to them for being around me.

name: Single's Day,which is celebrated on November 1Th,has fast become one of the most popular festivals in China.

trans.cn: 光棍節是11月11號。它在過去幾年中已經快速成了在中國最受歡迎的節日之一。

word: Single's Day,which is celebrated on November 1Th,has fast become one of the most popular festivals in China.

name: Winter is absolutely my favourite season.I like to see the world covered in a blanket of snow.

trans.cn: 冬天是我最喜歡的季節。我喜歡看到銀裝素裹的世界。

word: Winter is absolutely my favourite season.I like to see the world covered in a blanket of snow.

name: It's bitterly cold in the winter and the temperature can even drop to minus degrees Celsius.

trans.cn: 冬天很冷，氣溫甚至可以低至零下20攝氏度。

word: It's bitterly cold in the winter and the temperature can even drop to minus degrees Celsius.

name: We get quite heavy snowfalls sometimes,which can make the traffic come to a complete standstill.

trans.cn: 有時我們會遭遇強降雪，它可以使交通陷入完全癱瘓。

word: We get quite heavy snowfalls sometimes,which can make the traffic come to a complete standstill.

name: The roads can get extremely icy and slippery.

trans.cn: 道路會結冰，變得非常滑。

word: The roads can get extremely icy and slippery.

name: Spring lasts from March to May in my hometown and the weather is quite mild during this time of year.

trans.cn: 在我的家鄉，春天從三月持續到五月，每年的這個時候天氣都很溫和。

word: Spring lasts from March to May in my hometown and the weather is quite mild during this time of year.

name: One of the best things about spring is that all the plants come to life again.

trans.cn: 春天最美好的事情之一，是所有植物再次甦醒過來。

word: One of the best things about spring is that all the plants come to life again.

name: The sounds of spring are wonderful too as birds come back and start chirping again.

trans.cn: 春天的聲音也很美妙，鳥兒又飛回來了，又開始嘰嘰喳喳地叫了。

word: The sounds of spring are wonderful too as birds come back and start chirping again.

name: It's common to have heatwaves in the summertime.

trans.cn: 熱浪在夏天很常見。

word: It's common to have heatwaves in the summertime.

name: It's scorching hot most of the time and so I go swimming as often as possible to cool off

trans.cn: 大部分時間都非常炎熱，所以我儘可能地多去游泳，來解暑降溫。

word: It's scorching hot most of the time and so I go swimming as often as possible to cool off

name: I forgot to put on sunscreen and went out in the burning sun.I got a bad sunburn that day.

trans.cn: 我忘了塗防曬霜，在烈日下出門了。那天我曬傷了。

word: I forgot to put on sunscreen and went out in the burning sun.I got a bad sunburn that day.

name: There are downpours frequently in the summer and sometimes our city even gets flooded.

trans.cn: 夏天經常下暴雨，有時甚至我們的城市都會被淹。

word: There are downpours frequently in the summer and sometimes our city even gets flooded.

name: Somehow,the shedding of leaves in the autumn/fall gives me a sense of inner peace.

trans.cn: 不知何故，秋天飄零的樹葉給予我一種內心平靜的感覺。

word: Somehow,the shedding of leaves in the autumn/fall gives me a sense of inner peace.

name: Autumn/Fall marks the transition from summer to winter,and it's quite short in my country.

trans.cn: 秋季標誌著從夏季到冬季的轉變，它在我們國家相當短暫。

word: Autumn/Fall marks the transition from summer to winter,and it's quite short in my country.

name: I love to watch the colour changes of the whole world:green in summer becomes amber,gold,and red in autumn.

trans.cn: 我喜歡留意觀察整個世界的顏色變化：夏天的綠色在秋天變成琥珀色、金色和紅色。

word: I love to watch the colour changes of the whole world:green in summer becomes amber,gold,and red in autumn.

name: What I like the most about autumn/fall is the Mid-Autumn Festival when I have a reunion dinner with my folks.

trans.cn: 中秋節是我最喜歡秋天的原因，那一天我可以和家人一起吃個團圓飯。

word: What I like the most about autumn/fall is the Mid-Autumn Festival when I have a reunion dinner with my folks.

name: I check the weather forecast every day in case there's rain the next day.I don't want to be caught in it.

trans.cn: 我每天都會檢視天氣預報，以防第二天下雨。我可不想淋雨。

word: I check the weather forecast every day in case there's rain the next day.I don't want to be caught in it.

name: If it rains or drizzles in the morning,it usually clears up later in the afternoon.

trans.cn: 如果早晨下雨或有濛濛細雨，通常在下午天就會放晴。

word: If it rains or drizzles in the morning,it usually clears up later in the afternoon.

name: Thunderstorms keep me awake at night.No matter how hard I try,I can't fall asleep.

trans.cn: 雷雨使我晚上睡不著。無論多麼努力嘗試，我都無法入睡。

word: Thunderstorms keep me awake at night.No matter how hard I try,I can't fall asleep.

name: Sometimes,we get very depressing weather.All the clouds just put me in a bad mood.

trans.cn: 有時候天氣會令人消沉。天上的烏雲讓我心情很不好。

word: Sometimes,we get very depressing weather.All the clouds just put me in a bad mood.

name: There's going to be some nasty weather next week.

trans.cn: 下星期會有很糟糕的天氣。

word: There's going to be some nasty weather next week.

name: I'm not a fan of overcast weather.In fact,I don't suppose anyone likes it.

trans.cn: 我不喜歡陰天。事實上，我想沒有人會喜歡它。

word: I'm not a fan of overcast weather.In fact,I don't suppose anyone likes it.

name: I can't stand the humidity in the south of China,especially in the winter.It makes it even colder than the north.

trans.cn: 我不能忍受中國南方的潮溼，尤其是在冬天。它甚至會讓人感覺南方比北方還要冷。

word: I can't stand the humidity in the south of China,especially in the winter.It makes it even colder than the north.

name: The sun is nice and warm today.It's perfect for outdoor activities.

trans.cn: 今日陽光和煦，非常適合戶外活動。

word: The sun is nice and warm today.It's perfect for outdoor activities.

name: I wear sunglasses when the sun is very bright.

trans.cn: 當陽光刺眼的時候我會戴墨鏡。

word: I wear sunglasses when the sun is very bright.

name: It was a pleasant day yesterday.Unfortunately,I was stuck at home doing my homework.

trans.cn: 昨天天氣特別好。不幸的是，我只能待在家裡做作業。

word: It was a pleasant day yesterday.Unfortunately,I was stuck at home doing my homework.

name: I love sunny days because they put me in a better frame of mind.

trans.cn: 我喜歡陽光燦爛的日子，因為它們可以讓我心情更好。

word: I love sunny days because they put me in a better frame of mind.

name: The winds can get really strong in the spring.

trans.cn: 春天的風有時會很猛烈。

word: The winds can get really strong in the spring.

name: I like a nice warm summer breeze.

trans.cn: 我喜歡溫暖的夏日微風。

word: I like a nice warm summer breeze.

name: It's going to be freezing cold tomorrow.I have to bundle up.

trans.cn: 明天會很冷，我得穿得暖和點。

word: It's going to be freezing cold tomorrow.I have to bundle up.

name: No one likes foggy weather.It's a big problem for the traffic.

trans.cn: 沒有人喜歡霧天。大霧對交通來說是個大問題。

word: No one likes foggy weather.It's a big problem for the traffic.

name: Our world is beautiful and exciting because it's filled with colors.

trans.cn: 我們的世界是美麗的、令人興奮的，因為它充滿了不同的色彩。

word: Our world is beautiful and exciting because it's filled with colors.

name: My favourite colour used to be green,but now I like red more.

trans.cn: 從前我最喜歡的顏色是綠色，但是現在，我更喜歡紅色。

word: My favourite colour used to be green,but now I like red more.

name: I have a strange fascination with the colour white.When I'm surrounded by this colour,I feel a deep sense of calmness in my mind.

trans.cn: 我對白色有種奇特的迷戀。每當我被這種顏色包圍時，我都會感到內心深處 的平靜。

word: I have a strange fascination with the colour white.When I'm surrounded by this colour,I feel a deep sense of calmness in my mind.

name: There are many variants of the colour blue--sea blue,azure blue,navy blue and so on.

trans.cn: 藍色有很多種——海藍、天藍、深藍等。

word: There are many variants of the colour blue--sea blue,azure blue,navy blue and so on.

name: I'm not quite sure of the significance of the colour,but I do find orange an attractive hue.

trans.cn: 我不太清楚橙色的重要性，但我確實覺得它很吸引人。

word: I'm not quite sure of the significance of the colour,but I do find orange an attractive hue.

name: Whenever I go shopping for clothes,those pink dresses and skirts always catch my attention.

trans.cn: 每當我去買衣服時，那些粉色的連衣裙和半身裙總能引起我的注意。

word: Whenever I go shopping for clothes,those pink dresses and skirts always catch my attention.

name: Different colors convey different meanings to people.

trans.cn: 不同的顏色向人們傳達不同的含義。

word: Different colors convey different meanings to people.

name: Red is undoubtedly the most important colour in China.It stands for happiness--a concept that is of great significance in our culture.

trans.cn: 在中國，紅色無疑是最重要的顏色。它代表著幸福，這一概念在我們的文化中有著重要的意義。

word: Red is undoubtedly the most important colour in China.It stands for happiness--a concept that is of great significance in our culture.

name: Red is also associated with patriotism because it's the colour of our national flag.

trans.cn: 紅色也與愛國主義聯絡在一起，因為它是我們國旗的顏色。

word: Red is also associated with patriotism because it's the colour of our national flag.

name: My favourite season is autumn/fall perhaps due to all the beautiful yellow ginkgo leaves during this time of year.

trans.cn: 我最喜歡的季節是秋天，可能是因為在這個時間那些美麗的黃色銀杏葉。

word: My favourite season is autumn/fall perhaps due to all the beautiful yellow ginkgo leaves during this time of year.

name: Blue is seen as conservative and also many people who can be called "thinkers"tend to like this colour.

trans.cn: 藍色被認為是保守的，有許多可以被稱為“思想者”的人往往喜歡這種顏色。

word: Blue is seen as conservative and also many people who can be called "thinkers"tend to like this colour.

name: Purple is the colour of imagination,but it can also seem a bit immature and impractical.

trans.cn: 紫色是代表幻想的顏色，但它也有點不成熟和不切實際。

word: Purple is the colour of imagination,but it can also seem a bit immature and impractical.

name: Brown is the most down-to-earth colour of all and it's always associated with security,protection and comfort.

trans.cn: 棕色是最樸實的顏色，它總是與安全、保護和舒適聯絡在一起。

word: Brown is the most down-to-earth colour of all and it's always associated with security,protection and comfort.

name: Gold has been traditionally interpreted as the colour of wealth and status in China.

trans.cn: 在中國，金色在傳統意義上被認為是代表財富和地位的顏色。

word: Gold has been traditionally interpreted as the colour of wealth and status in China.

name: Green is the colour of nature and those who like this colour tend to be kind,generous and compassionate.

trans.cn: 綠色是大自然的顏色，喜歡這種顏色的人往往善良、慷慨、富有同情心。

word: Green is the colour of nature and those who like this colour tend to be kind,generous and compassionate.

name: I guess I play a lot of games online now partly because of my dad,who is an expert gamer.

trans.cn: 我想我現在喜歡玩網路遊戲，在一定程度上是因為我的父親是個專業玩家。

word: I guess I play a lot of games online now partly because of my dad,who is an expert gamer.

name: My teenage cousin and I often go to the library where we do some reading and exchange ideas with each other.

trans.cn: 我十幾歲的表弟和我經常去圖書館讀書，互相交流思想。

word: My teenage cousin and I often go to the library where we do some reading and exchange ideas with each other.

name: Whenever I feel a bit bored,I just begin to do some chores,which I think is a good way to drive away all the boredom.

trans.cn: 每當我覺得有點無聊的時候，我就開始做一些家務，這是趕走所有無聊的一個 好辦法。

word: Whenever I feel a bit bored,I just begin to do some chores,which I think is a good way to drive away all the boredom.

name: I was a huge fan of eating fruit when I was a child and I particularly loved pomegranates.

trans.cn: 我小時候非常喜歡吃水果，尤其是石榴。

word: I was a huge fan of eating fruit when I was a child and I particularly loved pomegranates.

name: My folks and I dig reality television,especially those shows that involve a lot of excitement and suspense.

trans.cn: 我和我的家人都喜歡看真人秀節目，尤其是那些激動人心、充滿懸念的節目。

word: My folks and I dig reality television,especially those shows that involve a lot of excitement and suspense.

name: My current job is pretty rewarding,whereas I couldn't get any satisfaction from my job before.

trans.cn: 我現在的工作很有意義，但是我無法從之前的工作中獲得任何滿足感。

word: My current job is pretty rewarding,whereas I couldn't get any satisfaction from my job before.

name: I'm not fond of wearing jewellery.By contrast,my younger sister wears a necklace and a pair of earrings every day.

trans.cn: 我不喜歡戴首飾。相比之下，我妹妹每天都戴著一條項鍊和一副耳環。

word: I'm not fond of wearing jewellery.By contrast,my younger sister wears a necklace and a pair of earrings every day.

name: It takes years of hard work to learn a language well.Having said that,some people are very talented and perhaps they can master a foreign language within a short period of time.

trans.cn: 學好一門語言需要多年的艱苦努力。話雖如此，有些人很有天分，也許他們能在短時間內掌握一門外語。

word: It takes years of hard work to learn a language well.Having said that,some people are very talented and perhaps they can master a foreign language within a short period of time.

name: After jogging for 5 months,I successfully got slimmer. To be exact,I lost  pounds.

trans.cn: 堅持慢跑5個月後，我減肥成功了。確切地說，我瘦了25磅。

word: After jogging for 5 months,I successfully got slimmer. To be exact,I lost  pounds.

name: The Forbidden City is hundreds of years old.To be more specific,it was built in the  00s,600 years ago.

trans.cn: 紫禁城有數百年曆史。更具體地說，它建於600年前的15世紀。

word: The Forbidden City is hundreds of years old.To be more specific,it was built in the  00s,600 years ago.

name: The traffic in my hometown is hellish.What I mean is that I'm caught up in traffic almost every day.

trans.cn: 我家鄉的交通很糟糕。我的意思是我幾乎每天都被堵在路上。

word: The traffic in my hometown is hellish.What I mean is that I'm caught up in traffic almost every day.

name: Typically,children in China are asked by their parents to learn a musical instrument when they're very small

trans.cn: 通常情況下，中國的孩子在他們很小的時候，就被他們的父母要求學習一件 樂器。

word: Typically,children in China are asked by their parents to learn a musical instrument when they're very small

name: All in all,the event that I organized was a great success.

trans.cn: 總的來說，我組織的這次活動非常成功。

word: All in all,the event that I organized was a great success.

name: Reading is a good way to reduce stress.Plus,it provides people with many talking points.

trans.cn: 閱讀是減壓的好方法。此外，它為人們提供了許多談資。

word: Reading is a good way to reduce stress.Plus,it provides people with many talking points.

name: Another difference between city life and country life is the pace of life.It's much slower in the countryside.

trans.cn: 城市生活和鄉村生活的另一個不同點是生活節奏。鄉下的生活節奏慢多了。

word: Another difference between city life and country life is the pace of life.It's much slower in the countryside.

name: I'm not sure if I'll change jobs in the future.It is a possibility.

trans.cn: 我不確定將來是否會換工作。這是一個可能性。

word: I'm not sure if I'll change jobs in the future.It is a possibility.

name: I haven't been to any seaside city before.I hope to go to one in the near future.

trans.cn: 我以前沒有去過任何海濱城市。我希望在不久的將來去一個。

word: I haven't been to any seaside city before.I hope to go to one in the near future.

name: I believe there will be robots helping people with their housework in the not-too-distant future.

trans.cn: 我相信在不久的將來，會有機器人幫助人們做家務。

word: I believe there will be robots helping people with their housework in the not-too-distant future.

name: I'm going to Inner Mongolia next week,and hopefully,there will be as many stars at night as in the pictures I've seen before.

trans.cn: 下週我要去內蒙古，希望晚上能看到像我以前看過的照片裡一樣多的星星。

word: I'm going to Inner Mongolia next week,and hopefully,there will be as many stars at night as in the pictures I've seen before.

name: One of my college friends will come to Beijing in a couple of weeks,and I will show him around the city.

trans.cn: 我的一個大學時的朋友將在兩個星期後到北京來，我會帶他到處轉轉。

word: One of my college friends will come to Beijing in a couple of weeks,and I will show him around the city.

name: My parents and I are going to Okinawa on vacation next month,and we're going to fly there for sure.

trans.cn: 我的父母和我下個月要去沖繩度假，我們肯定要乘飛機去那裡。

word: My parents and I are going to Okinawa on vacation next month,and we're going to fly there for sure.

name: There will be a public holiday next month,and I will probably go and pay my high school maths teacher a visit.

trans.cn: 下個月會有一個公共假期，我很可能會去拜訪我的高中數學老師。

word: There will be a public holiday next month,and I will probably go and pay my high school maths teacher a visit.

name: My favourite singer is coming to Hangzhou next month,and quite a few of my friends are considering going to his concert

trans.cn: 我最喜歡的歌手下個月要來杭州，我的幾個朋友正在考慮去聽他的音樂會。

word: My favourite singer is coming to Hangzhou next month,and quite a few of my friends are considering going to his concert

name: Hawaii is absolutely one of the most popular travel destinations,and I intend to go there after I graduate from college.

trans.cn: 夏威夷絕對是最受歡迎的旅遊目的地之一，我打算大學畢業之後去那裡。

word: Hawaii is absolutely one of the most popular travel destinations,and I intend to go there after I graduate from college.

name: Everyone tells me I'm tone-deaf.I intend to take some singing lessons next year.

trans.cn: 每個人都說我五音不全。我打算明年去上一些聲樂課。

word: Everyone tells me I'm tone-deaf.I intend to take some singing lessons next year.

name: It's likely that smartphones will be able to do most of the things a DSLR camera can do.

trans.cn: 智慧手機將很有可能完成單反相機能做的大部分事情。

word: It's likely that smartphones will be able to do most of the things a DSLR camera can do.

name: It's quite likely that my niece will want to pursue a career in painting when she grows up.She's won so many awards in this field.

trans.cn: 我侄女長大後很可能會想從事繪畫職業。她已經在這一領域贏得了許多獎項。

word: It's quite likely that my niece will want to pursue a career in painting when she grows up.She's won so many awards in this field.

name: The likelihood is that people will be more and more sedentary in the future.

trans.cn: 將來人們可能會越來越久坐不動。

word: The likelihood is that people will be more and more sedentary in the future.

name: The local council is planning on building a new subway station near my home.The likelihood is that there will be a lot of noise soon.

trans.cn: 地方政府正計劃在我家附近建一個新的地鐵站。可能很快就會有很多噪聲了。

word: The local council is planning on building a new subway station near my home.The likelihood is that there will be a lot of noise soon.

name: In all likelihood,we will move to another apartment next year.

trans.cn: 明年我們很有可能搬到另一套公寓去。

word: In all likelihood,we will move to another apartment next year.

name: In all likelihood,the city will be even more congested in the future as more and more people come here in search of work.

trans.cn: 十有八九，隨著越來越多的人來這裡找工作，我們的城市將會越來越擁堵。

word: In all likelihood,the city will be even more congested in the future as more and more people come here in search of work.

name: My best friend's birthday is coming up and I plan to buy her a Kindle because she's a bookworm.

trans.cn: 我最好的朋友的生日快到了，我打算給她買一個Kindle,因為她很喜歡讀書。

word: My best friend's birthday is coming up and I plan to buy her a Kindle because she's a bookworm.

name: I've never given my mom any flowers before,but next Mother's Day,I will certainly buy her a bunch of carnations.

trans.cn: 我以前從來沒有給我媽媽送過花，但是在下一個母親節，我一定會給她買一束康乃馨。

word: I've never given my mom any flowers before,but next Mother's Day,I will certainly buy her a bunch of carnations.

name: I 'm quite attached to my hometown,and I think I will I've here for the rest of my life.

trans.cn: 我非常喜歡我的家鄉，我想我會在這裡住一輩子。

word: I 'm quite attached to my hometown,and I think I will I've here for the rest of my life.

name: They are a happily married couple,and I hope they will love each other as much as now for the rest of their lives.

trans.cn: 他們是一對幸福的夫妻，我希望他們在今後的生活中能像現在一樣彼此相愛。

word: They are a happily married couple,and I hope they will love each other as much as now for the rest of their lives.

name: I'm convinced that more and more people will choose to eat out or order takeout food online due to the fact that we're increasingly busy.

trans.cn: 我相信越來越多的人會選擇在外面吃或在網上點外賣，因為我們越來越忙。

word: I'm convinced that more and more people will choose to eat out or order takeout food online due to the fact that we're increasingly busy.

name: Photos are taken so that we can look at them in the future and reminisce about the past.

trans.cn: 我們拍照片是為了可以將來再看看它們，回憶一下過去。

word: Photos are taken so that we can look at them in the future and reminisce about the past.

name: The  Spring   Festival  is  approaching,and  we  will  see  more  and  more festivities all over the country.

trans.cn: 春節即將來臨，我們將在全國各地看到越來越多的慶祝活動。

word: The  Spring   Festival  is  approaching,and  we  will  see  more  and  more festivities all over the country.

name: I know it's not a positive trend,but it's certain that people will read books less in the future.

trans.cn: 我知道這不是一個好的趨勢，但可以肯定的是，將來人們讀書的時間會更少。

word: I know it's not a positive trend,but it's certain that people will read books less in the future.

name: If all animals disappeared,human beings would die out with them too.

trans.cn: 如果所有的動物都消失了，人類也會隨之滅亡。

word: If all animals disappeared,human beings would die out with them too.

name: If I had a son,I would make sure that he did a lot of sports and perhaps even encourage him to become a professional athlete.

trans.cn: 如果我有一個兒子，我會確保他做很多運動，甚至可能鼓勵他成為一名職業運動員。

word: If I had a son,I would make sure that he did a lot of sports and perhaps even encourage him to become a professional athlete.

name: No one is sure what's going to happen in the future,but it's likely that families will be more dispersed than they are now.

trans.cn: 沒有人知道未來會發生什麼,但很有可能家庭成員們會比現在更加分散。

word: No one is sure what's going to happen in the future,but it's likely that families will be more dispersed than they are now.

name: Those who are impolite are bound to lose in their lives.

trans.cn: 那些不懂禮貌的人註定會在生活中失敗。

word: Those who are impolite are bound to lose in their lives.

name: If I can master another language,I'm bound to be more competitive in the job market.

trans.cn: 如果我能掌握另一門語言，我一定會在就業市場上更有競爭力。

word: If I can master another language,I'm bound to be more competitive in the job market.

name: Skydiving is something I've yearned to do for ages.It's bound to be exhilarating when I really try it one day.

trans.cn: 高空跳傘是我一直想做的事。有朝一日我真的去嘗試的時候， 一定會很刺激。

word: Skydiving is something I've yearned to do for ages.It's bound to be exhilarating when I really try it one day.

name: I'd like to tell you about visiting a warm-hearted lady last month.

trans.cn: 我想告訴你我上個月拜訪一位熱心女士的事。

word: I'd like to tell you about visiting a warm-hearted lady last month.

name: One of my classmates made fun of my love handles and that was when I decided to lose weight.

trans.cn: 我的一個同學取笑了我的腰間贅肉，那時我就決定要減肥了。

word: One of my classmates made fun of my love handles and that was when I decided to lose weight.

name: That G.I.Joe was a gift from my uncle.He told me that he had bought it in the United States.

trans.cn: 那個美國大兵玩具模型是我叔叔送的禮物。他告訴我他是在美國買的。

word: That G.I.Joe was a gift from my uncle.He told me that he had bought it in the United States.

name: I was about to head out when it suddenly began to pour.The thunderstorm ruined my day.

trans.cn: 我正要出門時突然下起了傾盆大雨。這場雷雨毀了我的一天。

word: I was about to head out when it suddenly began to pour.The thunderstorm ruined my day.

name: After I told everybody about my dream of becoming a driver in the future,all the kids in the class began to laugh.

trans.cn: 當我告訴大家我夢想在將來成為一名司機時，班上所有的孩子都笑了起來。

word: After I told everybody about my dream of becoming a driver in the future,all the kids in the class began to laugh.

name: The weirdest dream I've ever had was one about me kissing Jackie romantically.

trans.cn: 我所做過的一個最奇怪的夢是我浪漫地親吻傑基。

word: The weirdest dream I've ever had was one about me kissing Jackie romantically.

name: As I was walking down the street,I saw a hungry trembling homeless guy.

trans.cn: 我走在街上時，看到了一個餓得發抖的流浪漢。

word: As I was walking down the street,I saw a hungry trembling homeless guy.

name: No one had ever called me a coward before,so when that guy did that day, I was deeply hurt.

trans.cn: 以前從來沒有人說過我是個膽小鬼，所以那天那個傢伙這麼說的時候，我深深地受到了傷害。

word: No one had ever called me a coward before,so when that guy did that day, I was deeply hurt.

name: It was my mom who introduced me to online shopping.Anyone would find it hard to believe.

trans.cn: 是我媽媽讓我開始嘗試網上購物的。任何人都會覺得這難以置信。

word: It was my mom who introduced me to online shopping.Anyone would find it hard to believe.

name: We chatted with each other for a while and we really hit it off.

trans.cn: 我們聊了一會，感覺很投緣。

word: We chatted with each other for a while and we really hit it off.

name: The article said that it was going to be even smoggier this winter.

trans.cn: 這篇文章說今年冬天霧霾會更加嚴重。

word: The article said that it was going to be even smoggier this winter.

name: The movie was so full of suspense that I was on the edge of my seat the whole time.

trans.cn: 這部電影充滿了懸念，我在看的時候一直提心吊膽。

word: The movie was so full of suspense that I was on the edge of my seat the whole time.

name: Reading books and newspapers was people's main form of relaxation before TV became popular.

trans.cn: 在電視流行起來之前，閱讀書籍和報紙是人們主要的消遣方式。

word: Reading books and newspapers was people's main form of relaxation before TV became popular.

name: A foreign girl asked me how she could get to the library.I was so nervous that I showed her the way to the cafeteria.

trans.cn: 一個外國女孩問我怎麼去圖書館。我太緊張了，給她指了去食堂的路。

word: A foreign girl asked me how she could get to the library.I was so nervous that I showed her the way to the cafeteria.

name: I wasn't sure why my aunt bought me a cardigan as a birthday gift.AII I could do was force a smile and say "thank you" .

trans.cn: 我不知道為什麼我姑姑給我買了一件開襟羊毛衫作為生日禮物。我所能做的就是勉強笑笑，說聲“謝謝”。

word: I wasn't sure why my aunt bought me a cardigan as a birthday gift.AII I could do was force a smile and say "thank you" .

name: I was told the air quality of that place wasn't good,but I hadn't expected it to be so bad.

trans.cn: 我聽說那個地方的空氣質量不好，但我沒料到會這麼糟。

word: I was told the air quality of that place wasn't good,but I hadn't expected it to be so bad.

name: If I hadn't watched that documentary,I wouldn't know there's such a breathtakingly beautiful place in Yunnan.

trans.cn: 如果我沒有看過那部紀錄片，我就不會知道在雲南居然有這麼一個美得令人窒息的地方。

word: If I hadn't watched that documentary,I wouldn't know there's such a breathtakingly beautiful place in Yunnan.

name: To my surprise,the Summer Palace wasn't as crowded as I had imagined.I ended up having a great time there.

trans.cn: 令我驚訝的是，頤和園並不像我想象的那麼擁擠。我在那裡玩得很開心。

word: To my surprise,the Summer Palace wasn't as crowded as I had imagined.I ended up having a great time there.

name: On the whole,the Americans are not as happy as in the past even though they're much wealthier than before.

trans.cn: 總的來說，儘管美國人比以前富裕了很多，但他們並不像過去那樣開心。

word: On the whole,the Americans are not as happy as in the past even though they're much wealthier than before.

name: So many students attribute their poor English skills to not having a good memory.

trans.cn: 許多學生認為他們英語不好是因為沒有好的記憶力。

word: So many students attribute their poor English skills to not having a good memory.

name: Fake news"is a very popular term now,so I tend not to believe everything I read on social media.

trans.cn: 現在“假新聞”是一個非常流行的詞彙，所以我通常不會完全相信我在社交媒體上看到的內容。

word: Fake news"is a very popular term now,so I tend not to believe everything I read on social media.

name: I wanted to be a singer when I was growing up,but everybody told me that I could never sing in tune.

trans.cn: 在我小時候，我想成為一名歌手，但每個人都告訴我，我唱歌永遠不在調上。

word: I wanted to be a singer when I was growing up,but everybody told me that I could never sing in tune.

name: Although doing sports is beneficial to our health,overdoing them won't do us any good.

trans.cn: 雖然做運動對我們的健康有益，但是過度運動對我們沒有好處。

word: Although doing sports is beneficial to our health,overdoing them won't do us any good.

name: People who do certain jobs are paid so poorly that some of them can't even pay their bills.

trans.cn: 做某些工作的人薪水很低，有些人甚至連維持基本生活都困難。

word: People who do certain jobs are paid so poorly that some of them can't even pay their bills.

name: I wouldn't say how people succeed has changed over the years because the two main contributors to success are still hard work and perseverance.

trans.cn: 我不認為多年以來人們獲得成功的方式發生了變化，因為成功的兩個主要因素仍然是勤奮和毅力。

word: I wouldn't say how people succeed has changed over the years because the two main contributors to success are still hard work and perseverance.

name: My grandma says she never wants to travel overseas.I really don't understand why.

trans.cn: 我奶奶說她從來不想去國外旅行。我真的不明白為什麼。

word: My grandma says she never wants to travel overseas.I really don't understand why.

name: The walk we went on wasn't easy at all.It took us 7 hours in total and all of us were dead beat in the end.

trans.cn: 這次徒步非常困難。我們總共走了7個小時，最後我們都筋疲力盡了。

word: The walk we went on wasn't easy at all.It took us 7 hours in total and all of us were dead beat in the end.

name: I don't think it's a good idea that parents control everything their children do.

trans.cn: 我不認為父母控制孩子的一切是一個好主意。

word: I don't think it's a good idea that parents control everything their children do.

name: She was an hour late despite the fact that she assured me that she wouldn't be late for even a minute.

trans.cn: 儘管她向我保證她一分鐘都不會遲到，她最終還是遲到了一個小時。

word: She was an hour late despite the fact that she assured me that she wouldn't be late for even a minute.

name: I used to go to nightclubs often back in college.I don't now because I can't stand the noise.

trans.cn: 以前上大學時，我經常去夜店。我現在不去了，因為我受不了噪聲。

word: I used to go to nightclubs often back in college.I don't now because I can't stand the noise.

name: It's fundamental that restaurant staff are hospitable and friendly to customers.

trans.cn: 餐廳員工對顧客熱情友好，這是很重要的。

word: It's fundamental that restaurant staff are hospitable and friendly to customers.

name: It's necessary that music and art are part of the school curriculum.

trans.cn: 音樂和藝術作為學校課程的一部分是必要的。

word: It's necessary that music and art are part of the school curriculum.

name: I agree with the opinion that being well-mannered is one of the most important things a child needs to learn.

trans.cn: 我同意這樣的觀點：彬彬有禮是孩子需要學習的最重要的東西之一。

word: I agree with the opinion that being well-mannered is one of the most important things a child needs to learn.

name: The internet has significantly changed our society,so much so that almost no one can live without it now.

trans.cn: 網際網路極大地改變了我們的社會，大到現在幾乎沒有人能離得開它。

word: The internet has significantly changed our society,so much so that almost no one can live without it now.

name: Reading is a habit that everyone should develop when they're growing up.

trans.cn: 閱讀是每個人在成長過程中都應該養成的習慣。

word: Reading is a habit that everyone should develop when they're growing up.

name: It's essential that we eat a balanced diet.It's the first step to living a healthy life.

trans.cn: 我們必須均衡飲食。這是健康生活的第一步。

word: It's essential that we eat a balanced diet.It's the first step to living a healthy life.

name: It's crucial that citizens are not allowed to own guns.

trans.cn: 公民不能擁有槍支，這至關重要。

word: It's crucial that citizens are not allowed to own guns.

name: I believe it's of great importance for a leader to be well-read and well-spoken.

trans.cn: 我認為一個領導者要博覽群書、善於辭令，這是非常重要的。

word: I believe it's of great importance for a leader to be well-read and well-spoken.

name: Interpersonal skills are not taught at school,which I think is wrong.They are critical to us once we enter the real world.

trans.cn: 學校不教人際交往能力，我認為這是錯誤的。當我們進入現實世界，這個能力對我們至關重要。

word: Interpersonal skills are not taught at school,which I think is wrong.They are critical to us once we enter the real world.

name: Being able to speak English well is by far the most important skill in this globalized world.

trans.cn: 在這個全球化的世界裡，說一口流利的英語是最重要的技能。

word: Being able to speak English well is by far the most important skill in this globalized world.

name: That sculpture I saw in the park was absolutely stunning.

trans.cn: 我在公園裡看到的那個雕塑真是太美了。

word: That sculpture I saw in the park was absolutely stunning.

name: The solution my dad came up with was ingenious.

trans.cn: 我爸爸想出的解決辦法很巧妙。

word: The solution my dad came up with was ingenious.

name: They've been married for 10 years,and I have to say they're a match made in heaven.

trans.cn: 他們已經結婚10年了，我不得不說，他們是天造地設的一對。

word: They've been married for 10 years,and I have to say they're a match made in heaven.

name: Bungee-jumping is the most thrilling activity I've ever tried.It gave me an adrenalin rush.

trans.cn: 高空彈跳是我嘗試過的最刺激的活動。它讓我腎上腺素激增。

word: Bungee-jumping is the most thrilling activity I've ever tried.It gave me an adrenalin rush.

name: She is caring,considerate and supportive.No matter what I do,she always has my back.

trans.cn: 她體貼、周到、樂於助人。不管我做什麼,她總是支援我。

word: She is caring,considerate and supportive.No matter what I do,she always has my back.

name: Hiking in that mountain and picnicking there was an unforgettable experience.

trans.cn: 在那座山裡徒步旅行和野餐是一次難忘的經歷。

word: Hiking in that mountain and picnicking there was an unforgettable experience.

name: That was a captivating book.It was so good that I couldn't put it down.

trans.cn: 那是一本引人入勝的書。它好看到讓我愛不釋手。

word: That was a captivating book.It was so good that I couldn't put it down.

name: The lake was incredibly beautiful.It really took my breath away.

trans.cn: 這個湖極其美麗，簡直令我窒息。

word: The lake was incredibly beautiful.It really took my breath away.

name: I still remember the first time I had a bite of that steak.It was exceptionally palatable

trans.cn: 我還記得第一次吃那個牛排的情景。它簡直太好吃了!

word: I still remember the first time I had a bite of that steak.It was exceptionally palatable

name: It was really enjoyable flying that kite my grandfather had made for me.I had the time of my life that day.

trans.cn: 放爺爺給我做的那個風箏使我非常開心。那天我玩得很痛快。

word: It was really enjoyable flying that kite my grandfather had made for me.I had the time of my life that day.

name: I've loved R&B ever since I was a teenager and my favourite singer is Lee.

trans.cn: 我從十幾歲開始就喜歡R&B 音樂，我最喜歡的歌手是李。

word: I've loved R&B ever since I was a teenager and my favourite singer is Lee.

name: I've lived in this apartment for 5 years now,and I don't suppose I'll move to another one anytime soon.

trans.cn: 我在這個公寓住了5年了，我想我短時間內不會搬到別處。

word: I've lived in this apartment for 5 years now,and I don't suppose I'll move to another one anytime soon.

name: I get up at 5:30 every morning and then go for a run before I start my day.I've had this habit since high school.

trans.cn: 我每天早上5:30起床，然後在開始我的一天之前去跑步。我從高中就養成了這個習慣。

word: I get up at 5:30 every morning and then go for a run before I start my day.I've had this habit since high school.

name: I've never been good at remembering things.I have a memory like a sieve.

trans.cn: 我從來都不擅長記東西。我的記憶力很差。

word: I've never been good at remembering things.I have a memory like a sieve.

name: Somehow,I've never really liked painting or drawing.

trans.cn: 不知道為什麼,我從來都不喜歡繪畫或素描。

word: Somehow,I've never really liked painting or drawing.

name: My uncle gave me a history book as a birthday gift and I've been fond of learning history ever since.

trans.cn: 我叔叔送給我一本歷史書作為生日禮物，從那以後我就一直喜歡學習歷史。

word: My uncle gave me a history book as a birthday gift and I've been fond of learning history ever since.

name: We met at a party and clicked immediately.We've been good friends ever since.

trans.cn: 我們在一個聚會上相識， 一見如故。從那以後，我們一直是好朋友。

word: We met at a party and clicked immediately.We've been good friends ever since.

name: I've always been told that scuba-diving is extremely enjoyable and so I've wanted to do it for ages.

trans.cn: 我一直被告知，潛水很有意思，所以我想要去潛水很久了。

word: I've always been told that scuba-diving is extremely enjoyable and so I've wanted to do it for ages.

name: I'm going to Brazil next month.I've longed to go there for a long time and it's finally going to happen.

trans.cn: 我下個月要去巴西。我渴望去那裡很久了，終於要如願以償了。

word: I'm going to Brazil next month.I've longed to go there for a long time and it's finally going to happen.

name: I've studied English for over 10 years now,but I'm still far from being fluent in it.

trans.cn: 至今我學英語已經有10多年了，但我說得還遠不夠流利。

word: I've studied English for over 10 years now,but I'm still far from being fluent in it.

name: My boss is a micromanager.He wants to have a finger in every pie.

trans.cn: 我的老闆是個微觀管理者，他事事都想參與。

word: My boss is a micromanager.He wants to have a finger in every pie.

name: I share a small apartment with a roommate who always borrows my clothes without asking.

trans.cn: 我和一個室友合租了一間小公寓，他/她總是不經允許就借我的衣服。

word: I share a small apartment with a roommate who always borrows my clothes without asking.

name: The necklace I bought cost me an arm and a leg.I think I was ripped off.

trans.cn: 我買的那條項鍊花了我一大筆錢。我想我被“宰”了。

word: The necklace I bought cost me an arm and a leg.I think I was ripped off.

name: I have no idea why my neighbors are so indifferent.They never stop to say "Hi"to me.

trans.cn: 我不知道為什麼我的鄰居如此冷漠。他們從不停下來對我說“嗨”。

word: I have no idea why my neighbors are so indifferent.They never stop to say "Hi"to me.

name: I can't stand my biology teacher who always gives us a ton of homework.

trans.cn: 我不能忍受我的生物老師總是給我們佈置很多作業。

word: I can't stand my biology teacher who always gives us a ton of homework.

name: TV commercials are a pain in the neck.They never fail to spoil the fun when you're watching a fascinating show.

trans.cn: 電視廣告很令人討厭。當你在看一個精彩的節目時，它們總會破壞你的樂趣。

word: TV commercials are a pain in the neck.They never fail to spoil the fun when you're watching a fascinating show.

name: I can't believe I forgot to invite Jenny to my birthday party.She must be so angry at me.

trans.cn: 真不敢相信我竟然忘了邀請珍妮參加我的生日聚會。她一定很生我的氣。

word: I can't believe I forgot to invite Jenny to my birthday party.She must be so angry at me.

name: My American friend wrote me a letter two months ago.I don't know why on earth it hasn't arrived yet!

trans.cn: 我的美國朋友兩個月前給我寫了一封信。我不知道究竟為什麼它還沒到!

word: My American friend wrote me a letter two months ago.I don't know why on earth it hasn't arrived yet!

name: I seldom go outside when it rains because I don't want to be soaking wet.

trans.cn: 下雨的時候我很少出門，因為我不想被淋溼。

word: I seldom go outside when it rains because I don't want to be soaking wet.

name: There was a pile-up yesterday and I was caught up in traffic for two hours.

trans.cn: 昨天發生了一起連環車禍，我在路上被堵了兩個小時。

word: There was a pile-up yesterday and I was caught up in traffic for two hours.

name: If I were a pop star,I wouldn't have much privacy.

trans.cn: 如果我是一名流行歌手，我就不會有太多的隱私。

word: If I were a pop star,I wouldn't have much privacy.

name: If I were less busy,I would spend more time hanging out with my folks.

trans.cn: 如果我不那麼忙，我會花更多的時間和家人在一起。

word: If I were less busy,I would spend more time hanging out with my folks.

name: It would be great if I could see my old friends more often.Now that we're in different cities,we don't meet up as regularly as before.

trans.cn: 如果我能更經常見到我的老朋友們，那就太好了。現在我們在不同的城市，我們不像以前那樣經常見面了。

word: It would be great if I could see my old friends more often.Now that we're in different cities,we don't meet up as regularly as before.

name: It would be fantastic if had a robot at home helping me with all the chores.

trans.cn: 如果家裡有個機器人幫我做所有的家務，那就太棒了。

word: It would be fantastic if had a robot at home helping me with all the chores.

name: I wish there were more public holidays.That way,we could travel more.

trans.cn: 我希望有更多的公眾假期。那樣的話，我們就可以更多地去旅行了。

word: I wish there were more public holidays.That way,we could travel more.

name: I wish everyone were as punctual as I am.I really hate those people who are always late

trans.cn: 我希望每個人都像我一樣準時。我真的很討厭那些總是遲到的人。

word: I wish everyone were as punctual as I am.I really hate those people who are always late

name: If I had studied English harder in high school,I believe I would be performing much better today.

trans.cn: 如果我在高中時更努力地學習英語，我相信我今天的表現會好得多。

word: If I had studied English harder in high school,I believe I would be performing much better today.

name: If I had taken my grandma's advice and taken up a few dancing lessons,I might be more attractive to girls now.

trans.cn: 如果我聽了奶奶的建議，上幾節舞蹈課，我現在可能對女孩子更具吸引力了。

word: If I had taken my grandma's advice and taken up a few dancing lessons,I might be more attractive to girls now.

name: I would like to own a house by the sea so that I could go for a stroll on the beach every day.

trans.cn: 我想在海邊擁有一套房子，這樣我就可以每天在海灘上散步了。

word: I would like to own a house by the sea so that I could go for a stroll on the beach every day.

name: If I had to learn a new skill,I guess it would be drawing.I've always envied those people who can draw beautifully.

trans.cn: 如果我必須學習一項新技能，我想會是繪畫。我總是羨慕那些能畫得漂亮的人。

word: If I had to learn a new skill,I guess it would be drawing.I've always envied those people who can draw beautifully.

name: The world's resources are being used at an alarming rate and it's high time that we took action to change the way we live.

trans.cn: 世界資源正以驚人的速度被消耗，現在是我們採取行動改變我們生活方式的時候了。

word: The world's resources are being used at an alarming rate and it's high time that we took action to change the way we live.

name: Air pollution is a pressing issue in many developing countries like India.

trans.cn: 空氣汙染在許多像印度一樣的發展中國家是一個很緊迫的問題。

word: Air pollution is a pressing issue in many developing countries like India.

name: One way to reduce our carbon footprint is to cycle more.

trans.cn: 減少我們碳排放量的一種方法是更多騎腳踏車出行。

word: One way to reduce our carbon footprint is to cycle more.

name: We should all pitch in when it comes to protecting the environment.For instance,I try to buy environmentally friendly goods whenever I can.

trans.cn: 在保護環境的問題上，我們都應該貢獻自己的一分力量。比如，我會盡可能地購買環保商品。

word: We should all pitch in when it comes to protecting the environment.For instance,I try to buy environmentally friendly goods whenever I can.

name: Global warming is putting the whole world at risk.If we don't admit the seriousness of it,we will all suffer.

trans.cn: 全球變暖正威脅著整個世界。如果我們不承認它的嚴重性，我們都將受到影響。

word: Global warming is putting the whole world at risk.If we don't admit the seriousness of it,we will all suffer.

name: One reason why some people don't consider environmental problems to be serious is that they're not affected by them on a day-to-day basis.

trans.cn: 有些人不認為環境問題很嚴重的一個原因是，他們的日常生活沒有受到影響。

word: One reason why some people don't consider environmental problems to be serious is that they're not affected by them on a day-to-day basis.

name: One clear consequence of global warming is the fact that there are far more hurricanes and tornadoes in the United States than in the past.

trans.cn: 全球變暖的一個明顯後果是，美國現在的颶風和龍捲風要比過去多得多。

word: One clear consequence of global warming is the fact that there are far more hurricanes and tornadoes in the United States than in the past.

name: It's sad that so many species are becoming endangered and even extinct due to human activity.

trans.cn: 許多物種由於人類活動而瀕危甚至滅絕，這很令人難過和悲哀。

word: It's sad that so many species are becoming endangered and even extinct due to human activity.

name: Some countries are only concerned with developing their economies,and so not doing enough to deal with environmental problems.

trans.cn: 有些國家只關心自己的經濟發展，因此在處理環境問題方面做得不夠。

word: Some countries are only concerned with developing their economies,and so not doing enough to deal with environmental problems.

name: I'm happy and proud that my country has vowed to step up its efforts to tackle environmental deterioration.

trans.cn: 令我感到高興和自豪的是，我國已發誓要加緊努力解決環境惡化問題。

word: I'm happy and proud that my country has vowed to step up its efforts to tackle environmental deterioration.

name: 1 I've always liked snacking on a chocolate bar in the mid-afternoon,yet I've never put on any weight because of this.

trans.cn: 我一直喜歡在下午三點左右吃根巧克力棒，但是我從來沒有因為這個發胖。

word: 1 I've always liked snacking on a chocolate bar in the mid-afternoon,yet I've never put on any weight because of this.

name: I don't quite like reading newspapers.Magazines appeal to me more.

trans.cn: 我不太喜歡看報紙，雜誌對我更有吸引力。

word: I don't quite like reading newspapers.Magazines appeal to me more.

name: The feeling of walking around a museum with many historic artefacts on display really appeals to me.

trans.cn: 我很喜歡漫步在陳列著很多歷史文物的博物館中。

word: The feeling of walking around a museum with many historic artefacts on display really appeals to me.

name: What I major in doesn't quite appeal to me.I regret choosing this major.

trans.cn: 我不喜歡我學的這個專業，我後悔選了它。

word: What I major in doesn't quite appeal to me.I regret choosing this major.

name: I absolutely adore picnicking and I do it every weekend.

trans.cn: 我非常喜歡野餐，我每個週末都去野餐。

word: I absolutely adore picnicking and I do it every weekend.

name: I  quite  enjoy  travelling  during  public  holidays.It's  a  great  opportunity  to recharge my batteries.

trans.cn: 我很喜歡在公共假期去旅遊，這是我休息充電的好機會。

word: I  quite  enjoy  travelling  during  public  holidays.It's  a  great  opportunity  to recharge my batteries.

name: I know it sounds weird,but I quite enjoy gazing at the sky for a while every night before hitting the hay.

trans.cn: 我知道這聽起來很奇怪，但我很喜歡每天晚上在睡覺前凝望一會兒天空。
