word: I know it sounds weird,but I quite enjoy gazing at the sky for a while every night before hitting the hay.

name: Reading is my biggest passion.I can't go a day without reading a few pages of a book

trans.cn: 閱讀是我最大的愛好，我每天必須得讀幾頁書。

word: Reading is my biggest passion.I can't go a day without reading a few pages of a book

name: I'm not a fan of countryside life.I can't stand not having shopping centers within easy reach.

trans.cn: 我不喜歡鄉村生活。我不能忍受我住的附近沒有購物中心。

word: I'm not a fan of countryside life.I can't stand not having shopping centers within easy reach.

name: I'm a people person.I can't stand being alone for more than three hours,except when I'm sleeping of course.

trans.cn: 我是一個喜歡交際的人。我不能忍受一個人待著超過三個小時，當然除了我睡覺的時候。

word: I'm a people person.I can't stand being alone for more than three hours,except when I'm sleeping of course.

name: I'm a huge fan of Weibo,the most popular social networking site in China.I'm on it 24/7.

trans.cn: 我特別喜歡中國最受歡迎的社交網站——微博。我每時每刻都線上。

word: I'm a huge fan of Weibo,the most popular social networking site in China.I'm on it 24/7.

name: It gives me great pleasure when I hang out with friends.

trans.cn: 當我和朋友們在一起時，我感到非常高興。

word: It gives me great pleasure when I hang out with friends.

name: My sister is crazy about swimming and I guess this is part of the reason why she has an hourglass figure.

trans.cn: 我妹妹很喜歡游泳，我猜這是她身材凹凸有致的原因之一。

word: My sister is crazy about swimming and I guess this is part of the reason why she has an hourglass figure.

name: l used to be crazy about watching rom-coms.I've changed a great deal over the years.

trans.cn: 我過去很喜歡看浪漫喜劇。這些年來我改變了很多。

word: l used to be crazy about watching rom-coms.I've changed a great deal over the years.

name: The girl that I have a crush on is crazy about photography,so I'm thinking of buying her a camera.

trans.cn: 我喜歡的那個女孩很喜歡攝影，所以我想給她買個相機。

word: The girl that I have a crush on is crazy about photography,so I'm thinking of buying her a camera.

name: Both my dad and I have a penchant for skiing from which we derive a lot of pleasure.

trans.cn: 我爸爸和我都喜歡滑雪，我們從中得到很多樂趣。

word: Both my dad and I have a penchant for skiing from which we derive a lot of pleasure.

name: I had a penchant for maths when I was growing up and I was even called a genius by many people.

trans.cn: 我小的時候非常喜歡數學，我甚至被很多人稱為天才。

word: I had a penchant for maths when I was growing up and I was even called a genius by many people.

name: I have a penchant for buying shoes.It gives me the greatest pleasure.

trans.cn: 我喜歡買鞋。這給了我最大的樂趣。

word: I have a penchant for buying shoes.It gives me the greatest pleasure.

name: All my friends have told me that I have a good voice and I should try to become a singer.I'm just not that into singing.

trans.cn: 我所有的朋友都告訴我，我的嗓音很好，我應該努力成為一名歌手。我只是沒那麼喜歡唱歌。

word: All my friends have told me that I have a good voice and I should try to become a singer.I'm just not that into singing.

name: It's common for girls to be into shopping.I'm no exception.

trans.cn: 女孩子喜歡購物是很平常的事，我也不例外。

word: It's common for girls to be into shopping.I'm no exception.

name: My younger brother spends most of his spare time watching TV,whereas I just can't seem to take any interest in it.

trans.cn: 我弟弟把他大部分的業餘時間都花在看電視上，然而我卻不喜歡看電視。

word: My younger brother spends most of his spare time watching TV,whereas I just can't seem to take any interest in it.

name: I'm passionate about music,especially hip-hop.

trans.cn: 我熱愛音樂，尤其是嘻哈音樂。

word: I'm passionate about music,especially hip-hop.

name: Those people who are passionate about learning history seem to be more articulate.

trans.cn: 那些熱衷於學習歷史的人似乎更善於表達。

word: Those people who are passionate about learning history seem to be more articulate.

name: Reading newspapers is not my thing.I prefer to get updated on what's going on in the world through social media.

trans.cn: 我對讀報紙沒興趣。我更喜歡透過社交媒體來了解世界上正在發生的事情。

word: Reading newspapers is not my thing.I prefer to get updated on what's going on in the world through social media.

name: Going to parks is not my thing.I prefer to stay home and play the guitar in my downtime.

trans.cn: 我對去公園沒興趣。我更喜歡待在家裡，在休息時間彈彈吉他。

word: Going to parks is not my thing.I prefer to stay home and play the guitar in my downtime.

name: Science has never been my cup of tea.It's too complex for me.

trans.cn: 我從來都不喜歡科學，它對我來說太複雜了。

word: Science has never been my cup of tea.It's too complex for me.

name: Cycling is not my cup of tea,especially in the summertime.Riding a bike for even ten minutes could make me all sweaty.

trans.cn: 我不喜歡騎腳踏車，尤其是在夏天。哪怕騎十分鐘腳踏車都會讓我汗流浹背。

word: Cycling is not my cup of tea,especially in the summertime.Riding a bike for even ten minutes could make me all sweaty.

name: I'm a computer buff.My friends always come to me if their computers need to be fixed.

trans.cn: 我是一個電腦愛好者。如果朋友們的電腦需要修理，他們總會來找我。

word: I'm a computer buff.My friends always come to me if their computers need to be fixed.

name: I may not look like it,but I'm actually a dance fiend.I specialize in locking.

trans.cn: 我可能看起來不像，但實際上我是一個舞蹈迷。我專攻鎖舞。

word: I may not look like it,but I'm actually a dance fiend.I specialize in locking.

name: My roommate is a crossword fiend.It takes up almost half of her spare time.

trans.cn: 我的室友是個填字遊戲迷。它佔用了她幾乎一半的業餘時間。

word: My roommate is a crossword fiend.It takes up almost half of her spare time.

name: I come from a tight-knit family.

trans.cn: 我來自一個親密的家庭。

word: I come from a tight-knit family.

name: I'm from a nuclear family.

trans.cn: 我來自一個小家庭。

word: I'm from a nuclear family.

name: I'm glad that l live in an extended family.I love the feeling of hanging out with my parents and grandparents at the same time.

trans.cn: 我很高興我生活在一個大家庭。我喜歡同時與父母和祖父母待在一塊兒的感覺。

word: I'm glad that l live in an extended family.I love the feeling of hanging out with my parents and grandparents at the same time.

name: I wasn't born into a wealthy family,but my parents worked hard to give me everything I needed.

trans.cn: 我沒有出生在一個富裕的家庭，但是我的父母努力工作，給了我需要的一切。

word: I wasn't born into a wealthy family,but my parents worked hard to give me everything I needed.

name: My parents are happily married.I hope my future marriage can be as good as theirs.

trans.cn: 我父母的婚姻很幸福。我希望我將來的婚姻能和他們的一樣好。

word: My parents are happily married.I hope my future marriage can be as good as theirs.

name: I take after my dad in many aspects.For instance,we both enjoy fishing and playing chess.

trans.cn: 我在許多方面都像我爸爸。例如，我們都喜歡釣魚和下棋。

word: I take after my dad in many aspects.For instance,we both enjoy fishing and playing chess.

name: People always say I'm my mom all over again.I'm delighted every time I hear it because my mom is a wonderful woman.

trans.cn: 人們總說我和我媽媽很像。我每次聽到這個都很高興，因為我媽媽是個了不起的女人。

word: People always say I'm my mom all over again.I'm delighted every time I hear it because my mom is a wonderful woman.

name: It's sad that families are becoming increasingly dispersed now.

trans.cn: 令人遺憾的是，家庭成員們現在正變得越來越分散。

word: It's sad that families are becoming increasingly dispersed now.

name: Most people will feel relaxed when they spend time with their family members.

trans.cn: 大多數人和他們的家人待在一起時都會感到放鬆。

word: Most people will feel relaxed when they spend time with their family members.

name: My siblings and I all like playing musical instruments.It runs in the family.

trans.cn: 我和我的兄弟姐妹都喜歡彈奏樂器。這是家族遺傳的。

word: My siblings and I all like playing musical instruments.It runs in the family.

name: Although my sister can be a bit annoying sometimes,I always have her back when she's in trouble because she's my flesh and blood.

trans.cn: 儘管我妹妹有時候會有點煩人，但當她遇到麻煩時，我永遠會支援她、保護她，因為她是我的親人。

word: Although my sister can be a bit annoying sometimes,I always have her back when she's in trouble because she's my flesh and blood.

name: Sibling rivalry is an issue that is talked about a lot in our society now,but it doesn't exist in my family.

trans.cn: 在當今的社會，兄弟姐妹間的競爭是經常被談論的一個話題，但這並不存在於我的家庭。

word: Sibling rivalry is an issue that is talked about a lot in our society now,but it doesn't exist in my family.

name: My granddad is in his 70s now and he's a benevolent man.

trans.cn: 我爺爺現在70多歲了，他是一個很慈祥的人。

word: My granddad is in his 70s now and he's a benevolent man.

name: It was my grandma who taught me the value of honesty and politeness.I'm truly thankful to her.

trans.cn: 是我奶奶教會我誠實和禮貌的價值。我真的很感謝她。

word: It was my grandma who taught me the value of honesty and politeness.I'm truly thankful to her.

name: Old people lived in more difficult times and have been through a lot more than we have.

trans.cn: 老年人們曾經生活在更困難的時期，他們比我們經歷的多得多。

word: Old people lived in more difficult times and have been through a lot more than we have.

name: Elderly people are an asset in our society because they can pass down so much knowledge and wisdom to young people.

trans.cn: 老年人是我們社會的財富，因為他們可以把大量的知識和智慧傳遞給年輕人。

word: Elderly people are an asset in our society because they can pass down so much knowledge and wisdom to young people.

name: One benefit of living with older people is that they can take care of children while the parents are at work.

trans.cn: 與老年人生活在一起的一個好處是，他們可以在父母工作的時候照顧孩子。

word: One benefit of living with older people is that they can take care of children while the parents are at work.

name: There have been some programmes put in place to enable senior citizens to learn and acquire new skills.

trans.cn: (政府)已經開始實施一些計劃，以使老年人能夠學習和掌握新技能。

word: There have been some programmes put in place to enable senior citizens to learn and acquire new skills.

name: As the society begins to age,certain problems such as a smaller workforce are bound to emerge.

trans.cn: 隨著社會開始老齡化，諸如勞動力減少等問題必然會出現。

word: As the society begins to age,certain problems such as a smaller workforce are bound to emerge.

name: One big part of a child's growing up is to have fun.There will be plenty of time for them to study in the future.

trans.cn: 孩子成長的一個重要部分就是開心地玩，將來他們會有足夠的時間學習。

word: One big part of a child's growing up is to have fun.There will be plenty of time for them to study in the future.

name: In order for children to take an interest in reading,their parents should set good examples first.

trans.cn: 為了讓孩子對閱讀有興趣，父母應該首先樹立榜樣。

word: In order for children to take an interest in reading,their parents should set good examples first.

name: I don't think it does much harm if a kid plays computer games for a short amount of time a day.As long as it's done in moderation,it's fine.

trans.cn: 我不認為如果一個孩子每天玩短時間的電腦遊戲會有很大的害處。只要是適度的，就沒問題。

word: I don't think it does much harm if a kid plays computer games for a short amount of time a day.As long as it's done in moderation,it's fine.

name: It's not a good idea to forbid children from using cellphones.They should be educated about how not to use them in an improper way.

trans.cn: 禁止孩子使用手機不是一個好主意。我們應該教育孩子們不要以不當的方式 使用它們。

word: It's not a good idea to forbid children from using cellphones.They should be educated about how not to use them in an improper way.

name: I didn't quite like doing housework when I was growing up.I still don't now.

trans.cn: 我小時候不太喜歡做家務。我現在仍然不喜歡。

word: I didn't quite like doing housework when I was growing up.I still don't now.

name: I come from a single-parent family.It was tough for me as a kid.

trans.cn: 我來自一個單親家庭。我小的時候生活很困難。

word: I come from a single-parent family.It was tough for me as a kid.

name: My mom is the most caring woman I've ever seen.She's sacrificed a lot for the family.

trans.cn: 我媽媽是我見過的最體貼的女人，她為家庭犧牲了很多。

word: My mom is the most caring woman I've ever seen.She's sacrificed a lot for the family.

name: In order to look after me,she quit her job and became a housewife.

trans.cn: 為了照顧我，她辭掉工作，成了一名家庭主婦。

word: In order to look after me,she quit her job and became a housewife.

name: More and more women are becoming breadwinners in their families.

trans.cn: 越來越多的女性成為她們家庭的經濟支柱。

word: More and more women are becoming breadwinners in their families.

name: Housewives should be paid as well because being a housewife is a job just like any other.

trans.cn: 家庭主婦也應該得到報酬，因為做家庭主婦就像其他任何工作一樣。

word: Housewives should be paid as well because being a housewife is a job just like any other.

name: Even though most men don't want to admit it,the glass ceiling still exists in many workplaces.

trans.cn: 儘管大多數男人不想承認，女性的升遷障礙仍然存在於很多工作場所。

word: Even though most men don't want to admit it,the glass ceiling still exists in many workplaces.

name: I've been working as a Chinese teacher for five years,ever since I graduated from university.

trans.cn: 我從大學畢業到現在，當了五年語文老師。

word: I've been working as a Chinese teacher for five years,ever since I graduated from university.

name: I'm an IT consultant at an IT company.I've been working there for more than three years.

trans.cn: 我是一家 IT公司的 IT顧問。我已經在那裡工作三年多了。

word: I'm an IT consultant at an IT company.I've been working there for more than three years.

name: What I do is just a nine-to-five job.It's not very tiring or stressful.

trans.cn: 我做的是一份朝九晚五的工作。這個工作不太累，壓力也不大。

word: What I do is just a nine-to-five job.It's not very tiring or stressful.

name: I've wanted to become a doctor ever since I was a kid.I've always liked helping people.

trans.cn: 我從小就想成為一名醫生。我一直喜歡幫助別人。

word: I've wanted to become a doctor ever since I was a kid.I've always liked helping people.

name: I work in advertising and my boyfriend works in finance.

trans.cn: 我在廣告業工作，我男朋友在金融業工作。

word: I work in advertising and my boyfriend works in finance.

name: I'm responsible for updating the company website.

trans.cn: 我負責更新公司網站。

word: I'm responsible for updating the company website.

name: My best friend is a human resources manager and she is in charge of interviewing candidates for jobs.

trans.cn: 我最好的朋友是一名人力資源經理，她負責面試求職者。

word: My best friend is a human resources manager and she is in charge of interviewing candidates for jobs.

name: My previous job mainly involved giving tours of the museum.

trans.cn: 我以前的工作主要是帶著遊客參觀博物館。

word: My previous job mainly involved giving tours of the museum.

name: I'm between jobs at the moment.

trans.cn: 我現在正在找工作。

word: I'm between jobs at the moment.

name: I'm currently unemployed.I'm in dire need of a job to pay my bills.

trans.cn: 我現在處於失業狀態。我急需一份工作來支付我的各種賬單。

word: I'm currently unemployed.I'm in dire need of a job to pay my bills.

name: My mom once told me that being a teacher was her dream job.It was a pity that her dream wasn't realized.

trans.cn: 我媽媽曾經告訴我，當老師是她夢寐以求的工作。遺憾的是她的夢想沒有實現。

word: My mom once told me that being a teacher was her dream job.It was a pity that her dream wasn't realized.

name: One thing I like about my job  is that I get to work on a team.It feels satisfying to collaborate with people on a project.

trans.cn: 我喜歡我工作的一點是我可以和別人合作。和同事一起努力完成一個專案讓我感到非常滿足。

word: One thing I like about my job  is that I get to work on a team.It feels satisfying to collaborate with people on a project.

name: I'm really fond of my job mainly because of all the challenges I constantly have to face.

trans.cn: 我很喜歡我的工作，主要是因為我經常需要面對不少挑戰。

word: I'm really fond of my job mainly because of all the challenges I constantly have to face.

name: It gives me a sense of achievement every time I've overcome some difficulties in my job.

trans.cn: 每次我在工作中克服了一些困難，我都會獲得一種成就感。

word: It gives me a sense of achievement every time I've overcome some difficulties in my job.

name: I chose to become a sales representative because I was convinced it would help enhance my people skills.

trans.cn: 我選擇成為一名銷售代表，是因為我確信這有助於提高我的人際交往能力。

word: I chose to become a sales representative because I was convinced it would help enhance my people skills.

name: My company offers flextime and other benefits such as end-of-year bonuses.

trans.cn: 我的公司提供彈性工作時間和一些其他福利，比如年終獎金。

word: My company offers flextime and other benefits such as end-of-year bonuses.

name: What  I don't like about my current job is the long commute.It takes me roughly one and a half hours to get to work every day.

trans.cn: 我不喜歡我現在工作的一點是每天的通勤時間太長了。我每天大約要花一個 半小時去上班。

word: What  I don't like about my current job is the long commute.It takes me roughly one and a half hours to get to work every day.

name: I always need to work overtime without getting paid.I'm seriously considering quitting my job.

trans.cn: 我總是需要加班，但又沒有薪水。我在認真考慮辭掉我的工作。

word: I always need to work overtime without getting paid.I'm seriously considering quitting my job.

name: The work I do is rather repetitive.The boredom makes me want to resign.

trans.cn: 我做的工作非常重複乏味，這種枯燥使我想辭職。

word: The work I do is rather repetitive.The boredom makes me want to resign.

name: My cousin always complains to me that she is overworked and underpaid.

trans.cn: 我的堂/表姐/妹總是向我抱怨說她工作太多、薪水太少。

word: My cousin always complains to me that she is overworked and underpaid.

name: One of my friends has been working from home since three years ago.I really envy her.

trans.cn: 我的一個朋友從三年前開始就在家工作了。我真的很羨慕她。

word: One of my friends has been working from home since three years ago.I really envy her.

name: Whether someone enjoys their job or not depends largely on their relationship with colleagues.

trans.cn: 一個人是否喜歡自己的工作在很大程度上取決於他/她和同事的關係。

word: Whether someone enjoys their job or not depends largely on their relationship with colleagues.

name: I've developed good rapport with my coworkers.

trans.cn: 我和我的同事關係很好。

word: I've developed good rapport with my coworkers.

name: Some managers and supervisors like to micromanage and this makes it hard for an employee to like their job.

trans.cn: 一些經理和主管喜歡微觀管理，這使得員工們很難喜歡他們的工作。

word: Some managers and supervisors like to micromanage and this makes it hard for an employee to like their job.

name: I was promised a promotion six months ago,but I sill haven't gotten it.

trans.cn: 6個月前我被許諾會升職，但我還沒有被升職。

word: I was promised a promotion six months ago,but I sill haven't gotten it.

name: Jason treated us to dinner last week because he had just gotten a pay raise.

trans.cn: 詹森上星期請我們吃飯，因為他剛剛漲了工資。

word: Jason treated us to dinner last week because he had just gotten a pay raise.

name: It would be great if I could move from a small cubicle to a big office.

trans.cn: 如果我能從一個小隔間搬到一個大辦公室，那就太好了。

word: It would be great if I could move from a small cubicle to a big office.

name: All skills matter in the workplace,but the most important ones are probably interpersonal and communication skills.

trans.cn: 所有的技能在工作中都很重要，但最重要的可能是人際交往和溝通能力。

word: All skills matter in the workplace,but the most important ones are probably interpersonal and communication skills.

name: There's no point in earning a big salary without deriving any pleasure from the job.

trans.cn: 如果無法從工作中得到樂趣，即使能賺很多錢也是毫無意義的。

word: There's no point in earning a big salary without deriving any pleasure from the job.

name: Many people look for jobs that have good job security.

trans.cn: 許多人尋找有良好工作保障的工作。

word: Many people look for jobs that have good job security.

name: l live in a small and tranquil town in the south of China.I really love the peace and quiet there.

trans.cn: 我住在中國南部一個安靜的小鎮。我很喜歡那裡的平和寧靜。

word: l live in a small and tranquil town in the south of China.I really love the peace and quiet there.

name: There's been a lot of construction going on near my apartment,so it's been pretty noisy recently.

trans.cn: 我的公寓附近一直在施工，所以最近很吵。

word: There's been a lot of construction going on near my apartment,so it's been pretty noisy recently.

name: Where l live is quite historical.I think it's great that all the ancient buildings are preserved so well.

trans.cn: 我住的地方歷史悠久。我認為所有的古建築都儲存得如此完好是件了不起的事。

word: Where l live is quite historical.I think it's great that all the ancient buildings are preserved so well.

name: I come from a cosmopolitan city.Everywhere you go,you see high-rises and skyscrapers

trans.cn: 我來自一個國際化大都市。無論你走到哪裡，都能看到高樓大廈和摩天大樓。

word: I come from a cosmopolitan city.Everywhere you go,you see high-rises and skyscrapers

name: I'm not a fan of the hustle and bustle of my hometown.I prefer places that are more peaceful.

trans.cn: 我不喜歡我家鄉的喧囂，我喜歡比較安靜的地方。

word: I'm not a fan of the hustle and bustle of my hometown.I prefer places that are more peaceful.

name: My hometown is rather sleepy.There are not many things to do for fun.

trans.cn: 我的家鄉很乏味，沒有什麼好玩的事情可以做。

word: My hometown is rather sleepy.There are not many things to do for fun.

name: My parents chose to move to this area mainly because of all the greenery here.

trans.cn: 我的父母選擇搬到這個地方，主要是因為這裡有很多綠色植物。

word: My parents chose to move to this area mainly because of all the greenery here.

name: Willows abound in the park near our home.

trans.cn: 我們家附近的公園裡有很多柳樹。

word: Willows abound in the park near our home.

name: The house I used to live in was surrounded by ginkgoes.

trans.cn: 我以前住的房子周圍都是銀杏樹。

word: The house I used to live in was surrounded by ginkgoes.

name: Outside my window is a lake and there are a lot of water lilies and lotuses growing there in the summer.

trans.cn: 我的窗外有一個湖，夏天那裡生長著很多睡蓮和荷花。

word: Outside my window is a lake and there are a lot of water lilies and lotuses growing there in the summer.

name: There's a subway station within walking distance of my home and this is part of the reason why I quite like this neighbourhood.

trans.cn: 離我家不遠的地方有個地鐵站，這也是我很喜歡這個社羣的原因之一。

word: There's a subway station within walking distance of my home and this is part of the reason why I quite like this neighbourhood.

name: My apartment is close to the bar area.I like to go for a few drinks with my friends on the weekend.

trans.cn: 我的公寓離酒吧區很近，我喜歡週末和朋友們一起去喝幾杯。

word: My apartment is close to the bar area.I like to go for a few drinks with my friends on the weekend.

name: It used to be a lively place,but now it's pretty run-down.

trans.cn: 這裡曾經是一個熱鬧的地方，但現在已經很破敗了。

word: It used to be a lively place,but now it's pretty run-down.

name: It has been developing rapidly over the past ten years.It's already become one of the most dynamic areas in the city.

trans.cn: 這個地方在過去的十年中發展迅速，它已經成為這個城市最具活力的地區之一。

word: It has been developing rapidly over the past ten years.It's already become one of the most dynamic areas in the city.

name: I love the fact that there are a wide variety of restaurants near my home.

trans.cn: 我家附近有各種各樣的餐館，我很喜歡這一點。

word: I love the fact that there are a wide variety of restaurants near my home.

name: We have a serious issue with pollution in my hometown.The government has to take action immediately.

trans.cn: 我的家鄉有很嚴重的汙染問題，政府必須立即採取行動。

word: We have a serious issue with pollution in my hometown.The government has to take action immediately.

name: What I can't stand is the awful air quality.It's always smoggy in the winter.

trans.cn: 我不能忍受的是糟糕的空氣質量，這裡冬天總是煙霧瀰漫的。

word: What I can't stand is the awful air quality.It's always smoggy in the winter.

name: Some people say that exhaust fumes from cars are the main contributor to smog.

trans.cn: 有人說汽車尾氣是造成霧霾的主要原因。

word: Some people say that exhaust fumes from cars are the main contributor to smog.

name: It's a good thing that some car companies are designing environmentally friendly vehicles now.

trans.cn: 一些汽車公司現在正在設計環保型汽車，這是件好事。

word: It's a good thing that some car companies are designing environmentally friendly vehicles now.

name: Most people wear masks when they go outside,but respiratory problems are still very common.

trans.cn: 大多數人外出時戴口罩，但呼吸道問題仍然很普遍。

word: Most people wear masks when they go outside,but respiratory problems are still very common.

name: So many animal species are on the verge of dying out.If we don't do anything,they will be extinct soon.

trans.cn: 許多動物物種瀕臨滅絕。如果我們不採取任何行動，它們很快就會不復存在。

word: So many animal species are on the verge of dying out.If we don't do anything,they will be extinct soon.

name: Some animals are endangered due to human activities like deforestation and poaching.

trans.cn: 由於砍伐森林和偷獵這樣的人類活動， 一些動物現在瀕臨滅絕。

word: Some animals are endangered due to human activities like deforestation and poaching.

name: I read a news article the other day which said the number of snow leopards is on the rise.It was pretty encouraging.

trans.cn: 前幾天我讀到一篇新聞，說雪豹的數量正在上升。這是非常令人鼓舞的。

word: I read a news article the other day which said the number of snow leopards is on the rise.It was pretty encouraging.

name: Global warming is absolutely the most serious issue we're facing now because it could put the whole world at risk.

trans.cn: 全球變暖絕對是我們現在面臨的最嚴重的問題，因為它可能使整個世界處於危險之中。

word: Global warming is absolutely the most serious issue we're facing now because it could put the whole world at risk.

name: We see far more hurricanes and tornadoes in the United States than in the past.

trans.cn: 在美國，颶風和龍捲風的數量比過去多得多。

word: We see far more hurricanes and tornadoes in the United States than in the past.

name: I'd like to see more celebrities endorsing non-profit organizations which aim at combating climate change.

trans.cn: 我希望看到更多的名人支援旨在對抗氣候變化的非營利組織。

word: I'd like to see more celebrities endorsing non-profit organizations which aim at combating climate change.

name: There need to be more campaigns to raise people's awareness of the deterioration of the environment.

trans.cn: 我們需要開展更多的活動來提高人們對環境惡化的認識。

word: There need to be more campaigns to raise people's awareness of the deterioration of the environment.

name: In order to reduce its carbon footprint,a country usually has to sacrifice its economic growth.

trans.cn: 為了減少碳排放， 一個國家通常不得不犧牲經濟增長。

word: In order to reduce its carbon footprint,a country usually has to sacrifice its economic growth.

name: We shouldn't develop our economies at the expense of our environment.

trans.cn: 我們不應該以犧牲環境為代價來發展經濟。

word: We shouldn't develop our economies at the expense of our environment.

name: There are many other environmental problems such as oil spills and radioactive leaks at nuclear plants.

trans.cn: 我們還有許多其他的環境問題，如石油洩漏和核電站的放射性物質洩漏。

word: There are many other environmental problems such as oil spills and radioactive leaks at nuclear plants.

name: My cousin is a couch potato.He spends hours glued to the TV when he's not studying.

trans.cn: 我堂/表兄/弟是個電視迷。他不學習的時候，總是把時間花在看電視上。

word: My cousin is a couch potato.He spends hours glued to the TV when he's not studying.

name: Running Man is my favourite show.I watch it every time it's on.I even watch its reruns

trans.cn: 《奔跑吧兄弟》是我最喜歡的節目。它播出時我每次都看。我甚至看它的重播。

word: Running Man is my favourite show.I watch it every time it's on.I even watch its reruns

name: It's not uncommon for young people today to be hooked on reality shows.

trans.cn: 現在的年輕人非常喜歡看真人秀。

word: It's not uncommon for young people today to be hooked on reality shows.

name: Parents should encourage their children to watch more educational shows like documentaries.

trans.cn: 家長應該鼓勵孩子觀看更多像紀錄片這樣有教育意義的節目。

word: Parents should encourage their children to watch more educational shows like documentaries.

name: I  don't  recommend  watching  English  movies  with  Chinese  subtitles.It doesn't help with English learning.

trans.cn: 我不推薦看帶有中文字幕的英文電影。這對英語學習沒有幫助。

word: I  don't  recommend  watching  English  movies  with  Chinese  subtitles.It doesn't help with English learning.

name: That movie was pure adrenaline.I was on the edge of my seat the whole time.

trans.cn: 那部電影非常刺激，我在看的時候一直高度緊張。

word: That movie was pure adrenaline.I was on the edge of my seat the whole time.

name: The most popular movies these days are those that have a lot of special effects.

trans.cn: 現在最流行的電影是那些有很多特效的電影。

word: The most popular movies these days are those that have a lot of special effects.

name: That  new  James  Bond  film  was  like  a  roller-coaster  ride.There  were  so many twists and turns.

trans.cn: 那部新的007電影就像過山車一樣，有很多曲折的劇情。

word: That  new  James  Bond  film  was  like  a  roller-coaster  ride.There  were  so many twists and turns.

name: I love the fact that this movie was shot in many spectacular locations.Many of the views were stunning.

trans.cn: 這部電影在許多極其美麗的地方拍攝，我很喜歡。許多景色令人驚歎。

word: I love the fact that this movie was shot in many spectacular locations.Many of the views were stunning.

name: This film has a star-studded cast.No wonder it's been getting rave reviews.

trans.cn: 這部電影有明星雲集的演員陣容。難怪人們對它的評價很高。

word: This film has a star-studded cast.No wonder it's been getting rave reviews.

name: It's a pity that that new Nicholas Cage movie was a flop.He clearly worked really hard in it.

trans.cn: 遺憾的是，尼古拉斯·凱奇的這部新電影非常失敗。他顯然已經很努力了。

word: It's a pity that that new Nicholas Cage movie was a flop.He clearly worked really hard in it.

name: I'm a big bookworm;reading makes up about 30 or even 40 percent of my day.

trans.cn: 我非常喜歡讀書。閱讀佔據我一天中大約30%,甚至40%的時間。

word: I'm a big bookworm;reading makes up about 30 or even 40 percent of my day.

name: My girlfriend is a fan of romantic novels,while I only read non-fiction.

trans.cn: 我的女朋友是言情小說的愛好者，而我只看非小說類的書籍。

word: My girlfriend is a fan of romantic novels,while I only read non-fiction.

name: That book was a real page-turner and I couldn't put it down.

trans.cn: 那本書非常引人入勝，我簡直愛不釋手。

word: That book was a real page-turner and I couldn't put it down.

name: My favourite book is named The Tipping Point,which is an international best-seller.

trans.cn: 我最喜歡的書叫《引爆點》,它是一本國際暢銷書。

word: My favourite book is named The Tipping Point,which is an international best-seller.

name: This novel revolves around a beautiful girl named Joyce,who falls in love with a penniless young guy called Stephen.

trans.cn: 這部小說圍繞一個名叫喬伊絲的美麗女孩展開，她愛上了一個名叫斯蒂芬的身無分文的年輕人。

word: This novel revolves around a beautiful girl named Joyce,who falls in love with a penniless young guy called Stephen.

name: The name and cover of the book caught my eye.I gave it a brief read and was fascinated by the plot.

trans.cn: 這本書的名字和封面引起了我的注意。我大致讀了一下，然後被情節吸引了。

word: The name and cover of the book caught my eye.I gave it a brief read and was fascinated by the plot.

name: If I have time,I might go to the newsstand to buy a newspaper and read through most of the pages and articles.

trans.cn: 如果我有時間，我可能會去報攤買份報紙，閱讀裡面大部分的版面和文章。

word: If I have time,I might go to the newsstand to buy a newspaper and read through most of the pages and articles.

name: I read news on a daily basis.It keeps me updated on what's going on in the world.

trans.cn: 我每天都看新聞，它讓我瞭解世界上正在發生的事情。

word: I read news on a daily basis.It keeps me updated on what's going on in the world.

name: Social  media  is  my  main  source  of  information.The  news  there  tends  to  be more up-to-the-minute.

trans.cn: 社交媒體是我的主要資訊來源，上面的新聞往往是最新的。

word: Social  media  is  my  main  source  of  information.The  news  there  tends  to  be more up-to-the-minute.

name: A newspaper is generally published daily,whereas a magazine is published either weekly or monthly.

trans.cn: 報紙一般是每天出版的，而雜誌則是週刊或月刊。

word: A newspaper is generally published daily,whereas a magazine is published either weekly or monthly.

name: The sports and entertainment sections of a newspaper appeal to the young generation more.

trans.cn: 報紙裡的體育和娛樂版塊更吸引年輕一代。

word: The sports and entertainment sections of a newspaper appeal to the young generation more.

name: I believe that domestic news is more important than international news because it concerns us more.

trans.cn: 我認為國內新聞比國際新聞更重要，因為它與我們關係更緊密。

word: I believe that domestic news is more important than international news because it concerns us more.

name: The celebrity I adore the most is Jackie.He's my role model.

trans.cn: 我最喜歡的名人是傑基，他是我的榜樣。

word: The celebrity I adore the most is Jackie.He's my role model.

name: I met him on one occasion and managed to get his autograph.I was in seventh heaven.

trans.cn: 有一次我遇到了他，並設法得到了他的親筆簽名。我高興極了。

word: I met him on one occasion and managed to get his autograph.I was in seventh heaven.

name: David is a legendary soccer player and also a fashion icon.Now he mainly plays the role of a doting father.

trans.cn: 大衛是一位傳奇的足球運動員，也是一個時尚偶像。現在，他主要扮演一個寵愛孩子的父親的角色。

word: David is a legendary soccer player and also a fashion icon.Now he mainly plays the role of a doting father.

name: Ellen has had a tremendous influence on me.I'm much more positive and caring because of her.

trans.cn: 艾倫對我產生了巨大的影響。因為她，我變得更積極、更關心人。

word: Ellen has had a tremendous influence on me.I'm much more positive and caring because of her.

name: It's a shame that some singers rise to fame overnight and then are quickly forgotten.

trans.cn: 有些歌手一夜成名，然後很快就被遺忘，這令人遺憾。

word: It's a shame that some singers rise to fame overnight and then are quickly forgotten.

name: Some people say celebrities don't have the responsibility of setting good examples to teenagers.I don't agree with that.

trans.cn: 有些人說名人沒有為青少年樹立好榜樣的責任。我不同意這個觀點。

word: Some people say celebrities don't have the responsibility of setting good examples to teenagers.I don't agree with that.

name: There's no doubt that customers are more likely to buy the products endorsed by their favourite singers or actors.

trans.cn: 毋庸置疑，人們更容易去購買那些他們喜歡的歌手或演員所代言的產品。

word: There's no doubt that customers are more likely to buy the products endorsed by their favourite singers or actors.

name: My best friend is an Aquarius and she can be quite unpredictable.She changes hobbies very often.

trans.cn: 我最好的朋友是水瓶座的，她非常難以捉摸。她的愛好經常改變。

word: My best friend is an Aquarius and she can be quite unpredictable.She changes hobbies very often.

name: She is the most creative person I've ever seen.She is always able to come up with some crazy yet interesting ideas.

trans.cn: 她是我見過的最有創意的人，她總是能想出一些瘋狂而有趣的點子。

word: She is the most creative person I've ever seen.She is always able to come up with some crazy yet interesting ideas.

name: Helen is very sociable and loves being surrounded by people.Being a Pisces makes her a people person.

trans.cn: 海倫很愛交際，喜歡和很多人待在一起。她如此善於交際是因為她是個雙魚座

word: Helen is very sociable and loves being surrounded by people.Being a Pisces makes her a people person.

name: She can be a little idealistic at times.I'm not sure if she'll be less so as she matures.

trans.cn: 她有時會有點理想化。我不確定這是否會隨著她逐漸成熟而改變。

word: She can be a little idealistic at times.I'm not sure if she'll be less so as she matures.

name: My dad is a typical Aries.He's adventurous,courageous,confident and quick-witted.

trans.cn: 我爸爸是典型的白羊座。他是一個敢於冒險、勇敢、自信和機智的人。

word: My dad is a typical Aries.He's adventurous,courageous,confident and quick-witted.

name: He can be a little quick-tempered though.Perhaps this is a flaw that most intelligent people share.

trans.cn: 不過他可能脾氣有點暴躁。也許這是大多數聰明人所共有的一個缺陷。

word: He can be a little quick-tempered though.Perhaps this is a flaw that most intelligent people share.

name: The best word to describe my mom must be reliable.Oh,she's also super supportive.She always has my back when I try to pursue something.

trans.cn: 描述我媽媽的最恰當的詞一定是“值得信賴”。噢，她也非常支援我。當我想要追求一些東西的時候，她總是站在我的身後。

word: The best word to describe my mom must be reliable.Oh,she's also super supportive.She always has my back when I try to pursue something.

name: The only problem with her is that she can be somewhat possessive.

trans.cn: 她唯一的問題是她的佔有慾有點強。

word: The only problem with her is that she can be somewhat possessive.

name: Being a Gemini,my roommate Elena is extremely articulate and communicative.

trans.cn: 作為一個雙子座的人，我的室友伊蓮娜非常善於表達和交流。

word: Being a Gemini,my roommate Elena is extremely articulate and communicative.

name: She can be easily tired of things,which means she's always on the lookout for new passions.

trans.cn: 她很容易對事情感到厭倦，這意味著她總是在尋找新的興趣愛好。

word: She can be easily tired of things,which means she's always on the lookout for new passions.

name: This very good friend of mine is very loving and protective.He is a perfect friend.

trans.cn: 我的這個很好的朋友非常有愛心而且會保護人。他是一個完美的朋友。

word: This very good friend of mine is very loving and protective.He is a perfect friend.

name: It's been years since he and his ex broke up,but he still can't let go.

trans.cn: 他和他的前任分手已經好幾年了，但他還是不能釋懷。

word: It's been years since he and his ex broke up,but he still can't let go.

name: Our soccer captain is confident,independent and generous.That's why we chose him to lead our team.

trans.cn: 我們的足球隊隊長自信、獨立、慷慨。這就是為什麼我們選擇他來領導我們的球隊。

word: Our soccer captain is confident,independent and generous.That's why we chose him to lead our team.

name: He's a Leo,so that explains why he's quite stubborn sometimes.He'll dig his heels in when we have different views on how to play a game.

trans.cn: 他是個獅子座，這就是為什麼他有時候很固執。當我們對如何踢一場比賽有不同意見時，他從不會放棄自己的想法。

word: He's a Leo,so that explains why he's quite stubborn sometimes.He'll dig his heels in when we have different views on how to play a game.

name: Many people think I'm a Virgo because I'm a perfectionist.They are right!I am a Virgo,haha.

trans.cn: 很多人認為我是處女座，因為我是個完美主義者。他們是對的!我確實是處女座，哈哈。

word: Many people think I'm a Virgo because I'm a perfectionist.They are right!I am a Virgo,haha.

name: Some of my friends criticize me of being too fussy.Yeah,I know I can be picky about things sometimes.

trans.cn: 我的一些朋友批評我太挑剔。是啊，我知道有時候我會對一些東西較為挑剔。

word: Some of my friends criticize me of being too fussy.Yeah,I know I can be picky about things sometimes.

name: My grandfather is already in his late 80s and is still as fit as a fiddle.His secret is that he always looks on the bright side of things.

trans.cn: 我的祖父已經快90歲了，身體還很健康。他的秘密是他總是能看到事物的積極一面。

word: My grandfather is already in his late 80s and is still as fit as a fiddle.His secret is that he always looks on the bright side of things.

name: He's the most changeable person I know.One minute he says he wants to play chess and the next minute he wants to go and sing on our balcony.

trans.cn: 他是我所認識的最善變的人。前一分鐘他說他想下棋，下一分鐘，他想去陽臺上唱歌。

word: He's the most changeable person I know.One minute he says he wants to play chess and the next minute he wants to go and sing on our balcony.

name: Mr.Zhang,our English teacher,often says we need to think like a Scorpio,which means we need to think out of the box.

trans.cn: 我們的英語老師張老師經常說，我們需要像天蠍座那樣思考。這意味著我們需要跳出思維定式。

word: Mr.Zhang,our English teacher,often says we need to think like a Scorpio,which means we need to think out of the box.

name: My little sister is a Scorpio.She is often jealous of other kids who have more toys than she does.

trans.cn: 我的小妹妹是個天蠍座。她經常嫉妒玩具比她多的孩子。

word: My little sister is a Scorpio.She is often jealous of other kids who have more toys than she does.

name: Peter is optimistic and easygoing and he will go all the way if he finds something exciting.

trans.cn: 彼得很樂觀，也很隨和。如果他發現了什麼令人激動的事情，他就會一直做下去。

word: Peter is optimistic and easygoing and he will go all the way if he finds something exciting.

name: Punctuality is not one of his strong points.It's a smart idea to give him an earlier meeting time if you're meeting up with him.

trans.cn: 守時不是他的強項。如果你要和他見面的話，告訴他一個更早的見面時間是個明智的主意。

word: Punctuality is not one of his strong points.It's a smart idea to give him an earlier meeting time if you're meeting up with him.

name: Raymond is very ambitious and is a natural leader.He's destined to do great things.

trans.cn: 雷蒙德很有抱負，是一個天生的領導者。他註定要做偉大的事情。

word: Raymond is very ambitious and is a natural leader.He's destined to do great things.

name: He's so goal-oriented,so he might come across a little boring sometimes.

trans.cn: 他是個目標很明確的人，所以大家有時候會覺得他有點無聊。

word: He's so goal-oriented,so he might come across a little boring sometimes.

name: There have to be stricter laws to deter factories from polluting rivers,lakes and the sea.

trans.cn: 必須有更嚴格的法律來阻止工廠汙染河流、湖泊和海洋。

word: There have to be stricter laws to deter factories from polluting rivers,lakes and the sea.

name: Our government has passed new legislation to regulate housing prices,but I'm not sure if it's going to work.

trans.cn: 我們的政府透過了新的法律來調控房價，但我不確定它是否會起作用。

word: Our government has passed new legislation to regulate housing prices,but I'm not sure if it's going to work.

name: I've always believed that investment in crime prevention is more effective than punishment in bringing down the crime rate.

trans.cn: 我一直認為，在降低犯罪率方面，努力預防犯罪比懲罰更有效。

word: I've always believed that investment in crime prevention is more effective than punishment in bringing down the crime rate.

name: More and more people are worried about online crime like identity theft. Measures need to be taken to deal with it.

trans.cn: 越來越多的人開始擔心像身份盜竊這樣的網路犯罪。我們需要採取措施來應對這一問題。

word: More and more people are worried about online crime like identity theft. Measures need to be taken to deal with it.

name: This young man was sentenced to five years imprisonment for robbery.

trans.cn: 這個年輕人因搶劫被判處五年監禁。

word: This young man was sentenced to five years imprisonment for robbery.

name: I paid a fine of $300 for speeding while road tripping in California.

trans.cn: 我在加利福尼亞州自駕時，因為超速而被罰了300美元。

word: I paid a fine of $300 for speeding while road tripping in California.

name: I'm crazy about travelling.My dream is to set foot in every continent and visit at least 100 countries.

trans.cn: 我非常喜歡旅行。我的夢想是踏上每一個大陸，去至少一百個國家。

word: I'm crazy about travelling.My dream is to set foot in every continent and visit at least 100 countries.

name: We dragged ourselves out of bed extremely early that morning in order to capture the sunrise over the rice terraces.

trans.cn: 那天早晨，為了拍到梯田上日出的美麗景象，我們很早就起床了。

word: We dragged ourselves out of bed extremely early that morning in order to capture the sunrise over the rice terraces.

name: By  the  time  we  got  there,there  were  already  hundreds  of  people.Everybody was waiting eagerly for the sun to come up.

trans.cn: 我們到達那裡的時候，已經有好幾百人了。大家都在熱切地等待著太陽昇起。

word: By  the  time  we  got  there,there  were  already  hundreds  of  people.Everybody was waiting eagerly for the sun to come up.

name: That was the most beautiful view I've ever seen.It really took my breath away.

trans.cn: 那是我見過的最美的風景，它美得令我窒息。

word: That was the most beautiful view I've ever seen.It really took my breath away.

name: They both have wanderlust and they've travelled all over China over the past five years.

trans.cn: 他們兩個都非常喜歡旅行，在過去的五年裡他們遊遍了整個中國。

word: They both have wanderlust and they've travelled all over China over the past five years.

name: When you're on a trip,unexpected things can happen.For example,I met my boyfriend while touring in Guilin.

trans.cn: 當你在旅途中，總有意想不到的事情發生。例如，我在桂林旅遊時遇見了我現在的男朋友。

word: When you're on a trip,unexpected things can happen.For example,I met my boyfriend while touring in Guilin.

name: Going to Phuket was the smartest decision I've ever made.It was there that I met the girl of my dreams.

trans.cn: 去普吉島是我做過的最明智的決定。正是在那裡，我遇見了我夢中的女孩。

word: Going to Phuket was the smartest decision I've ever made.It was there that I met the girl of my dreams.

name: I've been yearning to go to the Great Barrier Reef and snorkel there.

trans.cn: 我一直很想去大堡礁，去那裡浮潛。

word: I've been yearning to go to the Great Barrier Reef and snorkel there.

name: I've been longing to go skydiving in Fiji ever since our English teacher told us about his skydiving experience there.

trans.cn: 自從我們的英語老師告訴了我們他在斐濟跳傘的經歷，我就一直渴望去那裡 跳傘。

word: I've been longing to go skydiving in Fiji ever since our English teacher told us about his skydiving experience there.

name: My dad is an experienced driver,so he likes to go on long journeys by car.

trans.cn: 我爸爸是一個經驗豐富的司機，所以他喜歡長途自駕遊。

word: My dad is an experienced driver,so he likes to go on long journeys by car.

name: The main reason that we went to Sichuan is because we wanted to sample the nationally renowned food there.

trans.cn: 我們去四川的主要原因是，我們想要品嚐那裡全國聞名的食物。

word: The main reason that we went to Sichuan is because we wanted to sample the nationally renowned food there.

name: Everything we tasted lived up to our expectations.Sichuan is absolutely the best city for foodies.

trans.cn: 我們品嚐的每一種食物都沒有辜負我們的期望。四川絕對是最適合吃貨的城 市。

word: Everything we tasted lived up to our expectations.Sichuan is absolutely the best city for foodies.

name: It was a very relaxing vacation.All I did every day was just lie on the beach and bask in the sun.

trans.cn: 這是一個非常放鬆的假期，我每天所做的就是躺在沙灘上曬太陽。

word: It was a very relaxing vacation.All I did every day was just lie on the beach and bask in the sun.

name: It was when I needed to ask for directions in London that I realized that English was so important.

trans.cn: 當我在倫敦需要問路的時候，我才意識到英語是如此重要。

word: It was when I needed to ask for directions in London that I realized that English was so important.

name: I would like to be a tour guide in the future.It's always been my dream job.

trans.cn: 我希望將來能成為一名導遊。這一直是我夢寐以求的工作。

word: I would like to be a tour guide in the future.It's always been my dream job.

name: Antarctica is the ultimate tourist destination for many people.

trans.cn: 南極洲是許多人的終極旅遊目的地。

word: Antarctica is the ultimate tourist destination for many people.

name: Beijing is known for having a large number of tourist attractions that can date back hundreds or even thousands of years.

trans.cn: 北京以擁有眾多可追溯到數百年甚至數千年前的旅遊景點而聞名於世。

word: Beijing is known for having a large number of tourist attractions that can date back hundreds or even thousands of years.

name: The number of people travelling internationally has dwindled significantly due to COVID-19.

trans.cn: 由於新冠病毒，跨國旅行的人數減少了很多。

word: The number of people travelling internationally has dwindled significantly due to COVID-19.

name: Inspired by the movie Fast and Furious 5,I've always wanted to go to Rio De Janeiro.

trans.cn: 因為受到電影《速度與激情5》的影響，我一直想去里約熱內盧。

word: Inspired by the movie Fast and Furious 5,I've always wanted to go to Rio De Janeiro.

name: Seeing a completely different culture and lifestyle would be eye-opening for me.

trans.cn: 看到一種完全不同的文化和生活方式，會讓我大開眼界。

word: Seeing a completely different culture and lifestyle would be eye-opening for me.

name: An increasing number of people like to go travelling in their free time because it's a great way for them to recharge their batteries.

trans.cn: 越來越多的人喜歡在空閒時間去旅行，因為這是一種很好的放鬆休整的方式。

word: An increasing number of people like to go travelling in their free time because it's a great way for them to recharge their batteries.

name: Travelling allows  us to  get a  better  understanding  of different  cultures,traditions and lifestyles.

trans.cn: 旅行使我們能夠更好地瞭解不同的文化、傳統和生活方式。

word: Travelling allows  us to  get a  better  understanding  of different  cultures,traditions and lifestyles.

name: The ever-increasing standard of living in China means more and more people can afford to go on vacations.

trans.cn: 中國日益增長的生活水平意味著越來越多的人有能力去度假。

word: The ever-increasing standard of living in China means more and more people can afford to go on vacations.

name: People tend to have tunnel vision if they never go and see a broader world.

trans.cn: 如果人們不去看更廣闊的世界，他們往往會視野狹隘。

word: People tend to have tunnel vision if they never go and see a broader world.

name: Tourism creates jobs--many people can be employed in this field.

trans.cn: 旅遊業創造就業機會——許多人可以在該領域就業。

word: Tourism creates jobs--many people can be employed in this field.

name: We've seen people in some towns lifted out of poverty due to a growth of tourism income.

trans.cn: 我們看到一些城鎮的居民由於旅遊收入的增長而脫貧。

word: We've seen people in some towns lifted out of poverty due to a growth of tourism income.

name: I'm convinced that the business of tourism will continue to grow in the future,with the world being more and more globalized.

trans.cn: 我相信隨著世界越來越全球化，旅遊業將在未來繼續發展。

word: I'm convinced that the business of tourism will continue to grow in the future,with the world being more and more globalized.

name: Traffic in a particular place can get worse when more tourists visit there.

trans.cn: 當更多的遊客到一個地方旅遊時，那裡的交通會變得更糟。

word: Traffic in a particular place can get worse when more tourists visit there.

name: Commodity prices might increase,which creates a problem for local residents.

trans.cn: 商品價格可能上漲，這會給當地居民帶來問題。

word: Commodity prices might increase,which creates a problem for local residents.

name: All in all,the benefits of tourism far outweigh the drawbacks.

trans.cn: 總的說來，旅遊的好處遠遠大於壞處。

word: All in all,the benefits of tourism far outweigh the drawbacks.

name: The hotel that left the deepest impression on me was one on the Left Bank in Paris.

trans.cn: 給我留下最深印象的酒店是巴黎左岸的一家。

word: The hotel that left the deepest impression on me was one on the Left Bank in Paris.

name: There were quite a lot of small cafes around the hotel where I could enjoy a cup of joe and watch the world go by.

trans.cn: 酒店周圍有很多小咖啡館，我可以在那裡喝一杯咖啡，靜靜地欣賞眼前的人間美景。

word: There were quite a lot of small cafes around the hotel where I could enjoy a cup of joe and watch the world go by.

name: It wasn't a high-end,five-star hotel because when I'm on a trip,I'm normally on a tight budget;but it had all the basics.

trans.cn: 它不是一家高檔的五星級酒店，因為當我在旅行時，我的預算通常很緊張。但它具備了一家酒店該有的一切基本設施。

word: It wasn't a high-end,five-star hotel because when I'm on a trip,I'm normally on a tight budget;but it had all the basics.

name: My family and I checked into a super pricey hotel named Venetian.It was the most luxurious hotel I've ever stayed at.

trans.cn: 我和我的家人住進了一家超級昂貴的叫作“威尼斯人”的酒店。那是我住過的最豪華的酒店。

word: My family and I checked into a super pricey hotel named Venetian.It was the most luxurious hotel I've ever stayed at.

name: It has casinos,swimming pools and even a theatre.

trans.cn: 這裡有賭場、游泳池，甚至還有個劇院。

word: It has casinos,swimming pools and even a theatre.

name: That was the crummiest hotel ever!I saw two cockroaches in the shower!

trans.cn: 那是我住過的最差的酒店!我在浴室裡看見兩隻蟑螂!

word: That was the crummiest hotel ever!I saw two cockroaches in the shower!

name: A visit to the most important museum of a city gives you a better understanding of the history and culture there.

trans.cn: 參觀一個城市最重要的博物館可以讓你更好地理解那裡的歷史和文化。

word: A visit to the most important museum of a city gives you a better understanding of the history and culture there.

name: One function of museums is preserving works of art that can be hundreds or even thousands of years old.

trans.cn: 博物館的功能之一就是儲存那些有幾百年甚至幾千年歷史的藝術品。

word: One function of museums is preserving works of art that can be hundreds or even thousands of years old.

name: I had a chance to visit the Sherlock Holmes exhibition at the Museum of London.

trans.cn: 我有機會參觀了倫敦博物館的夏洛克·福爾摩斯展覽。

word: I had a chance to visit the Sherlock Holmes exhibition at the Museum of London.

name: I don't think it's a good idea that museums charge admission fees.

trans.cn: 我認為博物館不該收取入場費。

word: I don't think it's a good idea that museums charge admission fees.

name: At the end of a tour at any museum,you will usually come to a gift shop where you can buy some souvenirs.

trans.cn: 在參觀完任何博物館後，你通常會來到一個禮品店，在那裡你可以買到一些紀念品。

word: At the end of a tour at any museum,you will usually come to a gift shop where you can buy some souvenirs.

name: I used to live close to the Dinosaur Museum,so my favourite pastime was to go and wander around there.

trans.cn: 我以前住在恐龍博物館附近，所以我最喜歡的消遣是去那裡隨便逛逛。

word: I used to live close to the Dinosaur Museum,so my favourite pastime was to go and wander around there.

name: I don't know a lot about art,but I go to art galleries from time to time to pretend that I do.

trans.cn: 我不是很懂藝術，但我偶爾會去畫廊，假裝我懂。

word: I don't know a lot about art,but I go to art galleries from time to time to pretend that I do.

name: My favourite library is situated in the centre of my hometown and it's very easy to get to.

trans.cn: 我最喜歡的圖書館位於我家鄉的中心地帶，去那裡很方便。

word: My favourite library is situated in the centre of my hometown and it's very easy to get to.

name: It offers a wide array of novels,research papers,magazines and books of various other kinds.

trans.cn: 那裡有各種各樣的小說、研究論文、雜誌和很多其他種類的圖書。

word: It offers a wide array of novels,research papers,magazines and books of various other kinds.

name: The library is funded by the government,so membership fees are negligible.

trans.cn: 這個圖書館是由政府資助的，所以會員費可以忽略不計。

word: The library is funded by the government,so membership fees are negligible.

name: I used to go there regularly to check out books to read at home.

trans.cn: 我過去經常去那裡借書回家看。

word: I used to go there regularly to check out books to read at home.

name: This library has had a great influence on me since I became a member when I was only 9.I'm a big reader now partly because of this place.

trans.cn: 自從我在九歲時成了這個圖書館的會員，它對我產生了很大的影響。我現在特別喜歡閱讀，部分歸因於這個地方。

word: This library has had a great influence on me since I became a member when I was only 9.I'm a big reader now partly because of this place.

name: Another thing that I like about this library is that it provides enough space for readers to sit and read for an unlimited amount of time.

trans.cn: 我喜歡這個圖書館的另一個原因是，它為讀者提供了足夠的空間，讓他們可以坐在那裡，不受時間限制地閱讀。

word: Another thing that I like about this library is that it provides enough space for readers to sit and read for an unlimited amount of time.

name: It's indeed a treasure trove of knowledge and anyone who likes to read and learn must like this place.

trans.cn: 它確實是一個知識的寶庫，任何喜歡閱讀和學習的人肯定喜歡這個地方。

word: It's indeed a treasure trove of knowledge and anyone who likes to read and learn must like this place.

name: One of the librarians that works there is my girlfriend and I guess this is another reason why I dig this place so much.

trans.cn: 在那裡工作的圖書管理員中，有一個是我的女朋友，我想這是我如此喜歡這個地方的另一個原因。

word: One of the librarians that works there is my girlfriend and I guess this is another reason why I dig this place so much.

name: The nearest park to where l live is one called Carnation Park.

trans.cn: 離我住的地方最近的一個公園，叫康乃馨公園。

word: The nearest park to where l live is one called Carnation Park.

name: I suppose I would go there more often if it were a little bit closer to my house.

trans.cn: 我想如果它離我家更近一些，我會更常去那裡。

word: I suppose I would go there more often if it were a little bit closer to my house.

name: It's a large park with many different areas,all suited to different age groups and interests.

trans.cn: 這是一個很大的公園，有許多不同的區域，適合不同年齡段和不同興趣的群體。

word: It's a large park with many different areas,all suited to different age groups and interests.

name: There are a few tennis courts where people can play tennis as long as they book in advance.

trans.cn: 這裡有幾個網球場，人們只要提前預訂就可以在那裡打網球。

word: There are a few tennis courts where people can play tennis as long as they book in advance.

name: I remember having a lot of fun there when I was a kid--running aimlessly and playing hide-and-seek with my little friends.

trans.cn: 我記得當我還是個孩子的時候在那裡玩得很開心——漫無目的地奔跑，和小夥伴們玩捉迷藏。

word: I remember having a lot of fun there when I was a kid--running aimlessly and playing hide-and-seek with my little friends.

name: Whenever I feel down,I just go there alone and take a saunter around the lake.

trans.cn: 每當我感到沮喪的時候，我就獨自去那裡，在湖邊散步。

word: Whenever I feel down,I just go there alone and take a saunter around the lake.

name: I really like this park because it's serene and has a relaxed atmosphere.

trans.cn: 我非常喜歡這個公園，因為它很寧靜，而且氣氛很輕鬆。

word: I really like this park because it's serene and has a relaxed atmosphere.

name: It's a wonderful place for me to sit and reflect on my life.

trans.cn: 這是一個可以讓我坐下來、思考人生的好地方。

word: It's a wonderful place for me to sit and reflect on my life.

name: Parks are vital in a city because they're where people do exercise,socialize and play with their children.

trans.cn: 在城市裡，公園是至關重要的，因為公園是人們鍛鍊、交際和陪孩子玩耍的地方。

word: Parks are vital in a city because they're where people do exercise,socialize and play with their children.

name: I have a wide circle of acquaintances,but there are only a few people who l consider to be my true friends.

trans.cn: 我認識的人很多，但我只把少數幾個當作真正的朋友。

word: I have a wide circle of acquaintances,but there are only a few people who l consider to be my true friends.

name: Linda is one of my closest friends and we've known each other since we were kids.

trans.cn: 琳達是我最親密的朋友之一，我們從小就認識。

word: Linda is one of my closest friends and we've known each other since we were kids.

name: I often go travelling with Tom,who is a very good friend of mine,because we both love exploring places and taking photos.

trans.cn: 我經常和我的好朋友Tom 一起去旅行，因為我們都喜歡探索和攝影。

word: I often go travelling with Tom,who is a very good friend of mine,because we both love exploring places and taking photos.

name: The first time I met her was when I was in high school.We chatted with each other for a while and hit it off immediately.

trans.cn: 我第一次見到她是在我上高中的時候。我們聊了一會兒， 一見如故。

word: The first time I met her was when I was in high school.We chatted with each other for a while and hit it off immediately.

name: He was a friend of a friend,and we struck up a friendship at a party.

trans.cn: 他是一個朋友的朋友，我們在一個聚會上認識併成為朋友。

word: He was a friend of a friend,and we struck up a friendship at a party.

name: We were  introduced  by  a  mutual friend,and  right  after we  began talking with each other,we found that we had a lot in common.

trans.cn: 我們是由一個共同好友介紹的，在開始交談之後，我們發現我們有很多共同之處。

word: We were  introduced  by  a  mutual friend,and  right  after we  began talking with each other,we found that we had a lot in common.

name: Most of my classmates and I get along perfectly.We often hang out and have fun together.

trans.cn: 我和我的大多數同學相處得很好，我們經常在一起玩。

word: Most of my classmates and I get along perfectly.We often hang out and have fun together.

name: We are birds of a feather and so have many similar interests.

trans.cn: 我們志同道合，所以有許多相似的愛好。

word: We are birds of a feather and so have many similar interests.

name: Xiao Ming is not on the same wavelength as me.We always have different opinions on things.

trans.cn: 小明和我志趣不相投。我們對事物總是有不同的看法。

word: Xiao Ming is not on the same wavelength as me.We always have different opinions on things.

name: Jamie and I had a major falling out back in high school.Fortunately,we made up later.

trans.cn: 傑米和我在高中時曾大吵了一架。幸運的是，我們後來和好了。

word: Jamie and I had a major falling out back in high school.Fortunately,we made up later.

name: It's sad that some people have fair-weather friends.I used to have some too.Thankfully,I don't anymore.

trans.cn: 有些人有不能共患難的朋友，這很令人遺憾。我以前也有一些，不過幸好，我現在沒有了。

word: It's sad that some people have fair-weather friends.I used to have some too.Thankfully,I don't anymore.

name: My closest pal is studying in the UK now,and we use WeChat to keep in touch with each other.

trans.cn: 我最親密的朋友現在正在英國學習，我們用微信和彼此保持聯絡。

word: My closest pal is studying in the UK now,and we use WeChat to keep in touch with each other.

name: To me,my mom is my best friend.I really enjoy her company when I feel down.

trans.cn: 對我來說，我的媽媽是我最好的朋友。當我情緒低落的時候，我真的很喜歡她的陪伴。

word: To me,my mom is my best friend.I really enjoy her company when I feel down.

name: Chris and I go way back.I've always wondered how he's been able to read so many books and become so knowledgeable

trans.cn: 克里斯和我認識很久了。我一直在想，他怎麼能讀那麼多書、變得如此博學。

word: Chris and I go way back.I've always wondered how he's been able to read so many books and become so knowledgeable

name: Some of my childhood friends and I have already drifted apart.

trans.cn: 我兒時的一些朋友和我已經逐漸疏遠了。

word: Some of my childhood friends and I have already drifted apart.

name: I'm very lucky in that I've met some very good teachers over the years.

trans.cn: 我很幸運，這些年我遇到了一些很好的老師。

word: I'm very lucky in that I've met some very good teachers over the years.

name: Mr.Zhang was an extraordinary teacher and he had a huge influence on both my studies and my life.

trans.cn: 張老師是一位傑出的老師，他對我的學習和生活都產生了巨大的影響。

word: Mr.Zhang was an extraordinary teacher and he had a huge influence on both my studies and my life.

name: She was a mentor to me.She guided me through my hardest times.

trans.cn: 她是我的人生導師。她引導我度過了最艱難的時期。

word: She was a mentor to me.She guided me through my hardest times.

name: What made Mr.Li stand out was his keen sense of humour.He was so funny and always passionate.

trans.cn: 讓李老師極為出眾的是他的幽默感。他非常有趣，總是充滿激情。

word: What made Mr.Li stand out was his keen sense of humour.He was so funny and always passionate.

name: My primary school teachers were strict and caring at the same time.

trans.cn: 我的小學老師們都很嚴格，同時也很關心體貼。

word: My primary school teachers were strict and caring at the same time.

name: What set Ms.Liu apart from other teachers was the fact that she knew much more than she was required to teach.

trans.cn: 令劉老師與其他老師不同的是，她知道的東西遠遠多於她需要教的。

word: What set Ms.Liu apart from other teachers was the fact that she knew much more than she was required to teach.

name: All of the English teachers I had were female,and they were all fashionable and beautiful.

trans.cn: 我所有的英語老師都是女性，她們都很時尚、漂亮。

word: All of the English teachers I had were female,and they were all fashionable and beautiful.

name: He had a unique way of teaching.He was always able to make complicated matters seem easy.

trans.cn: 他有一種獨特的教學方法。他總能化繁為簡。

word: He had a unique way of teaching.He was always able to make complicated matters seem easy.

name: It was Ms.Wang who sparked my interest in history.I'm still very interested in learning it now.

trans.cn: 是王老師激發了我對歷史的興趣。我現在仍然很喜歡學習歷史。

word: It was Ms.Wang who sparked my interest in history.I'm still very interested in learning it now.

name: Some of the most important qualities for a good teacher should be passion, knowledge,leadership and classroom management.

trans.cn: 對一個好老師來說，最重要的一些品質應該是熱情、學識、領導力和課堂管理能力。

word: Some of the most important qualities for a good teacher should be passion, knowledge,leadership and classroom management.

name: I don't think impatient people can be good teachers.

trans.cn: 我不覺得沒有耐心的人可以成為好老師。

word: I don't think impatient people can be good teachers.

name: Teachers don't just impart knowledge;it's more important that they teach students how to think and gain knowledge by themselves.

trans.cn: 教師不僅傳授知識，更重要的是教會學生如何獨立思考和自己獲取知識。

word: Teachers don't just impart knowledge;it's more important that they teach students how to think and gain knowledge by themselves.

name: Good teachers should be good listeners.They should take time to listen to how kids feel about certain things.

trans.cn: 好老師應該是好聽眾。他們應該花時間去傾聽孩子們對某些事情的感受。

word: Good teachers should be good listeners.They should take time to listen to how kids feel about certain things.

name: Students look up to their teachers and see them as role models.

trans.cn: 學生們尊敬老師，視他們為榜樣。

word: Students look up to their teachers and see them as role models.

name: Although the government has been working to change it,many American teachers are still underpaid.

trans.cn: 雖然美國政府一直在努力改變這一情況，但很多美國教師的工資依然很低。

word: Although the government has been working to change it,many American teachers are still underpaid.

name: My favourite piece of furniture is a leather chair that sits in my living room.

trans.cn: 我最喜歡的一件傢俱是客廳裡的一把皮椅。

word: My favourite piece of furniture is a leather chair that sits in my living room.

name: I placed it in a perfect position for sunshine and ventilation.

trans.cn: 我把它放在了一個光線和通風都極好的位置。

word: I placed it in a perfect position for sunshine and ventilation.

name: I enjoy sitting in this chair and doing some reading when I have time on my hands.

trans.cn: 當我有時間的時候，我喜歡坐在這把椅子上看看書。

word: I enjoy sitting in this chair and doing some reading when I have time on my hands.

name: What I like is a folding chair.I dig it because I can easily put it away and out of sight when I'm not using it.

trans.cn: 我喜歡的是一把摺疊椅。我喜歡它因為當我不用它的時候，我可以很容易地 把它收起來放在一邊。

word: What I like is a folding chair.I dig it because I can easily put it away and out of sight when I'm not using it.

name: My wardrobe is big and has five drawers.I have all my dresses and skirts organized in the top two drawers.

trans.cn: 我的衣櫃很大，有五個抽屜。我把我所有的連衣裙和短裙都放在了最上面的兩個抽屜裡。

word: My wardrobe is big and has five drawers.I have all my dresses and skirts organized in the top two drawers.

name: This is a good-looking wardrobe and it's in keeping with all my other furniture,which makes me like it even more.

trans.cn: 這是一個漂亮的衣櫃，它與我其他的傢俱風格協調一致，這讓我更喜歡它了。

word: This is a good-looking wardrobe and it's in keeping with all my other furniture,which makes me like it even more.

name: The piece of furniture I use the most in my apartment is my writing desk, which has been in my family's possession for decades.

trans.cn: 我家裡使用最多的傢俱是我的寫字檯，它在我家已經有幾十年了。

word: The piece of furniture I use the most in my apartment is my writing desk, which has been in my family's possession for decades.

name: Although it doesn't look very valuable,the desk is actually a family heirloom.My dad inherited it from his dad,my grandfather.

trans.cn: 雖然它看起來不是很貴重，但這張桌子實際上是一個傳家寶。我父親從他父親、也就是我的祖父那裡繼承了它。

word: Although it doesn't look very valuable,the desk is actually a family heirloom.My dad inherited it from his dad,my grandfather.

name: I like my coffee table because it's where I place my coffee.I love having a cup of Joe there every morning.

trans.cn: 我喜歡我的茶几，因為那是我放咖啡的地方。我喜歡每天早上在那裡喝一杯咖啡。

word: I like my coffee table because it's where I place my coffee.I love having a cup of Joe there every morning.

name: My dad is just like Sheldon,the main character on the hit show The Big Bang Theory.He has his own spot on our couch.

trans.cn: 我爸爸和熱門劇《生活大爆炸》的主角謝爾頓一樣，他在我們家的沙發上有他自己的位置。

word: My dad is just like Sheldon,the main character on the hit show The Big Bang Theory.He has his own spot on our couch.

name: I'd like to talk about my smartphone,which is a Samsung phone.It's slim and black in colour and looks indeed very smart.

trans.cn: 我想談談我的智慧手機，它是一部三星手機。它很輕薄，機身是黑色的，看起來確實很時髦。

word: I'd like to talk about my smartphone,which is a Samsung phone.It's slim and black in colour and looks indeed very smart.

name: This phone features the best camera in the smartphone industry.I love it that I can take stunning photos with it.

trans.cn: 這款手機的相機在行業中是最好的。它能拍出很棒的照片，我很喜歡這一點。

word: This phone features the best camera in the smartphone industry.I love it that I can take stunning photos with it.

name: I can use my phone to stay in touch with my friends and family through text messages and calls.

trans.cn: 我可以用手機透過簡訊和電話和我的朋友和家人保持聯絡。

word: I can use my phone to stay in touch with my friends and family through text messages and calls.

name: It allows me to access the internet,so I can constantly be updated on what's happening around the world.

trans.cn: 我能用它上網，所以我可以不斷地瞭解到世界上的最新訊息。

word: It allows me to access the internet,so I can constantly be updated on what's happening around the world.

name: I can do anything on this phone,so it's an integral part of my life now.

trans.cn: 我可以在這部手機上做任何事情，所以它成了我生活中不可或缺的一部分。

word: I can do anything on this phone,so it's an integral part of my life now.

name: My favourite electronic device is my laptop.I'm not exaggerating by saying that I can't live without it.

trans.cn: 我最喜歡的電子裝置是我的膝上型電腦。我毫不誇張地說，我的生活不能沒有它。

word: My favourite electronic device is my laptop.I'm not exaggerating by saying that I can't live without it.

name: I like to use it to watch some stand-up comedy every night before hitting the sack.

trans.cn: 我喜歡每天晚上睡覺前在電腦上看一些單口喜劇。

word: I like to use it to watch some stand-up comedy every night before hitting the sack.

name: I'm a voracious reader and  I consider my Kindle to be one of the most important things to me.

trans.cn: 我是一個極度喜歡讀書的人，我把我的Kindle當作我最重要的東西之一。

word: I'm a voracious reader and  I consider my Kindle to be one of the most important things to me.

name: It looks good and is very portable.I can even slip it into one of my jacket pockets.

trans.cn: 它看起來很不錯，而且很便攜。我甚至可以把它塞進我的夾克口袋裡。

word: It looks good and is very portable.I can even slip it into one of my jacket pockets.

name: This device allows me to take notes while reading,so there's always something I can refer back to after I've read a chapter or a few pages.

trans.cn: 這個裝置可以讓我在閱讀的時候做筆記，所以在我讀了一章或幾頁之後，我總是有些東西可以回看、參考。

word: This device allows me to take notes while reading,so there's always something I can refer back to after I've read a chapter or a few pages.

name: I can have access to a large number of books and other reading materials wherever I am.

trans.cn: 不管我在哪裡，我都能獲得大量的圖書和其他閱讀材料。

word: I can have access to a large number of books and other reading materials wherever I am.

name: In my opinion,men tend to be more obsessed with gadgets than women.

trans.cn: 在我看來，男人往往比女人更迷戀電子產品。

word: In my opinion,men tend to be more obsessed with gadgets than women.

name: They always want to get hold of the latest model of a smartphone and try out its new functions.

trans.cn: 他們總是想得到最新型號的智慧手機，嘗試新的功能。

word: They always want to get hold of the latest model of a smartphone and try out its new functions.

name: Women generally see an electronic item as something practical,whereas men regard it as a plaything.

trans.cn: 女人通常把電子產品視為實用的工具，而男人則視之為可供消遣的玩物。

word: Women generally see an electronic item as something practical,whereas men regard it as a plaything.

name: Advances in mobile technology have transformed how we access news and gain knowledge.

trans.cn: 移動技術的發展徹底改變了我們獲取新聞和知識的方式。

word: Advances in mobile technology have transformed how we access news and gain knowledge.

name: A large proportion of young people today spend most of their free time on social media.

trans.cn: 如今，很大比例的年輕人把大部分的空閒時間花在社交媒體上。

word: A large proportion of young people today spend most of their free time on social media.

name: They're constantly checking to see if their posts have been liked or shared.

trans.cn: 他們總是去檢視自己的帖子是否被點贊或分享。

word: They're constantly checking to see if their posts have been liked or shared.

name: It's okay if we spend some time in the virtual world every day,but we should avoid being lost in it.

trans.cn: 如果我們每天只是在虛擬世界中花費一些時間，那是可以的，但是我們應該避免迷失其中。

word: It's okay if we spend some time in the virtual world every day,but we should avoid being lost in it.

name: Artificial intelligence is developing at a rapid speed.

trans.cn: 人工智慧正在飛速發展。

word: Artificial intelligence is developing at a rapid speed.

name: Some people are rather pessimistic about the future of an electronic world,claiming that humans will be ruled by devices.

trans.cn: 有些人對電子世界的未來相當悲觀，聲稱人類將被電子裝置所統治。

word: Some people are rather pessimistic about the future of an electronic world,claiming that humans will be ruled by devices.

name: One of the games I used to play as a child was chess.I loved that fact that I could always outwit other kids at this game.

trans.cn: 我小時候經常玩的一個遊戲是象棋。我特別喜歡在下棋時總能智勝其他孩 子的感覺。

word: One of the games I used to play as a child was chess.I loved that fact that I could always outwit other kids at this game.

name: I remember being on top of the world when my dad told me that he had bought me a chess set as a birthday gift.

trans.cn: 我記得當爸爸告訴我他給我買了一副國際象棋作為生日禮物時，我非常開心。

word: I remember being on top of the world when my dad told me that he had bought me a chess set as a birthday gift.

name: One of the most important things I learned from playing chess is to be patient.

trans.cn: 我從下棋中學到的最重要的事情之一就是要有耐心。

word: One of the most important things I learned from playing chess is to be patient.

name: "Truth or Dare"has been my favourite game since high school.

trans.cn: “真心話大冒險”是我高中以來最喜歡的遊戲。

word: "Truth or Dare"has been my favourite game since high school.

name: I like to dare my friends to go out into the street and sing opera.

trans.cn: 我喜歡讓我的朋友們去街上唱歌劇。(大冒險的專案)

word: I like to dare my friends to go out into the street and sing opera.

name: One secret I revealed was that I was having a crush on a girl who was sitting right next to me during the game.

trans.cn: 我透露過的一個秘密是，我特別喜歡當時玩遊戲時坐在我旁邊的那個女孩。

word: One secret I revealed was that I was having a crush on a girl who was sitting right next to me during the game.

name: Once,I snuck out of school to an internet bar to play my favourite game,Counter-Strike,during an English class.

trans.cn: 有一次，我在英語課上偷偷溜出學校去網咖玩我最喜歡的遊戲——《反恐精英》。

word: Once,I snuck out of school to an internet bar to play my favourite game,Counter-Strike,during an English class.

name: Our English teacher failed me in the final exam after finding out where I had been.

trans.cn: 我們的英語老師在發現我去了哪裡後，在期末考試給了我不及格的成績。

word: Our English teacher failed me in the final exam after finding out where I had been.

name: My cousin is so addicted to gaming and he can play for 10 hours straight.

trans.cn: 我的表弟很沉迷於玩遊戲，他可以連續玩上10個小時。

word: My cousin is so addicted to gaming and he can play for 10 hours straight.

name: I think games play an essential role in our lives.

trans.cn: 我認為遊戲在我們的生活中扮演著重要的角色。

word: I think games play an essential role in our lives.

name: Playing games is beneficial to children's imagination,creativity and brain development.

trans.cn: 玩遊戲對孩子的想象力、創造力和大腦發育都有好處。

word: Playing games is beneficial to children's imagination,creativity and brain development.

name: They help us unwind,bond with our friends and even enhance our operation skills.

trans.cn: 它們幫助我們放鬆，促進與朋友的感情，甚至提高我們的合作技能。

word: They help us unwind,bond with our friends and even enhance our operation skills.

name: Games teach children how to accept failures.

trans.cn: 遊戲教會孩子如何接受失敗。

word: Games teach children how to accept failures.

name: I've always believed in"All work and no play makes Jack a dull boy.

trans.cn: 我一直相信“只會用功不玩耍，聰明的孩子也變傻”。

word: I've always believed in"All work and no play makes Jack a dull boy.

name: It's quite interesting that many high-achievers at school also play some games well

trans.cn: 很有趣的是，許多成績優異的學生玩有些遊戲也玩得很好。

word: It's quite interesting that many high-achievers at school also play some games well

name: Using time effectively is absolutely very important and I think one way to do it is to make a to-do list.

trans.cn: 有效利用時間是非常重要的，我認為達成這個目的的一種方法是列一個任務清單。

word: Using time effectively is absolutely very important and I think one way to do it is to make a to-do list.

name: Planning is the key to managing your time well.Once you've made a plan, stick to it.

trans.cn: 計劃是管理好時間的關鍵。 一旦你制定了計劃，就要堅持下去。

word: Planning is the key to managing your time well.Once you've made a plan, stick to it.

name: Prioritizing tasks is equally important.The most urgent things should be done first.

trans.cn: 優先處理任務同樣重要。最緊急的事情應該先做。

word: Prioritizing tasks is equally important.The most urgent things should be done first.

name: Some people tend to procrastinate and leave things until the last minute.

trans.cn: 有些人總是喜歡拖延，把事情拖到最後一刻才做。

word: Some people tend to procrastinate and leave things until the last minute.

name: I used to put off working on every one of my essays,which resulted in getting poor grades in college.

trans.cn: 我在上大學時，寫每一篇論文都會拖延，這導致我成績很差。

word: I used to put off working on every one of my essays,which resulted in getting poor grades in college.

name: I'm terrible at time management.I always start doing my homework when it's due the next day.

trans.cn: 我的時間管理很糟糕。我總是在第二天要交作業的時候才開始做作業。

word: I'm terrible at time management.I always start doing my homework when it's due the next day.

name: I'm not good at organizing time.I've always found that deadlines are very hard to meet.

trans.cn: 我不善於分配時間，總是難以在截止日期前完成工作。

word: I'm not good at organizing time.I've always found that deadlines are very hard to meet.

name: I tend to waste a lot of time every day checking social media and going through old text messages with my friends.

trans.cn: 我每天都會浪費很多時間在刷社交軟體，以及翻看之前和朋友發的簡訊上。

word: I tend to waste a lot of time every day checking social media and going through old text messages with my friends.

name: I get anxious when I know that I'm behind schedule,and weirdly enough,that sense of anxiety makes me more productive.

trans.cn: 當我知道我的工作進度落後了，我會感到焦慮。奇怪的是，這種焦慮感讓我變得更有效率。

word: I get anxious when I know that I'm behind schedule,and weirdly enough,that sense of anxiety makes me more productive.

name: I admire those of my coworkers who are always ahead of schedule no matter what project they're working on.

trans.cn: 我欽佩我的一些同事，不管在做什麼專案，他們總是可以比預期計劃完成得快。

word: I admire those of my coworkers who are always ahead of schedule no matter what project they're working on.

name: It's necessary that we take a break once in a while to recharge so that we can go back to work more energetic and productive.

trans.cn: 我們有必要時不時休息一下，充個電，這樣我們回去工作才會精力充沛、更有效率。

word: It's necessary that we take a break once in a while to recharge so that we can go back to work more energetic and productive.

name: Some people take time management classes to learn how to use their time more wisely.

trans.cn: 有些人上時間管理課程來學習如何更合理地利用時間。

word: Some people take time management classes to learn how to use their time more wisely.

name: Time management is a lifelong job and the sooner we learn this skill,the more benefits we will get.

trans.cn: 時間管理是一項終身的工作，我們越早學會這個技能，受益就越多。

word: Time management is a lifelong job and the sooner we learn this skill,the more benefits we will get.

name: The reason why it's hard to stick to our plans is that we're often distracted by unimportant things that happen around us.

trans.cn: 很難堅持我們的計劃的原因是，我們經常為身邊發生的不重要的事情而分心。

word: The reason why it's hard to stick to our plans is that we're often distracted by unimportant things that happen around us.

name: What's crucial in teaching children how to organize their time in an effective way is parents setting good examples themselves.

trans.cn: 要教導孩子如何有效地安排時間，關鍵是家長們自己樹立好榜樣。

word: What's crucial in teaching children how to organize their time in an effective way is parents setting good examples themselves.

name: I'm taking the IELTS test so that I can go and study in the UK in order to improve my English and expand my horizons.

trans.cn: 我參加雅思考試是為了去英國學習，以提高我的英語水平，以及開闊我的視野。

word: I'm taking the IELTS test so that I can go and study in the UK in order to improve my English and expand my horizons.

name: We begin to learn English at a very young age in China,but all those years of learning don't seem to pay off.

trans.cn: 中國學生從很小的時候就開始學習英語，但是那麼多年的學習似乎收效甚微。

word: We begin to learn English at a very young age in China,but all those years of learning don't seem to pay off.

name: The reason why I fell in love with learning English is that I got hooked on English songs.

trans.cn: 我愛上學習英語的原因是我迷上了英文歌。

word: The reason why I fell in love with learning English is that I got hooked on English songs.

name: Watching English movies and TV shows is a great way to learn words and sentence structures used in everyday conversation.

trans.cn: 看英語電影和電視節目是學習日常對話中使用的詞彙和句型結構的好方法。

word: Watching English movies and TV shows is a great way to learn words and sentence structures used in everyday conversation.

name: Taylor has taught me a large number of idioms and slang words.

trans.cn: 泰勒教了我大量的習語和俚語。

word: Taylor has taught me a large number of idioms and slang words.

name: It's best to have someone from an English-speaking country to talk with on a regular basis.

trans.cn: 最好可以定期與英語母語者進行溝通練習。

word: It's best to have someone from an English-speaking country to talk with on a regular basis.

name: There's a cafe in my city which many foreigners like to frequent.I go there from time to time to interact with them to practise my English.

trans.cn: 在我的城市裡有一家許多外國人喜歡光顧的咖啡館。我偶爾會去那裡和他們互動交流，練習我的英語。

word: There's a cafe in my city which many foreigners like to frequent.I go there from time to time to interact with them to practise my English.

name: English has no standard form.There are many different accents,which can vary greatly.

trans.cn: 英語沒有標準形式。有許多不同的口音，差別很大。

word: English has no standard form.There are many different accents,which can vary greatly.

name: English is a mandatory subject at school in many countries.

trans.cn: 英語在許多國家的學校裡都是一門必修課。

word: English is a mandatory subject at school in many countries.

name: Our English learning mainly focuses on analyzing grammar and memorizing vocabulary rather than speaking and listening.

trans.cn: 我們的英語學習主要關注分析語法和記憶單詞，而不是說和聽。

word: Our English learning mainly focuses on analyzing grammar and memorizing vocabulary rather than speaking and listening.

name: With globalization taking place at such a fast speed,English has become more and more important for international communication.
