trans.cn: 隨著全球化的飛速發展，英語對於國際交流來說變得越來越重要。

word: With globalization taking place at such a fast speed,English has become more and more important for international communication.

name: It's essential for people from all over the world to have a lingua franca to communicate with each other.

trans.cn: 對於來自世界各地的人們來說，有一種通用語言來互相交流是很重要的。

word: It's essential for people from all over the world to have a lingua franca to communicate with each other.

name: An increasing number of Chinese students are studying abroad,and being able to speak English well is a must for them.

trans.cn: 越來越多的中國學生到國外留學，能說一口流利的英語對他們來說是必須的。

word: An increasing number of Chinese students are studying abroad,and being able to speak English well is a must for them.

name: Misunderstandings may occur when people can't converse with each other properly.

trans.cn: 當人們不能準確地在交談中表達想法時，可能會產生誤解。

word: Misunderstandings may occur when people can't converse with each other properly.

name: Every time I travel somewhere,I try to learn a bit of the local language.

trans.cn: 每次我去某個地方旅行，我都努力去學習一些當地的語言。

word: Every time I travel somewhere,I try to learn a bit of the local language.

name: It allows me to integrate with the locals better,and therefore have a more enjoyable trip.

trans.cn: 它使我能更好地融入當地人，從而享受一次更愉快的旅行。

word: It allows me to integrate with the locals better,and therefore have a more enjoyable trip.

name: Trying to grasp another language helps people gain a better understanding of another culture.

trans.cn: 努力去掌握另一種語言有助於人們更好地理解另一種文化。

word: Trying to grasp another language helps people gain a better understanding of another culture.

name: More and more people are bilingual and even multilingual now.

trans.cn: 現在越來越多的人會說兩種語言，甚至多種語言。

word: More and more people are bilingual and even multilingual now.

name: If someone can only speak their mother tongue,they will find it hard to survive in today's world.

trans.cn: 如果有人只會說他們自己的母語，他們會發現在當今世界生存非常困難。

word: If someone can only speak their mother tongue,they will find it hard to survive in today's world.

name: Being able to speak more than one language gives people a competitive edge in the job market.

trans.cn: 在就業市場上，能說不止一種語言會給人們帶來競爭優勢。

word: Being able to speak more than one language gives people a competitive edge in the job market.

name: Research has shown that language learning helps develop a child's brain.

trans.cn: 研究表明，語言學習有助於開發孩子的大腦。

word: Research has shown that language learning helps develop a child's brain.

name: Children can think more logically and creatively if they start learning a foreign language at a young age.

trans.cn: 如果孩子們在很小的時候就開始學習外語，他們的思維就會更有邏輯性和創造性。

word: Children can think more logically and creatively if they start learning a foreign language at a young age.

name: It's said that language learning helps old people prevent dementia.

trans.cn: 據說語言學習可以幫助老年人預防痴呆。

word: It's said that language learning helps old people prevent dementia.

name: Mandarin is spoken by an increasing number of people around the world.

trans.cn: 世界上越來越多的人使用中文普通話。

word: Mandarin is spoken by an increasing number of people around the world.

name: With China becoming more and more influential,our language will play an increasingly bigger role on the world stage.

trans.cn: 隨著中國越來越有影響力，我們的語言將在世界舞臺上發揮越來越大的作用。

word: With China becoming more and more influential,our language will play an increasingly bigger role on the world stage.

name: Chinese has many different dialects spoken in various parts of the country.

trans.cn: 中文在全國各地有許多不同的方言。

word: Chinese has many different dialects spoken in various parts of the country.

name: Some people are worried that minority languages might disappear with English spoken in more and more countries and regions.

trans.cn: 一些人擔心，隨著越來越多的國家和地區使用英語，小語種可能會消失。

word: Some people are worried that minority languages might disappear with English spoken in more and more countries and regions.

name: It's argued by some that there's no need to have more than one language.

trans.cn: 有些人認為我們沒有必要擁有一種以上的語言。

word: It's argued by some that there's no need to have more than one language.

name: There's a risk that the cultures,traditions and lifestyles associated with those languages could die out with them.

trans.cn: 與這些語言相關的文化、傳統和生活方式可能會有消亡的危險。

word: There's a risk that the cultures,traditions and lifestyles associated with those languages could die out with them.

name: It's crucial that small languages are preserved in order to retain cultural diversity.

trans.cn: 為了保持文化的多樣性，保留小語種是至關重要的。

word: It's crucial that small languages are preserved in order to retain cultural diversity.

name: There are all kinds of advertisements today--TV commercials,billboards, posters,flyers and so forth.

trans.cn: 如今有各種各樣的廣告——電視廣告、廣告牌、海報、傳單等。

word: There are all kinds of advertisements today--TV commercials,billboards, posters,flyers and so forth.

name: My boyfriend has just opened a new cafe.He asks me to print some flyers and hand them out on the streets to spread the word.

trans.cn: 我男朋友剛開了一家新的咖啡館。他讓我列印一些傳單，然後到街上去發， 來傳播這個訊息。

word: My boyfriend has just opened a new cafe.He asks me to print some flyers and hand them out on the streets to spread the word.

name: Advertising is crucial in making a company stand out in today's competitive world.

trans.cn: 在當今競爭激烈的世界，廣告是使一家公司脫穎而出的關鍵。

word: Advertising is crucial in making a company stand out in today's competitive world.

name: Increasing brand awareness is vital for any company who wants to survive in today's market.

trans.cn: 對於任何想在今天的市場上生存下來的公司來說，提高品牌知名度是至關重要的。

word: Increasing brand awareness is vital for any company who wants to survive in today's market.

name: Some celebrities endorse products and services that they've never used.

trans.cn: 一些名人代言他們從未使用過的產品和服務。

word: Some celebrities endorse products and services that they've never used.

name: These celebrity endorsements have a huge impact on those groupies who love their idols blindly.

trans.cn: 這些明星代言會對那些盲目的追星族產生巨大的影響。

word: These celebrity endorsements have a huge impact on those groupies who love their idols blindly.

name: Most TV commercials are very annoying,and I try not to be influenced by them.I trust word of mouth more.

trans.cn: 大多數電視廣告都很煩人，我儘量不受它們的影響。我更相信口碑。

word: Most TV commercials are very annoying,and I try not to be influenced by them.I trust word of mouth more.

name: It gets on my nerves when a commercial suddenly appears when I'm watching a fascinating TV show.

trans.cn: 當我在看一個精彩的電視節目時，要是突然出現廣告，會讓我很煩。

word: It gets on my nerves when a commercial suddenly appears when I'm watching a fascinating TV show.

name: Some ads on TV are okay if they're creative,hilarious or touching.

trans.cn: 一些電視上的廣告如果有創意、搞笑或感人，也是可以接受的。

word: Some ads on TV are okay if they're creative,hilarious or touching.

name: I adore those commercials that feature catchy jingles.Some of them get stuck in my head and I just never forget the ads.

trans.cn: 我喜歡那些有朗朗上口的歌曲的廣告。其中有一些深深印在我的腦中，我永遠都不會忘記這些廣告。

word: I adore those commercials that feature catchy jingles.Some of them get stuck in my head and I just never forget the ads.

name: Just do it"is one of those successful slogans that are so simple and unique, and therefore hard to forget.

trans.cn: “Just do it”是那些成功的廣告語之一，簡單又獨特，因此很難忘記。

word: Just do it"is one of those successful slogans that are so simple and unique, and therefore hard to forget.

name: Well-written copy is essential in helping an ad spread.

trans.cn: 好的文案對於幫助廣告傳播很重要。

word: Well-written copy is essential in helping an ad spread.

name: The kind of advertising I hate the most is cold calls.It's a terrible feeling to know that my information has been somehow leaked.

trans.cn: 我最討厭的廣告方式是電話推銷。知道我的資訊被無端洩露讓我很不開心。

word: The kind of advertising I hate the most is cold calls.It's a terrible feeling to know that my information has been somehow leaked.

name: Not many companies use door-to-door sales anymore.

trans.cn: 現在沒有多少公司上門推銷產品了。

word: Not many companies use door-to-door sales anymore.

name: I  think  there  should  be  more  public  service  advertisements  on  TV  to raise  awareness  of  some  social  issues,like  air  pollution,deforestation, endangered animal species and so on.

trans.cn: 我認為電視上應該有更多的公益廣告來提高人們對一些社會問題的認識，比如空氣汙染、森林砍伐、瀕危動物等。

word: I  think  there  should  be  more  public  service  advertisements  on  TV  to raise  awareness  of  some  social  issues,like  air  pollution,deforestation, endangered animal species and so on.

name: Online advertising has been gaining great popularity these years.We see banner ads on almost any website

trans.cn: 近年來，網路廣告越來越受歡迎。在幾乎任何網站上，我們都能看到橫幅廣告。

word: Online advertising has been gaining great popularity these years.We see banner ads on almost any website

name: In my opinion,social media marketing is the best way to attract potential customers.

trans.cn: 在我看來，社交媒體營銷是吸引潛在客戶的最好方式。

word: In my opinion,social media marketing is the best way to attract potential customers.

name: Some companies have built large fan bases on social media,and this undoubtedly will lead to better profits.

trans.cn: 一些公司在社交媒體上建立了龐大的粉絲群，這無疑會帶來更好的利潤。

word: Some companies have built large fan bases on social media,and this undoubtedly will lead to better profits.

name: Some ads go viral on social networks,so people talk about them all the time.

trans.cn: 有些廣告在社交網路上迅速傳播，所以人們總是談論它們。

word: Some ads go viral on social networks,so people talk about them all the time.

name: I remember reading the classified ads section of a newspaper every day when I was a kid.I only did it for fun.

trans.cn: 我記得小時候，每天都讀報紙的分類廣告欄。我只是為了好玩。

word: I remember reading the classified ads section of a newspaper every day when I was a kid.I only did it for fun.

name: It's important for a company to place an ad somewhere after they've launched a new product.

trans.cn: 在公司推出新產品後，投放廣告是很重要的。

word: It's important for a company to place an ad somewhere after they've launched a new product.

name: It helps to inform people about the existence of a certain product or service so that they're more likely to go and purchase it.

trans.cn: 這有助於讓人們瞭解到某一產品或服務的存在，這樣的話，他們更有可能去購買它。

word: It helps to inform people about the existence of a certain product or service so that they're more likely to go and purchase it.

name: It's funny that there are countless ads everywhere and we hardly pay any attention to them

trans.cn: 有趣的是，到處都有數不清的廣告，而我們幾乎不會注意到它們。

word: It's funny that there are countless ads everywhere and we hardly pay any attention to them

name: What I like to do before making a purchase is read through all the reviews of that particular item and make my decision based on them.

trans.cn: 在購買一件商品之前，我喜歡做的事情是閱讀所有關於它的評論，並根據它們做出我的決定。

word: What I like to do before making a purchase is read through all the reviews of that particular item and make my decision based on them.

name: Positive testimonials of a product are the best way to advertise.

trans.cn: 一件產品的好評是最好的宣傳方式。

word: Positive testimonials of a product are the best way to advertise.

name: Although some people claim that they're never influenced by advertisements, I doubt it's really the case.

trans.cn: 雖然有些人聲稱他們從來不會受到廣告的影響，但我懷疑事實是否如此。

word: Although some people claim that they're never influenced by advertisements, I doubt it's really the case.

name: When people watch,see or hear a particular ad,it plants a seed in their heads and begins to affect their purchasing decisions subconsciously.

trans.cn: 當人們看到或聽到某個特定的廣告時，就會在腦海中播下一顆種子，並開始在潛意識層面影響他們的購買決定。

word: When people watch,see or hear a particular ad,it plants a seed in their heads and begins to affect their purchasing decisions subconsciously.

name: One of the most memorable advertisements I've seen was one about elephants.

trans.cn: 我看過的最令人難忘的廣告之一是一則關於大象的廣告。

word: One of the most memorable advertisements I've seen was one about elephants.

name: It was a public service ad which calls for people to stop buying ivory products.

trans.cn: 它是一則公益廣告，呼籲人們停止購買象牙製品。

word: It was a public service ad which calls for people to stop buying ivory products.

name: It left a deep impression on me because the images used were so graphic and powerful.

trans.cn: 它給我留下了深刻的印象，因為廣告中所使用的影象是如此生動有力。

word: It left a deep impression on me because the images used were so graphic and powerful.

name: There was a time when photos were only taken by cameras.It's changed significantly now.

trans.cn: 曾經只有相機才能拍照。現在有了很大的改變(手機等都可以拍照)。

word: There was a time when photos were only taken by cameras.It's changed significantly now.

name: Everyone is a photographer in this day and age.Their smartphones enable them to take high-quality photos wherever they are.

trans.cn: 當今時代，每個人都是攝影師。他們的智慧手機讓他們無論身在何處都能拍出高質量的照片。

word: Everyone is a photographer in this day and age.Their smartphones enable them to take high-quality photos wherever they are.

name: This shift from the camera to the smartphone has altered the way we record our lives.

trans.cn: 這種從照相機到智慧手機的轉變，改變了我們記錄生活的方式。

word: This shift from the camera to the smartphone has altered the way we record our lives.

name: One of my favourite gifts over the years has been an DSLR camera that my dad gave me when I turned 20.

trans.cn: 這些年來我最喜歡的禮物之一，就是我20歲時爸爸送給我的單反相機。

word: One of my favourite gifts over the years has been an DSLR camera that my dad gave me when I turned 20.

name: This camera is an item that I treasure so much because it allows me to have a record of everything I see and everywhere I go.

trans.cn: 這部相機是我非常珍愛的物品，因為它讓我能記錄下我看到的每一件東西、所到的每一個地方。

word: This camera is an item that I treasure so much because it allows me to have a record of everything I see and everywhere I go.

name: My dad is an amateur photographer and his passion is to snap photos of ancient buildings.

trans.cn: 我爸爸是一個業餘攝影師，他的愛好是拍古建築的照片。

word: My dad is an amateur photographer and his passion is to snap photos of ancient buildings.

name: We went to a 500-year-old temple in Shanxi last month and he managed to capture dozens of amazing pictures.

trans.cn: 上個月，我們去了山西一個有500年曆史的寺廟，他拍攝了許多令人讚歎的照片。

word: We went to a 500-year-old temple in Shanxi last month and he managed to capture dozens of amazing pictures.

name: Not only do I take photos,but I also like to print them out and make photo albums with them.

trans.cn: 我不僅拍照片，我還喜歡沖洗照片，將它們製作成相簿。

word: Not only do I take photos,but I also like to print them out and make photo albums with them.

name: It gives me a great feeling when I flick through an album and reminisce about the past.

trans.cn: 當我翻閱一本相簿並回憶過去時，感覺很棒。

word: It gives me a great feeling when I flick through an album and reminisce about the past.

name: I think most people are nostalgic,and so the vast majority of people adore taking pictures and looking at them.

trans.cn: 我覺得大部分人都很懷舊，所以絕大多數的人都喜歡拍照片和看照片。

word: I think most people are nostalgic,and so the vast majority of people adore taking pictures and looking at them.

name: I remember one time when I was looking at some old photos of my grandma,all those fond memories came flooding back.

trans.cn: 我記得有一次，當我看到我奶奶的一些舊照片時，所有那些美好的回憶都湧上心頭。

word: I remember one time when I was looking at some old photos of my grandma,all those fond memories came flooding back.

name: We only live one certain moment once,so by looking at photos,we sort of relive some experiences.

trans.cn: 有些特定的時刻我們只能經歷一次，所以透過看照片，我們可以重溫一些經歷。

word: We only live one certain moment once,so by looking at photos,we sort of relive some experiences.

name: I don't consider myself photogenic,so I don't like to be taken pictures of.

trans.cn: 我不認為自己很上相，所以我不喜歡被拍照。

word: I don't consider myself photogenic,so I don't like to be taken pictures of.

name: Sometimes,my girlfriend retouches some of the pictures she's taken.

trans.cn: 有時候，我女朋友會修她拍的一些照片。

word: Sometimes,my girlfriend retouches some of the pictures she's taken.

name: The retouched photos can be so different from the original ones.

trans.cn: 修過的照片和原來的照片很不一樣。

word: The retouched photos can be so different from the original ones.

name: I used to write letters a lot when I was a child as I had a pen pal back then.

trans.cn: 我在小的時候經常寫信，因為那時我有一個筆友。

word: I used to write letters a lot when I was a child as I had a pen pal back then.

name: Sometimes,I would pester my mom for a couple of hours to buy some envelopes and stamps for me.

trans.cn: 有時候，我會纏著我媽媽幾個小時，讓她給我買一些信封和郵票。

word: Sometimes,I would pester my mom for a couple of hours to buy some envelopes and stamps for me.

name: Running to the post office to mail my letters to her was one of the happiest things I did as a child.

trans.cn: 跑到郵局寄信給她是我小時候最快樂的事情之一。

word: Running to the post office to mail my letters to her was one of the happiest things I did as a child.

name: I remember writing a letter to a girl that I had a crush on when I was in middle school.

trans.cn: 我記得在我上中學的時候，給一個我特別喜歡的女孩寫了一封信。

word: I remember writing a letter to a girl that I had a crush on when I was in middle school.

name: In that letter,I told her that I had liked her for a long time and I hoped that she would be my girlfriend.

trans.cn: 在那封信裡，我告訴她我喜歡她很久了，我希望她能成為我的女朋友。

word: In that letter,I told her that I had liked her for a long time and I hoped that she would be my girlfriend.

name: She rejected me.

trans.cn: 她拒絕了我。

word: She rejected me.

name: One of the most important letters I've ever gotten was the admission letter from my university.

trans.cn: 我收到的最重要的一封信是我大學的錄取通知書。

word: One of the most important letters I've ever gotten was the admission letter from my university.

name: The moment I opened the envelope and saw that I had been admitted, I was on top of the world.

trans.cn: 就在我開啟信封，看到我被錄取的那一刻，我開心極了。

word: The moment I opened the envelope and saw that I had been admitted, I was on top of the world.

name: I don't write letters now because most of the time I make calls or send emails.

trans.cn: 我現在不寫信了，因為大多數時候我打電話或發郵件。

word: I don't write letters now because most of the time I make calls or send emails.

name: Writing and sending letters is extremely time-consuming compared to writing emails.

trans.cn: 和寫電子郵件相比，寫信和寄信非常耗時。

word: Writing and sending letters is extremely time-consuming compared to writing emails.

name: With the growth of instant messaging,letters are quickly losing their place.

trans.cn: 隨著即時通訊的發展，信件正在快速被取代。

word: With the growth of instant messaging,letters are quickly losing their place.

name: If it's a thank-you letter,people are more likely to write it by hand.

trans.cn: 如果是寫感謝信，人們更傾向於手寫。

word: If it's a thank-you letter,people are more likely to write it by hand.

name: One thing we can learn from letters that are hundreds of years old is the kind of lives people used to live.

trans.cn: 我們可以從幾百年前的信件中學到的一樣東西是人們過去的生活方式。

word: One thing we can learn from letters that are hundreds of years old is the kind of lives people used to live.

name: We can get a better understanding of the kind of language used in the past because language evolves over time.

trans.cn: 我們可以更好地理解過去使用的語言，因為語言是隨著時間而發展的。

word: We can get a better understanding of the kind of language used in the past because language evolves over time.

name: Handwritten letters may be completely replaced in the foreseeable future.

trans.cn: 在可預見的將來，手寫信件可能會被完全取代。

word: Handwritten letters may be completely replaced in the foreseeable future.

name: George is my all-time favourite actor.He's a terrific actor with a natural gift of depicting the characters.

trans.cn: 喬治是我一直以來最喜歡的演員。他是一個出色的演員，天生具有刻畫人物的天賦。

word: George is my all-time favourite actor.He's a terrific actor with a natural gift of depicting the characters.

name: Jennifer is an award-winning actress and well-known all over the world.

trans.cn: 詹妮弗是一位屢獲殊榮的女演員，在世界各地都很有名。

word: Jennifer is an award-winning actress and well-known all over the world.

name: Tom is so versatile that he's starred in so many different types of movies.

trans.cn: 湯姆非常多才多藝，他主演過許多不同型別的電影。

word: Tom is so versatile that he's starred in so many different types of movies.

name: This is a movie with a star-studded cast.Leonardo played a cameo role in  it.

trans.cn: 這是一部明星雲集的電影。萊昂納多在其中扮演了一個小配角。

word: This is a movie with a star-studded cast.Leonardo played a cameo role in  it.

name: Fast and Furious is my favourite movie franchise.

trans.cn: 《速度與激情》是我最喜歡的系列電影。

word: Fast and Furious is my favourite movie franchise.

name: I can't wait for the prequel to come out.

trans.cn: 我已經等不及看到它的前傳上映了。

word: I can't wait for the prequel to come out.

name: I liked the first The Man from Macao movie,but the sequel was a disaster.

trans.cn: 我喜歡第一部《澳門風雲》電影，但是它的續集簡直爛透了。

word: I liked the first The Man from Macao movie,but the sequel was a disaster.

name: People love this song because it's catchy,but more importantly,because it's uplifting.

trans.cn: 人們喜歡這首歌，因為它朗朗上口，但更重要的是，因為它能振奮人心。

word: People love this song because it's catchy,but more importantly,because it's uplifting.

name: The song tells a story about people who are trying to fulfill their dreams and realizing their dreams in the end.

trans.cn: 這首歌講述了人們努力實現自己的夢想並最終夢想成真的故事。

word: The song tells a story about people who are trying to fulfill their dreams and realizing their dreams in the end.

name: I used to put it on repeat and listen to it over and over again when I was down and depressed.

trans.cn: 過去當我情緒低落的時候，我常常把這首歌重複播放， 一遍又一遍地聽。

word: I used to put it on repeat and listen to it over and over again when I was down and depressed.

name: The lyrics of the song truly make it stand out.They're so well-written and I really like how the lines rhyme.

trans.cn: 這首歌的歌詞使整首歌尤為出色。歌詞寫得很好，我也很喜歡裡面的押韻。

word: The lyrics of the song truly make it stand out.They're so well-written and I really like how the lines rhyme.

name: It reminds me of the good old days.Every time I listen to this song,memories come flooding back to me.

trans.cn: 這讓我想起了過去的美好時光。每當我聽到這首歌，回憶就會湧上心頭。

word: It reminds me of the good old days.Every time I listen to this song,memories come flooding back to me.

name: One of my favourite songs is a lullaby that my mom used to sing to me when she was tucking me in.

trans.cn: 我最喜歡的一首歌曲，是我小時候媽媽在我睡前給我唱的搖籃曲。

word: One of my favourite songs is a lullaby that my mom used to sing to me when she was tucking me in.

name: I've been fond of it since I was a kid because it's associated with the quality time that I used to spend with my mom

trans.cn: 我從小就喜歡它，因為它總讓我想起我和媽媽共度的美好時光。

word: I've been fond of it since I was a kid because it's associated with the quality time that I used to spend with my mom

name: The guitar is a popular instrument and those who play it are seen as cool and charming

trans.cn: 吉他是一種受歡迎的樂器，大家都覺得會彈吉他的人很酷、很有魅力。

word: The guitar is a popular instrument and those who play it are seen as cool and charming

name: Watching a saxophone performance when I was   sparked my interest in this instrument.

trans.cn: 歲時觀看了一場薩克斯演奏，激發了我對這件樂器的興趣。

word: Watching a saxophone performance when I was   sparked my interest in this instrument.

name: Many girls in China are asked to learn the piano from a very young age because it's expected to make them look graceful and elegant.

trans.cn: 在中國，很多女孩從小就被要求學習鋼琴，因為這將使她們看起來優雅得體。

word: Many girls in China are asked to learn the piano from a very young age because it's expected to make them look graceful and elegant.

name: My violin was kind of like a toy for me.It was what I spent the most time on as a kid.It was my best friend.

trans.cn: 我的小提琴有點像我的玩具。我小時候在小提琴上花費了最多的時間。它曾是我 最好的朋友。

word: My violin was kind of like a toy for me.It was what I spent the most time on as a kid.It was my best friend.

name: What I love the most about the violin is the soothing sound it produces.It calms me down when I feel anxious or agitated.

trans.cn: 我最喜歡小提琴那舒緩的聲音。當我感到焦慮不安時，它會使我平靜下來。

word: What I love the most about the violin is the soothing sound it produces.It calms me down when I feel anxious or agitated.

name: Traditional instruments are part of a country's heritage and identity.

trans.cn: 傳統樂器是國家文化遺產和身份認同的一部分。

word: Traditional instruments are part of a country's heritage and identity.

name: Learning to play traditional instruments allows children to get a better understanding of their country's history and culture.

trans.cn: 學習演奏傳統樂器可以讓孩子更好地瞭解自己國家的歷史和文化。

word: Learning to play traditional instruments allows children to get a better understanding of their country's history and culture.

name: The painting I saw last weekend evoked a memory of my childhood,and I suppose that's why it left a deep impression on me.

trans.cn: 我上週末看到的這幅畫喚起了我對童年的回憶，我想這就是為什麼它給我留下了深刻印象。

word: The painting I saw last weekend evoked a memory of my childhood,and I suppose that's why it left a deep impression on me.

name: A good painting is absolutely one that you can't take your eyes off.

trans.cn: 一幅好畫會讓你目不轉睛，看個不停。

word: A good painting is absolutely one that you can't take your eyes off.

name: I don't suppose what sets a painting apart is the skill involved in painting it; instead,it should be the message it sends.

trans.cn: 我不認為使一幅畫脫穎而出的是繪畫時所用的技巧，而是它所傳達的資訊。

word: I don't suppose what sets a painting apart is the skill involved in painting it; instead,it should be the message it sends.

name: Art is a crucial subject at school because it brings out the creative side of us.

trans.cn: 美術是一個重要的學科，因為它可以激發我們有創造性的一面。

word: Art is a crucial subject at school because it brings out the creative side of us.

name: Mona Lisa,painted by Leonardo da Vinci,is the most recognized and most visited artwork in the history of art.

trans.cn: 萊昂納多·達·芬奇畫的《蒙娜麗莎》,是藝術史上最受認可、最熱門的藝術作品。

word: Mona Lisa,painted by Leonardo da Vinci,is the most recognized and most visited artwork in the history of art.

name: What fascinates me the most is her charming smile.It's beautiful,and at the same time,has lots of mysteries.

trans.cn: 最讓我著迷的是她那迷人的微笑。它很美，同時也蘊藏著很多秘密。

word: What fascinates me the most is her charming smile.It's beautiful,and at the same time,has lots of mysteries.

name: Many stage plays these days are adapted from best-selling novels in order to appeal to more young people.

trans.cn: 為了吸引更多的年輕人，現今許多舞臺劇都改編自暢銷小說。

word: Many stage plays these days are adapted from best-selling novels in order to appeal to more young people.

name: They might be adapted into movies as well.

trans.cn: 它們也可能被改編成電影。

word: They might be adapted into movies as well.

name: Their acting was impeccable.I was moved to tears several times during the play.

trans.cn: 他們的表演簡直無可挑剔。在觀劇期間，我好幾次被感動到流淚。

word: Their acting was impeccable.I was moved to tears several times during the play.

name: Traffic is horrendous in my hometown during the rush hour.

trans.cn: 在高峰期的時候，我家鄉的交通特別差。

word: Traffic is horrendous in my hometown during the rush hour.

name: I hate to be caught up in traffic for a long time,so I usually leave home early in the morning to avoid rush hour traffic.

trans.cn: 我討厭被長時間堵在路上，所以我通常早上很早出門，以避開交通高峰時段。

word: I hate to be caught up in traffic for a long time,so I usually leave home early in the morning to avoid rush hour traffic.

name: I sat in a traffic jam for two hours last weekend.To make matters worse,I had a flat tire later that day.

trans.cn: 上週末我在路上堵了兩個小時。更糟的是，那天晚些時候我的輪胎還爆了。

word: I sat in a traffic jam for two hours last weekend.To make matters worse,I had a flat tire later that day.

name: Our local government should invest in more parking spots because it's extremely hard to park in the city centre.

trans.cn: 我們的當地政府應該投資建造更多的停車位，因為在市中心停車太困難了。

word: Our local government should invest in more parking spots because it's extremely hard to park in the city centre.

name: There should be more bicycle lanes in the city so that more people can opt for this eco-friendly form of transportation.

trans.cn: 城市裡應該有更多的腳踏車道，這樣的話，更多的人就可以選擇這種環保的交通方式了。

word: There should be more bicycle lanes in the city so that more people can opt for this eco-friendly form of transportation.

name: Although it's already a lot better than before,jaywalking is still pretty common.

trans.cn: 雖然情況已經比以前好多了，但亂穿馬路的行為還是很普遍的。

word: Although it's already a lot better than before,jaywalking is still pretty common.

name: It's common to see volunteers at intersections urging people not to run red lights.

trans.cn: 在十字路口看到志願者督促人們不要闖紅燈，是很常見的。

word: It's common to see volunteers at intersections urging people not to run red lights.

name: Many people don't have the habit of buckling up when they get in the car.

trans.cn: 很多人都沒有在上車時系安全帶的習慣。

word: Many people don't have the habit of buckling up when they get in the car.

name: It was my dad who was responsible for picking me up from school when I was a child.

trans.cn: 在我小時候，是我爸爸負責接我放學。

word: It was my dad who was responsible for picking me up from school when I was a child.

name: We each drank a big cup of coffee and set off around five.

trans.cn: 我們每人都喝了一大杯咖啡，大約五點就出發了。

word: We each drank a big cup of coffee and set off around five.

name: We pulled over at least five times to take photos of the beautiful scenery along the way

trans.cn: 我們至少靠邊停車了五次，為了拍攝沿途的美景。

word: We pulled over at least five times to take photos of the beautiful scenery along the way

name: It was really annoying when others kept cutting us off.

trans.cn: 別的車總是“加塞兒”插到我們前邊，真的很煩人。

word: It was really annoying when others kept cutting us off.

name: My friends kept telling me to speed up.I never listened to them because I was being careful.

trans.cn: 我的朋友不斷告訴我要加快速度。我一直沒有聽他們的話，因為我在小心駕駛。

word: My friends kept telling me to speed up.I never listened to them because I was being careful.

name: At one point,we realized that we were going in the wrong direction.I had to make a U-turn and go back where we came.

trans.cn: 在某一時刻，我們意識到我們走錯了方向。我不得不掉頭回到我們來的地方。

word: At one point,we realized that we were going in the wrong direction.I had to make a U-turn and go back where we came.

name: Public transportation is extremely convenient in my hometown,with bus stations and subway stations in all corners of the city.

trans.cn: 在我的家鄉，公共交通非常方便，在城市的各個角落都有公交車站和地鐵站。

word: Public transportation is extremely convenient in my hometown,with bus stations and subway stations in all corners of the city.

name: The local government is working to add two more subway lines to the city.

trans.cn: 地方政府正在努力在城市裡增加兩條地鐵線路。

word: The local government is working to add two more subway lines to the city.

name: I take the express bus to work every day,which only takes me about 30 minutes to arrive.

trans.cn: 我每天坐特快公交去上班，只需要30分鐘就到了。

word: I take the express bus to work every day,which only takes me about 30 minutes to arrive.

name: We don't need cash when we take public transportation.We just swipe a card when getting on and off the bus.

trans.cn: 我們乘坐公共交通工具時不需要現金。我們只是在上車和下車時刷個卡。

word: We don't need cash when we take public transportation.We just swipe a card when getting on and off the bus.

name: They say a short commute to work is an important contributor to happiness.

trans.cn: 大家都說通勤時間短是幸福的重要因素。

word: They say a short commute to work is an important contributor to happiness.

name: Where I work is quite far from my home,and I have to transfer three times on the subway to get there.

trans.cn: 我工作的地方離我家很遠，我必須換乘三次地鐵才能到達那裡。

word: Where I work is quite far from my home,and I have to transfer three times on the subway to get there.

name: Since we have a huge population,buses tend to be overcrowded all the time.

trans.cn: 由於人口眾多，公交車總是人滿為患。

word: Since we have a huge population,buses tend to be overcrowded all the time.

name: The bus I took yesterday was jam-packed.I couldn't even reach my phone in my pocket.

trans.cn: 我昨天乘坐的公共汽車擠滿了人，我甚至連口袋裡的手機都拿不到。

word: The bus I took yesterday was jam-packed.I couldn't even reach my phone in my pocket.

name: My boyfriend asked me whether we should buy a one-way ticket or a round- trip ticket.

trans.cn: 我男朋友問我要買單程票還是往返票。

word: My boyfriend asked me whether we should buy a one-way ticket or a round- trip ticket.

name: My dad had never taken a plane before,so he was pretty nervous while going through security check,which made him look really suspicious.

trans.cn: 我爸爸以前從來沒有坐過飛機，所以他在過安檢時非常緊張，這讓他看起來很可疑。

word: My dad had never taken a plane before,so he was pretty nervous while going through security check,which made him look really suspicious.

name: There was a delay and our plane ended up arriving an hour late.

trans.cn: 飛機延誤了，我們的飛機最終晚到了一個小時。

word: There was a delay and our plane ended up arriving an hour late.

name: Flight attendants told us to wait half an hour after we had boarded the plane.

trans.cn: 在我們登機後，空乘人員告訴我們要等半小時。

word: Flight attendants told us to wait half an hour after we had boarded the plane.

name: I told my uncle my ETA so that he would know when to come to the airport to pick me up.

trans.cn: 我告訴了我叔叔我的預計到達時間，這樣他就知道什麼時候來機場接我了。

word: I told my uncle my ETA so that he would know when to come to the airport to pick me up.

name: I got stalled at the baggage claim because it took forever for my suitcase to come out.

trans.cn: 我在行李提取處被耽擱了，因為我的箱子花了很長時間才出來。

word: I got stalled at the baggage claim because it took forever for my suitcase to come out.

name: We took a red-eye flight,and we slept through the whole trip.

trans.cn: 我們乘坐的是紅眼航班，整個旅途都在睡覺。

word: We took a red-eye flight,and we slept through the whole trip.

name: It was quite uncomfortable because we didn't have enough legroom.

trans.cn: 旅途很不舒服，因為我們沒有足夠的伸腿空間。

word: It was quite uncomfortable because we didn't have enough legroom.

name: I was never a punctual person before,but now I've successfully broken myself out of the bad habit of being late all the time.

trans.cn: 我以前從來都不是一個守時的人，但是現在，我已經成功地擺脫了一直遲到 的壞習慣。

word: I was never a punctual person before,but now I've successfully broken myself out of the bad habit of being late all the time.

name: He's had a long list of impressive accomplishments as a singer in his career.

trans.cn: 在他的演唱生涯中，他取得了一長串了不起的成就。

word: He's had a long list of impressive accomplishments as a singer in his career.

name: With the help of my neighbour Uncle Zhao,I had a dramatic improvement in maths.

trans.cn: 在我的鄰居趙伯伯的幫助下，我的數學有了很大的進步。

word: With the help of my neighbour Uncle Zhao,I had a dramatic improvement in maths.

name: I've never been successful academically,but I've succeeded elsewhere.

trans.cn: 我在學術/學習上從來沒有成功過，但我在別的領域取得了成功。

word: I've never been successful academically,but I've succeeded elsewhere.

name: I've been teaching my mom how to use the computer recently.We've seen some progress,but there's still room for improvement.

trans.cn: 最近我一直在教我媽媽如何使用電腦。她已經有了一些進步，但仍有提升的空間。

word: I've been teaching my mom how to use the computer recently.We've seen some progress,but there's still room for improvement.

name: One has to persist and should never give up in order to stand out in any field.

trans.cn: 一個人想在任何領域中脫穎而出都必須堅持、永不放棄。

word: One has to persist and should never give up in order to stand out in any field.

name: What set those successful people apart from mediocre ones are endurance and the willingness to keep learning.

trans.cn: 令成功者區別於平庸者的，是持久力和不斷學習的意願。

word: What set those successful people apart from mediocre ones are endurance and the willingness to keep learning.

name: I didn't believe I could successfully cook that meal,but I pulled it off at last.

trans.cn: 我之前不相信我能成功做成那頓飯，但我最後還是成功了。

word: I didn't believe I could successfully cook that meal,but I pulled it off at last.

name: My English is still at a pretty basic level,but I'm convinced that all my hard work today will eventually pay off.

trans.cn: 我的英語仍然處於相當基礎的水平，但我相信，今天我所有的努力最終會得到回報。

word: My English is still at a pretty basic level,but I'm convinced that all my hard work today will eventually pay off.

name: The government's efforts to reduce traffic congestion are finally bearing fruit.

trans.cn: 政府減少交通堵塞的努力終於開始取得成效了。

word: The government's efforts to reduce traffic congestion are finally bearing fruit.

name: Being a pilot was my dream job when I was growing up.I take pride in the fact that this dream has come true.

trans.cn: 當一名飛行員是我兒時的夢想，我為這個夢想已經實現而感到驕傲。

word: Being a pilot was my dream job when I was growing up.I take pride in the fact that this dream has come true.

name: I was never a morning person,so I'm really proud that I can successfully roll out of bed at 5:30 every day now.

trans.cn: 我以前從來都不是早起的人，所以我很自豪我現在能每天5點30分就成功地從床上爬起來。

word: I was never a morning person,so I'm really proud that I can successfully roll out of bed at 5:30 every day now.

name: The invention of the telephone was a remarkable achievement.

trans.cn: 電話的發明是一項了不起的成就。

word: The invention of the telephone was a remarkable achievement.

name: He worked his way up from humble beginnings to become one of the most famous actors in the country.

trans.cn: 他出身平凡，但卻透過努力工作成了全國最著名的演員之一。

word: He worked his way up from humble beginnings to become one of the most famous actors in the country.

name: Personally,I believe being able to do what we enjoy is the ultimate success in life.

trans.cn: 就我個人而言，我認為能夠做我們喜歡做的事是人生的終極成功。

word: Personally,I believe being able to do what we enjoy is the ultimate success in life.

name: To my parents,having a stable job and earning a good salary is the only form of success.

trans.cn: 對我的父母來說，擁有一份穩定的工作和掙一份不錯的薪水是成功的唯一形式。

word: To my parents,having a stable job and earning a good salary is the only form of success.

name: Seeing her with a guy hand in hand dashed my hopes of going out with her.

trans.cn: 看到她和一個男人手牽手，令我想和她在一起的希望破滅了。

word: Seeing her with a guy hand in hand dashed my hopes of going out with her.

name: I was waiting for a big round of applause after the song,but it turned out that everyone just thought it was so-so.

trans.cn: 這首歌之後，我在等待大家熱烈的掌聲，但結果是大家都認為我唱得很一般。

word: I was waiting for a big round of applause after the song,but it turned out that everyone just thought it was so-so.

name: My dad often tells me that if I keep procrastinating on everything I do,my life is doomed to failure.

trans.cn: 我爸爸經常告訴我，如果我在做每件事時都拖拖拉拉，我的生活註定會失敗。

word: My dad often tells me that if I keep procrastinating on everything I do,my life is doomed to failure.

name: I was determined to eat a salad for dinner every day for at least a month,but I failed after only sticking to the plan for three days.

trans.cn: 我決定每天晚上吃沙拉，至少堅持一個月，但我只堅持了三天就失敗了。

word: I was determined to eat a salad for dinner every day for at least a month,but I failed after only sticking to the plan for three days.

name: In my view,all celebrities have the responsibility to be good role models for their followers.

trans.cn: 在我看來，所有的名人都有責任為他們的粉絲樹立好的榜樣。

word: In my view,all celebrities have the responsibility to be good role models for their followers.

name: Some people look up to their favourite actors and actresses and therefore copy everything they do.

trans.cn: 有些人崇拜他們喜愛的男女演員，因此會模仿他們所做的一切。

word: Some people look up to their favourite actors and actresses and therefore copy everything they do.

name: Some immature people think that having a glamorous life like their idols do is the biggest success in life.

trans.cn: 一些不成熟的人認為，像他們的偶像一樣擁有光鮮亮麗的生活是人生最大的 成功。

word: Some immature people think that having a glamorous life like their idols do is the biggest success in life.

name: My mom is my idol.I admire her efforts in raising my four siblings and me as well as taking care of the whole family.

trans.cn: 我媽媽是我的偶像。她非常努力地撫養了我和我的四個兄弟姐妹，並照顧整個家庭。我非常欽佩她。

word: My mom is my idol.I admire her efforts in raising my four siblings and me as well as taking care of the whole family.

name: One of my lifelong goals is to travel the world.In order for that goal to be realized,I'll have to work hard to be wealthy first

trans.cn: 我的人生目標之一是周遊世界。為了實現這一目標，我必須先努力工作變得富有。

word: One of my lifelong goals is to travel the world.In order for that goal to be realized,I'll have to work hard to be wealthy first

name: I've been itching to go paragliding ever since I saw pictures of my friend doing it.

trans.cn: 自從我看到我朋友的照片後，我就一直渴望去玩滑翔傘。

word: I've been itching to go paragliding ever since I saw pictures of my friend doing it.

name: It would be fantastic if I could have a helicopter of my own.That's a pipe dream,I know.

trans.cn: 如果我能擁有一架自己的直升機，那就太好了。我知道這是一個白日夢。

word: It would be fantastic if I could have a helicopter of my own.That's a pipe dream,I know.

name: It would be great if I could fly.In that case,I wouldn't have to worry about the rush hour traffic anymore.

trans.cn: 如果我能飛就好了。這樣的話，我就再也不用擔心高峰期的交通了。

word: It would be great if I could fly.In that case,I wouldn't have to worry about the rush hour traffic anymore.

name: It would be amazing if l could meet my all-time favourite actress,Jennifer.

trans.cn: 如果我能見到我一直以來最喜歡的女演員詹妮弗，那就太好了。

word: It would be amazing if l could meet my all-time favourite actress,Jennifer.

name: I wish I were a funnier person.I believe I would be more popular among friends.

trans.cn: 我希望自己是一個更幽默的人。那樣的話，我相信我在朋友中會更受歡迎。

word: I wish I were a funnier person.I believe I would be more popular among friends.

name: I'm extremely busy on weekdays,so I really treasure the weekend.

trans.cn: 我在工作日非常忙，所以我很珍惜週末的時間。

word: I'm extremely busy on weekdays,so I really treasure the weekend.

name: I usually have a lot on my plate on workdays,so by the time the weekend comes,I can feel a sense of relief.

trans.cn: 我通常在工作日有很多事情要做，所以到了週末的時候，我會感到如釋重負。

word: I usually have a lot on my plate on workdays,so by the time the weekend comes,I can feel a sense of relief.

name: Saturdays are usually when I spend some quality time with my folks.We just stay at home and shoot the breeze.

trans.cn: 星期六通常是我和家人一起度過美好時光的時候。我們會待在家裡，隨便聊聊天。

word: Saturdays are usually when I spend some quality time with my folks.We just stay at home and shoot the breeze.

name: I didn't use to like chatting with my parents when  I was growing  up,but things have changed a lot.I enjoy hanging out with them now.

trans.cn: 小時候，我不喜歡和父母聊天，但是事情發生了很大的變化，現在我喜歡和 他們待在一起。

word: I didn't use to like chatting with my parents when  I was growing  up,but things have changed a lot.I enjoy hanging out with them now.

name: I like to sleep in on weekends.When I finally get out of bed,it'll be time for lunch.

trans.cn: 我喜歡在週末睡懶覺。當我終於起床的時候，就該吃午飯了。

word: I like to sleep in on weekends.When I finally get out of bed,it'll be time for lunch.

name: I'd worked around the clock for three weeks,and it wasn't until last weekend that I finally had two days off.

trans.cn: 我已經連續工作了三個星期，直到上週末我才休息了兩天。

word: I'd worked around the clock for three weeks,and it wasn't until last weekend that I finally had two days off.

name: I took advantage of the two days and went on a getaway to a seaside city close to my hometown.

trans.cn: 我利用這兩天的時間，去了一個離我的家鄉很近的海濱城市。

word: I took advantage of the two days and went on a getaway to a seaside city close to my hometown.

name: All I wanted to do was just get away and totally unwind.

trans.cn: 我就是想去度個假，徹底放鬆一下。

word: All I wanted to do was just get away and totally unwind.

name: It did help me leave everything behind and forget all my usual responsibilities.

trans.cn: 它確實幫我把一切都拋在腦後，不去想平日的責任。

word: It did help me leave everything behind and forget all my usual responsibilities.

name: What I usually do on the weekend is hit the stores with my gal pals.We enjoy the time that we spend together at a mall or department store.

trans.cn: 我喜歡在週末和我的女性朋友一起去逛街。我們很喜歡在商場或百貨公司裡度過的時光。

word: What I usually do on the weekend is hit the stores with my gal pals.We enjoy the time that we spend together at a mall or department store.

name: Hitting the gym is what I often do on Saturdays as I don't have much time for it from Monday to Friday.

trans.cn: 我經常在週六去健身房，因為從週一到週五我都沒有太多時間去健身。

word: Hitting the gym is what I often do on Saturdays as I don't have much time for it from Monday to Friday.

name: 1Nothing is more relaxing and satisfying than going to the local library and immersing myself in a good book on Sunday afternoon.

trans.cn: 沒有什麼比在週日的下午去當地的圖書館，沉浸在一本好書中更讓人放鬆和滿足的了。

word: 1Nothing is more relaxing and satisfying than going to the local library and immersing myself in a good book on Sunday afternoon.

name: I believe I will have my hands full next weekend,so I won't be able to do anything fun.

trans.cn: 我相信下個週末我會很忙，所以我沒法做任何有意思的事情。

word: I believe I will have my hands full next weekend,so I won't be able to do anything fun.

name: It drove me up the wall when my boss gave me a task when I thought I could rest for a couple of days.

trans.cn: 當我以為自己馬上就可以休息幾天了的時候，我的老闆給了我一項任務，這讓我很不爽。

word: It drove me up the wall when my boss gave me a task when I thought I could rest for a couple of days.

name: I'm known among my friends as a workaholic.I work 24/7 and never take a break.

trans.cn: 我在朋友中是有名的工作狂。我永遠都在工作，從不休息。

word: I'm known among my friends as a workaholic.I work 24/7 and never take a break.

name: The vast majority of people in my hometown tend to stay at home and catch up on some television shows on weekends.

trans.cn: 我家鄉的絕大多數人週末時往往都待在家裡，補看一些之前錯過的電視節目。

word: The vast majority of people in my hometown tend to stay at home and catch up on some television shows on weekends.

name: I think this is because there are not that many leisure facilities available here.

trans.cn: 我想這是因為這裡沒有那麼多的休閒設施。

word: I think this is because there are not that many leisure facilities available here.

name: If there were  more  parks,movie theaters,and shopping centers,I  bet we wouldn't be so cooped up at home.

trans.cn: 如果有更多的公園、電影院和購物中心，我相信我們不會那麼宅。

word: If there were  more  parks,movie theaters,and shopping centers,I  bet we wouldn't be so cooped up at home.

name: Admittedly,more and more people spend their time on social media,so it doesn't make any difference if they're home or outside.

trans.cn: 誠然，越來越多的人把時間花在社交媒體上，所以他們是在家裡還是在外面沒什麼區別。

word: Admittedly,more and more people spend their time on social media,so it doesn't make any difference if they're home or outside.

name: I suppose most employers must be in favour of the idea that employees have to work on the weekend too.

trans.cn: 我想大多數僱主肯定會對員工週末也必須工作的觀點表示贊成。

word: I suppose most employers must be in favour of the idea that employees have to work on the weekend too.

name: What I think is that it's unethical that we work nonstop like machines.

trans.cn: 我認為，讓我們像機器一樣不停地工作是不道德的。

word: What I think is that it's unethical that we work nonstop like machines.

name: Exploiting employees like this wouldn't be beneficial to the general productivity of a company.

trans.cn: 像這樣剝削員工對公司的整體生產力是不利的。

word: Exploiting employees like this wouldn't be beneficial to the general productivity of a company.

name: Having a couple of days off and recharging their batteries enables people to work more effectively and efficiently when they go back to work.

trans.cn: 有幾天的假期進行休整可以讓人們在回去工作之後效果更好、效率更高。

word: Having a couple of days off and recharging their batteries enables people to work more effectively and efficiently when they go back to work.

name: In my view,weekends are much more important than ever before because we're a lot busier on weekdays than previous generations.

trans.cn: 在我看來，週末比以往任何時候都重要，因為比起上幾代人，我們在工作日忙得多。

word: In my view,weekends are much more important than ever before because we're a lot busier on weekdays than previous generations.

name: Those  who  are  their  own  bosses  don't  attach  so  much  importance  to weekends because they can decide when to take a rest themselves.

trans.cn: 那些自己當老闆的人並不那麼重視週末，因為他們可以自己決定什麼時候休息。

word: Those  who  are  their  own  bosses  don't  attach  so  much  importance  to weekends because they can decide when to take a rest themselves.

name: Not so much attention was paid to relaxation before because people had to work extremely hard every day to make a living.

trans.cn: 以前人們不太注意放鬆，因為人們必須每天努力工作以維持生計。

word: Not so much attention was paid to relaxation before because people had to work extremely hard every day to make a living.

name: Now that our standard of living has improved greatly,we're beginning to focus on enjoyment in our lives.

trans.cn: 現在我們的生活水平有了很大的提高，我們開始關注生活中的樂趣。

word: Now that our standard of living has improved greatly,we're beginning to focus on enjoyment in our lives.

name: This can be seen in the numbers of Chinese tourists in all those major tourist destinations.

trans.cn: 這可以從所有主要旅遊目的地的中國遊客數量中看出來。

word: This can be seen in the numbers of Chinese tourists in all those major tourist destinations.

name: Many of those who lived through really hard times are able to enjoy their golden years now.

trans.cn: 許多經歷過艱難困苦的人，現在都能很好地享受他們的晚年時光了。

word: Many of those who lived through really hard times are able to enjoy their golden years now.

name: Square dancing is a popular way for older people to relax,socialize and have fun in China.

trans.cn: 廣場舞是老年人放鬆、社交、娛樂的一種流行方式。

word: Square dancing is a popular way for older people to relax,socialize and have fun in China.

name: I've just graduated from university,so I don't make much money now.In fact,I'm barely scraping by.

trans.cn: 我剛從大學畢業，所以現在掙的錢不多。事實上，我只是勉強度日。

word: I've just graduated from university,so I don't make much money now.In fact,I'm barely scraping by.

name: I don't know what came over me!I splurged on an iPhone 12 last week,which is literally the same as my old iPhone X!

trans.cn: 我不知道我怎麼了!上週，我花重金買了一臺iPhone12,它和我原來的iPhone X完全一樣!

word: I don't know what came over me!I splurged on an iPhone 12 last week,which is literally the same as my old iPhone X!

name: When I told my parents that I was going travelling for a month after graduation, they totally supported me and said that they would pay for everything!

trans.cn: 當我告訴父母我畢業後要去旅遊一個月的時候，他們完全支援我，並說他們會支付一切費用!

word: When I told my parents that I was going travelling for a month after graduation, they totally supported me and said that they would pay for everything!

name: In order to buy the gift,I scrimped and saved for 3 months.

trans.cn: 為了買這個禮物，我精打細算，攢了3個月的錢。

word: In order to buy the gift,I scrimped and saved for 3 months.

name: I'm not a millionaire,so every time I hit the stores for something,I have to shop around for a while to find the best deal.

trans.cn: 我不是百萬富翁，所以每次我去商店買東西的時候，我都要貨比三家一段時 間才能用最划算的價錢買到我想要的東西。

word: I'm not a millionaire,so every time I hit the stores for something,I have to shop around for a while to find the best deal.

name: The best investment my family has ever made was when we shelled out three million RMB for the apartment we are living in.

trans.cn: 我家所做過的最好的投資，就是花300萬人民幣買了我們現在住的公寓。

word: The best investment my family has ever made was when we shelled out three million RMB for the apartment we are living in.

name: Our English teacher's birthday was around the corner,so we all chipped in to buy her a new bike.

trans.cn: 我們英語老師的生日快到了，所以我們一起湊錢給她買了一輛新腳踏車。

word: Our English teacher's birthday was around the corner,so we all chipped in to buy her a new bike.

name: One of my worst shopping experiences was when I got ripped off when I was buying a luxury bag.

trans.cn: 有一次我買一個名牌包的時候被宰了，那是我最糟糕的購物經歷之一。

word: One of my worst shopping experiences was when I got ripped off when I was buying a luxury bag.

name: People who are financially savvy know that they need to have an emergency fund.

trans.cn: 懂得理財的人知道，他們需要一筆應急資金(以備不時之需)。

word: People who are financially savvy know that they need to have an emergency fund.

name: Some people try to grow their finances by putting money in the stock market.I think that's a little risky.

trans.cn: 有些人試圖透過把錢投入股市來增加他們的財富。我覺得這有點冒險。

word: Some people try to grow their finances by putting money in the stock market.I think that's a little risky.

name: I was taught by my parents at a young age to set aside money every week so that I could buy what I wanted later.

trans.cn: 我的父母在我很小的時候就開始教我每週存錢，這樣我以後就可以買我想要的東西了。

word: I was taught by my parents at a young age to set aside money every week so that I could buy what I wanted later.

name: My mom worked two jobs in order to fund my university education.

trans.cn: 為了供我上大學，我媽媽做了兩份工。

word: My mom worked two jobs in order to fund my university education.

name: Although that necklace for my girlfriend cost a pretty penny,I was really happy that she said it was the best gift she'd ever received.

trans.cn: 雖然給我女朋友的那條項鍊花了一大筆錢，但我很高興，因為她說這是收到過的最好的禮物。

word: Although that necklace for my girlfriend cost a pretty penny,I was really happy that she said it was the best gift she'd ever received.

name: My uncle told me that he had paid top dollar for that Transformer and so I had to treasure it.

trans.cn: 我叔叔告訴我他花了很多錢買那個變形金剛，所以我必須珍惜它。

word: My uncle told me that he had paid top dollar for that Transformer and so I had to treasure it.

name: My dream job?Well,everybody says I'm a terrific singer,so I guess I'll just try to cash in on that.

trans.cn: 我理想中的工作?每個人都說我是一個很棒的歌手，所以我覺得我需要好好利用我這個能力。

word: My dream job?Well,everybody says I'm a terrific singer,so I guess I'll just try to cash in on that.

name: One way to save money is to buy second-hand items from thrift shops.

trans.cn: 省錢的一個方法就是從舊貨店買二手物品。

word: One way to save money is to buy second-hand items from thrift shops.

name: Whenever there's a promotion at the nearest supermarket,my mom goes there and stocks up.

trans.cn: 每當離我們家最近的那個超市有促銷活動，我媽媽就會去那裡囤貨。

word: Whenever there's a promotion at the nearest supermarket,my mom goes there and stocks up.

name: I used to run a small bookstore,but it went under.

trans.cn: 我曾經經營一家小書店，但它倒閉了。

word: I used to run a small bookstore,but it went under.

name: Although online shopping is becoming increasingly popular these days,I don't suppose brick-and-mortar stores will completely disappear.

trans.cn: 雖然現在網上購物越來越流行，但我不認為實體店會完全消失。

word: Although online shopping is becoming increasingly popular these days,I don't suppose brick-and-mortar stores will completely disappear.

name: When shopping for clothes,everyone wants to try them on before deciding whether to buy them or not.

trans.cn: 買衣服的時候，每個人都想試穿一下，然後再決定是否要買。

word: When shopping for clothes,everyone wants to try them on before deciding whether to buy them or not.

name: I'm lucky to have a mom who's obsessive with cleanliness.She's always doing housework,which means I don't have to do anything.

trans.cn: 我很幸運，有個有潔癖的媽媽。她總是在做家務，這意味著我什麼都不用做。

word: I'm lucky to have a mom who's obsessive with cleanliness.She's always doing housework,which means I don't have to do anything.

name: My  parents  and  I  do  some  chores  together  every  weekend.It's  an opportunity for us to bond.

trans.cn: 我和父母每週末都一起做家務。這是我們增進感情的機會。

word: My  parents  and  I  do  some  chores  together  every  weekend.It's  an opportunity for us to bond.

name: I remember earning one yuan every time I helped sweep the floor when I Was a kid.

trans.cn: 我記得小的時候，我每一次幫忙掃地，都能掙一元錢。

word: I remember earning one yuan every time I helped sweep the floor when I Was a kid.

name: It's weird that doing the dishes has grown on me.It feels pretty good when l dip my hands in soapy water and clean all those bowls and plates.

trans.cn: 很奇怪，我開始喜歡上洗碗了。當我把手浸在肥皂水裡洗乾淨所有的碗和盤子時，感覺特別好。

word: It's weird that doing the dishes has grown on me.It feels pretty good when l dip my hands in soapy water and clean all those bowls and plates.

name: I don't like it when I'm asked to do the laundry.It's too much effort.

trans.cn: 我不喜歡別人叫我洗衣服。這太費力了。

word: I don't like it when I'm asked to do the laundry.It's too much effort.

name: It's not uncommon for children in China to have never done any housework.

trans.cn: 在中國，孩子們從來沒有做過家務的情況很常見。

word: It's not uncommon for children in China to have never done any housework.

name: They're either too spoilt or too busy with schoolwork.

trans.cn: 他們要麼是被寵壞了，要麼是忙於學習。

word: They're either too spoilt or too busy with schoolwork.

name: I believe helping around the house allows children to develop a sense of responsibility and independence,which will be crucial to them when they grow up.

trans.cn: 我相信幫忙做家務可以培養孩子的責任感和獨立意識，這在他們長大後他們至關重要。

word: I believe helping around the house allows children to develop a sense of responsibility and independence,which will be crucial to them when they grow up.

name: Housework can be more interesting if  we do it  with loved ones.It's some quality time that we spend together.

trans.cn: 如果我們和所愛的人一起做家務，會更有意思。這是我們一起度過的美好時光。

word: Housework can be more interesting if  we do it  with loved ones.It's some quality time that we spend together.

name: It's likely that robots will be in every household taking over all the chores that we do today.

trans.cn: 機器人可能會在每個家庭中接管我們今天做的所有家務。

word: It's likely that robots will be in every household taking over all the chores that we do today.
